en: The rise of Technical and Vocational Education and Training (TVET) in Kenya represents a shift toward a more practical and inclusive approach to education. By focusing on skills development that directly responds to the needs of the labor market, TVET programs are helping to bridge the gap between education and employment, reduce youth unemployment, and drive economic growth.

en:
This are the first steps to keeping your family safe from Covid 19;
1.Wash your hands regularly with soap & running water
2. Cover your mouth and nose with a flexed elbow or tissue, when coughing or sneezing.
3.Avoid close contact with anyone who has cold or flu-like symptoms
guz:
Ebi nabio ebitambokero ebitangani b i'okorenda enyomba yao korwa ase Covid 19;
 1.Esibie amaboko ao ase n’amache y’egetacho, n’esabuni.
 2.Tuba omonu ne’chimioro kogotumia ekegokoro kiao gose egetambaa ekero ogokorora gose goasimora.
 3.Toba ang’e na omonto o nde bwensi obwate rikuba.

en:
Be safe from coronavirus.Washing your hands is the most important way to stop transmission.
1.Wet hands
2.Apply enough soap
3.Scrub all surfaces of the hands for 20-30 seconds.
4.Rinse thoroughly with running water
5.Dry hands with a clean cloth or single-use towel
guz:
Etange n’ebinyinyi bia Corona. Gosibia amaboko nenchera ya bene yogotanga ogoetia kwebinyinyi.
 1.Esibi amaboko
 2.Eyake esabuni
 3.Sugua kera ensemo yokoboko ase chisekunde 20-30
 4.Sibi amaboko ase amache egetacho
 5.Etinyi n’egetambaa ekerabu

en:
How to boost your immune system against the COVID-19;
1. Stay hydrated - drink 3-4 litres of water daily.

3. Exercise
4. Meditation
5. Quality sleep

Enchera yokomenta ogwetanga korwa Covid 19
 1.Kanywe amache amange - chilita 3-4 kera rituko

 3.Tarataria omobere
 4.Okoiranerera
 5.Chitoro chiisaine

guz: Eserekali komenta amatuko y’ekafyu, na gotenenia emesangererekano ao ao goika May 29

en: 2,169 people test positive for COVID-19 from 9,428 samples, positivity rate at 23pc; MoH says no death recorded
guz: Abanto 2,169 banyorekanire babwate ebinyinyi bia COVID-19, korwa ase chisampuli 9,428, ekerengo kia abaambokerigwe kere 23%; Ewizara y’Oborwaria yatebire gokwa nkoiyo kwabeire.

en: Magoha says Ksh.1B needed to buy masks for schools
guz: Magoha otebire Ksh.1B chiganeirie kogorera chisukuru ebikoneri/chimaski

en: There will be no air-lifting people from counties to Nairobi…There will be no capacity to be brought to Nairobi for treatment as Nairobi itself will be already overwhelmed…Where we are heading is unpredictable. It is better to be ready than to be sorry
guz: Obosombi bwa abanto g oetera chindege gocha Nairobi tikoiyo. Okonyara tigokoba aroro gwokorentwa Nairobi erio konyora oborwari, asengencho Nairobi yoka yanyarekire. Ase torochi tarikonyara kobanwa. Nigo ere buya kwebanga kobua gweitia.

en: Nationwide dusk to dawn curfew extended by 21 days in a bid to tame Covid-19 spread
guz: Richiko riogotasoka isiko ase ense engima, gochakera morogoba, goika bwakiire, riamentirwe amatuko 21 erio gokeani okoambokerigwa gwa Covid-19

en: 20 doctors from Cuba set to arrive in Nairobi tonight, Health CS Kagwe says they will be stationed at Kenyatta University Hospital for 6 months to help manage the Covid-19 pandemic.
guz: Abanyagitari 20 korwa Cuba mbakageire goika Nairobi obotuko bwa rero, Omowaziri bw’Oborwaria, Kagwe, otebire ing’a nigo barabe ase enyagitari ya Kenyatta University, ime y’emetienyi 6 erio gokonya gokeania oborwaire bwa Covid-19.

en: Launch of fortified maize, soy blend distributed across primary schools to address undernutrition.
guz: Okorentwa kw’ebituma biburukaine esoya kwararigwe chisukuru chia premari erio gokeania oborwaire bwokoborwa afya

en: Launch of voluntary certification recognizing employers who implement nutrition, mental health, and fitness standards.
guz: Ogochakigwa gw’esatibigeti yokwerwa eyio egoancherana abariki emeremo abare bagoikerania ebirengo biechindagera, oborwari bw’obongo, amo na okoba nechinguru kemobere.

en: Introduction of postpartum exercise and nutrition support groups led by physiotherapists and dietitians.
guz: Ogochakigwa amazoezi/ogotarataria omobere amo na ebiombe bigokonya chisemi chiechindagera, bikorawa na abanyagitari bogotarataria amo na bari bechindagera

en: Announcement encouraging daily consumption of five fruit/veg portions for wellness and disease prevention.
guz: Okoraria kwogosegeta gwa kera rituko, gwokoria amatunda keboikeranu/ching’eni erio kkoba buya kemobere na gotanga amarwaire.

en: Pilot providing mobile seed kits and training to women's groups to grow nutritious food in informal settlements.
guz: Omorundi chindege okorwa ebikoreri biechintetere am na koegeria ebiombe bia abakungu gosimeka chindagera chibwate amadini ase babegete obomenyo.

en: The government has imposed a raft of new drastic measures after cases of the new coronavirus in Kenya jumped to 15 in the last 72 hours. The new directives came after eight more people tested positive for COVID-19
guz: Eserekali yabekireebitambokero ekero ebinyinyi ebinyia bia Korona biamentekanete goika 15 ime ye’chinsa 72 chiaetire. Amachiko amayia nigo achete magega yabanto bande batano na batato gopimwa na konyorekana na COVID-19.

en: Kenya confirms three cases of Covid-19 Omicron variant; Health CS Kagwe says it has been detected among travelers who have been quarantined
guz: Kenya yaenekirie ebinyinyi bitato ao ao bia Covid-19 Omicron; omowaziri bwoborwaria CS Kagwe otebire nigo biarorekanete ase abanto barenge chisafari abare babekire karantini.

en: Kakamega County gov't orders closure of all public mortuaries, Governor Oparanya advises residents to bury their dead immediately.
guz: Eserekali y’ekaunti ya Kakamega yarure ogochika kwogosieka chimocheri chi’echinyagitari chieserekali, Omogabana Oparanya oboririe abamenyi gotindeka abakure kegima.

en: Education CS Magoha says colleges and universities to remain closed until January 2021 as they are not Covid-19 compliant
guz: Omowaziri bwe’Chisemi Magoha otebire chi’yunibasiti tichirikoigorwa goika January 2021 ase eng’encho tibarabwatia amachiko a Covid-19

en: Gov’t orders Mama Mbogas to stop chopping vegetables for customers over COVID-19 fears
guz: Eserekali yatebiririe mama mboga gotiga gokenyeri abanto ching’eni ase eng’encho y’obwoba bwa COVID-19

en: For now, open bars and test social distancing. KCPE and KCSE are not a ticket to heaven
guz: Ase bonoiga, toigore chibaa, amo na kobera are korwa ase abaminto. KCPE na KCSE tibiri tikiti chiokogenda igoro.

en: Gov't now calls for wearing of masks, vaccination as Kenya faces 6th COVID-19 wave
guz: Eserekali yabasabire abanto kobeka chimaski na konyora chanjo, ekero Kenya yatubirwe ne’rire ria COVID-19

en:
Mombasa Covid-19 Booths: 
Contactless testing booths to be distributed in 6 constituencies. Booths have zero contact between the medic and patient. Contactless booths allow for safer, faster mass testing. The locally assembled booths are a game changer
guz:
Ebisa bia Mombasa Covid-19:
 Ebisa biogopimwa otarigokunwa nkoenanu bire ase amajimbo 6 y’obochori. Ebisa tibibwati gokunana konde gwonsi gati y’omonyagitari amo n’omorwaire. Ebisa ebi nigo bigoachera ogopimwa kobwate oborendi naende kwa bwango na obonge. Ebisa ebi biroseiri ime y’ensemo eyuo biaonchorire egosori.

en: Schools to remain open despite a surge in Covid-19 infection rates
guz: Chisukuru nchigenderere koigorwa nonya ebiwango biokoambokerigwa gwa Covid-19 bigendererete gokiina

en: Kenya suspends all public gatherings, games, events, and church crusades; inter school games banned after first covid-19 case in Nairobi
guz: Kenya yatenenirie emesangererekano yonsi, emechieso/chigosori, ebipindi, n’emesangererekano ye’chikanisa; chigosori chiechisukuru chiakanirwe, magega yogotoka ekesi egetang’ani gia COVID-19 ime y’omochie o Nairobi

en: Coronavirus: A lockdown in Kenya is an option, but taxes won’t be lifted
guz: Ebinyinyi bia Korona: Gosiekerwa nyomba ime ya ense ya Kenya n’ogochora, korende goakana ekodi tigokorusigwa.

en: Governor Joho sets up sanitizing booths for pedestrians in Mombasa.
guz: Omogabana Joho obekeire ebisa bi’obochenu ase abanto bagotara namagoro Mombasa

en: Over 80% of patients are asymptomatic and can be treated from home. MoH has completed process of home-based care protocols. I appeal to Kenyans, that when we release the protocols and we see people coming home, there is no need for stigmatization
guz: Abarwairengoetania 80% mbabwati biorokererio naende nabo bakorwarigwa bagende chinka. Ewizara y’Oborwari yakorire korosia amachiko y’obokonyi bwa inka. Nigo nkobasaba abakenya, ekero torarwe omoroberio oyo naende torore abanto bakoirana inka, titobachecheria.

en: There is community spread in three key areas: Eastleigh, Kawangware, and Old Town Mombasa. We need to take serious action in those areas
guz: Egesaku nkere gesarete chinsemo isato chieng’encho: Eastleigh, Kawangware na Old Town Mombasa. Ntoganeirie koira egetambokero ekeroro ase chinsemo echio.

en: Nairobi, Kajiado, Machakos, Kiambu & Nakuru counties are individually and collectively declared a disease infected area. There shall be a cessation of movement by road, rail, air in to & out of these areas effective midnight
guz: Chikaunti chia Nairobi, Kajiado, Machakos na Nakuru chiatangasirwe koba chinsemo ase amarwaire akwambokera mono. Ogotenenigwa gw’okoira gwa para, egari yomorero, chindege gwatenenigwe gochakera chinsa isano na emo chia botuko.

en: Uganda declares Ebola outbreak after the Health Ministry confirmed a 24-year-old man showed symptoms and later died
guz: Uganda yatangasire egiateko kioborwaire bwa Ebola, ekero Ewizara y’Oborwaria yaenegeti omosacha bwemiaka 24 kabwate ebimanyererio bioborwaire obwo magega yaye agakwa.

en: Tiaty worst hit with 40% of residents affected. 2 people lost their lives last month due to Malaria. Govt distributing long-lasting treated mosquito nets
guz: Tiaty yanyorire egesusuro ekenene ase 40% ya abamenyi baye koambokerigwa. Abanto 2 basiririe amagima abo goetera oborwaire bw’Esosera. Eserekali nkoenana ere chineti chirwariri.

en: War on malaria gets a major boost. New drug Argesun deployed in Nyanza. Drug to help ICU patients, children with Malaria
guz: Esegi yokobua Malaria yamentekanire. Eriogo rigeni ria Argesun riatumekire Nyanza. Eriogo riogokonya abarwaire bare ICU, abana babwate Malaria.

en: Govt kicks of distribution of mosquito nets. Govt aims at distributing 15.3M treated nets
guz: Eserekali yang’eire koenana chineti. Eserekali nigo erengete koenana chineti chirwariri 15.3M

en: Health officials deploy drones to combat malaria in Busia County
guz: Aboobisa ba Afya/Oborwaria batumekire chindege erio korwania Malaria ase ekaunti ya Busia

en: Kenya among 12 African countries to get 18 million doses of malaria vaccine by 2025, WHO says priority will go to countries with the greatest need.
guz: Kenya nigo ere gati ye’chinse 12 chia Afrika chiranyore chodosi chomilioni 18 chia chanjo ya Malaria goikera omwaka o 2025, WHI nigo egoteba egotang’ana koa chinse chiria chibwate okogania okonene.

en: Malaria vaccine advisory: More children in malaria endemic counties to be vaccinated. WHO has given an approval for expanded use of the vaccine. 275,000 children partially jabbed, 45,000 are fully vaccinated. Data shows the number of malaria cases has gone down
guz: Obosemia bwa esindani ya Malaria: Abana abange ase chikaunti chikunire na malaria mbanyore esindani. WHO yaetirie ogotumeka mono gwesindani eyuo. Abana 275,000 babetirwe ake, 45,000 babetirwe yonsi. Data yaorokirie ing’a malaria yakeire.

en: We encourage people to seek treatment at health care facilities once they experience any symptoms.  When you seek treatment early, you protect yourself against severe malaria.
guz: Nigo tokobaa omoyo abanto bachi kirigia oborwari ase chinyagitari nsa chinde chionsi bagotwara ebimanyererio binde bionsi. Ekero okorigia oborwari mapema, nigo ogwetanga konyora esosera embe.

en: The Ministry of Health aims to scale the uptake of the malaria vaccine among children aged between 6 months to 14 years.
guz: Ewizara ya Afya yarigiri komenta enamba ya abana bagotumia esindani y’Esosera/malaria ime ya abana bare emetienyi 6 goika emiaka 14.

en: MoH dispatches 10 Cuban experts to Kakamega, Siaya, Kisumu, Bungoma, Busia, Vihiga, Homa Bay and Migori counties in the fight against malaria with biological methods.
guz: MOH yatomire abaataalamu 10 ba Cuba gochi chikaunti chia Kakamega, Siaya, Kisumu, Bungoma, Busia, Vihiga, Homabay na Migori ase esegi yogokora Esosera ase ogotumia chinchera chia kibayolojia.

en: Happy World Malaria Day! Here’s to raising awareness, protecting our communities, and pushing closer to a world free from malaria.
guz: Rituko rigiya ria Malaria ase Ense! Igaa n’ase eng’encho yokomenta obomanyi, korenda ebisaku biaito, na gosuguma gochia ase ense ebwate obosibore korwa ase Malaria.

en:
Did you know the Kenya Red Cross Society offers free on-call counselling services 24/7? Call us on 1199 and we will be there for you.

Since January-June 2019, our Mental Health and Psychosocial Support Services team attended to 513 calls.
guz:
Inee, nomanyete ing’a Kenya Red Cross Society mbabwate obosemia bwa bosa goetera esimi 24/7? Toakere esimi ase 1199 nao tore ase eng’encho yao.
 
 Koru Januari-Juni 2019, chitimu chiaito chia Afya y’obongo amo na Obokonyi bwa kisaikolojia nchiabwatire chisimi 513

en: When we open up and talk about what is affecting our mental health, those issues become bearable. They become less distressing, less overwhelming and less worrying. Reach out to us on 1199 and we will be there for you.
guz:
Ekero tokoigoka twakwana igoro y’ebinto bigochanga afya y’amongo aito, ching’ana echi nigo chikogusua. Nigo chigotiga goichania, tichiri koritoa naende tichirigotwara omoichano omonge.
 KWana n aintwe ase 1199 naintwe ntweariganie ase eng’encho yao.

en: Connect with others and be part of positive relationships.Building positive associations with people is good for your mental well-being
guz: Umerana n’abande erio obe ensemo y’obogisanio obuya. Okoagacha obogisangio obuya n’abanto nigo kore okuya ase afya yao y’obongo.

en: Its not unmanly to struggle.Check on the men in your life.
guz: Tiriri ing’ana ria kebosacha gochandeka. Barigererie abasacha bare ase obogima bwao.

en: Definitition of schizophrenia,causes,symptoms,diagnostic tools and treatment.
guz: Eng’encho ya skizofrenia, egekorenta, ebimanyererio, ebifaa biokorenga amo na oborwaria.

en: Definitition of bipolar,causes,symptoms,diagnostic tools and treatment.
guz: Eng’encho ya bipolar, ebimanyererio, ebifaa biokorenga amo na oborwaria.

en: Indicators of stress:easily irritable,anxious,panic attacks,sleeping problems,social withdrawal,irritability
guz: Ebiorokererio bi’ebirengererio: okokgechigwa bwango, enda egotera amache, chimbaa/obwoba, obokong’u korara, gweatanana na abande, okoromwa.

en: Daily activity checklist to improve mental health
guz: Omoroberio bw’emeremo ya kera rituko y’ogoonchoreria afya y’obongo.

en: Art, music, and writing provide powerful, nonverbal avenues for processing complex emotions and fostering mental clarity. These creative outlets can serve as effective tools for emotional regulation and psychological well-being.
guz: Obobundi, omosiki na oboriki nigo bikorwa chinchera chiechinguru chitabwati amang’ana, chiokoroberia omoyo, na korera oborabu bwa ebirengererio. Chinchera echi nabo chigokora buna ebifaa biokorenda obongo na gokina kisaikolojia.

en: Techniques like deep breathing,walking or time outdoors are universal tools for managing daily stressors.
guz: Chingencho buna koeyana mono, gotara gose kobuta isiko n’ebikoreri biogotenenera ebirengererio bia kera rituko.

en: Mental health conditions like depression can lead to physical symptoms such as fatigue and illness, highlighting the strong mind-body connection
guz: Ebiorokererio bia Afya y’obongo buna ebirengererio nabo bikorenta ebimanyererio bia kemobere buna omoroso na oborwaire, na igo kworokia okobwatana gati ya obongo na omobere.

en: This World Mental Health Day, lets prioritize mental well-being at work! A supportive environment is key to a healthy workplace. Check in on your colleagues today!
guz: Rituko eri ria Afya y’Obongo ase Ense, tiga totang’anie ogokina gwa kebongo ase emeremo! Amazingira amaya nigo are ay’eng’encho ase afya, ase chinsemo chiemeremo. Kwana nabamino rero!

en: Mental well-being is essential for a productive and healthy workplace. Prioritize mental health just as you would physical health.
guz: Okoba buya kw’obongo nigo kore okw’engencho gotwara chinsemo chiemeremo chibwate okobioka na afya. Tang’ania afya y’obongo buna oratanganie eya kemobere.

en: Talking about mental health breaks the stigma and helps others open up. Lets create a supportive environment for all.
guz: Gokwanera igoro ya afya y’obongo nigo kogokonya gosaria obochayi na gokonya abande gosiboka. Tiga toagache amazingira y’obokonyi ase bonsi.

en: Government distributes mosquito nets in malaria fight. Kilifi County is one of the beneficiaries. Nets program was flagged over procurement irregularities. MOH wants to distribute 15M nets in 22 counties
guz: Eserekali yaenanire chineti as esegi ya Malaria. Ekaunti ya Kilifi neyemo yabo ase chiria chigochi konyora. Omoroberio bwe’chineti nigo oetwe oborabu igoro ya ogotabwati amachiko y’ogochigora. Ewizara ya Afya nigo etagete koenana chineti milioni 15 ase chikaunti 22

en: Kenya confirms 12 more COVID-19 cases bringing total number to 246. Health CS Mutahi Kagwe says 5 of them are hotel workers.
guz:
Kenya koenekia okomentekana Kwa abwarwaire 12 bande ba COVID-19, bonsi ase oboamo goika 246 .
 Omoteneneri Bwa obochenu agoteba buna batano ase ana,nawakori egasi ba omobogani/hoteli.

en: Over the last 24 hours we have tested over 300 Kenyans, out of those 22 have tested positive for covid-19 (13-males, 9-females). 21 out of the 22 cases are people who are currently in quarantine
guz:
Ase chinsa 24 chiaetire, twarengire abakenya goetania 300, ase abwo, abanto 22 baenekigwe gotwara COVID -19 (13-abasacha, 9,abasubati).
 Ase abwarwaire abwo 22,21 mbaria babekire ensemo na gotangwa gotara ase' engecho ya ogotanga kombwakera.

en: Religious leaders under World Council of Churches urge governments and donor countries to increase Global Fund support, to aid sustainable responses to HIV, tuberculosis, and malaria.
guz: Abarai be chidini nse' ya oborai bwe chikanisa ase ense engima,bakoboria chiserekari na Chinse chia okorwa obokonyi,komenta obokonyi Bwa ekegancha Kia ense erinde gondereria emeroberio ya oborwaria Bwa enyamoreo,Esese na Esosera.

en: The US government’s freeze on foreign aid, especially through USAid has caused major disruptions in Kenya’s health sector, particularly in HIV, malaria, and tuberculosis programmes that heavily rely on donor support.
guz: Gotenenia obokonyi gochia chinse chia isiko gw'Eserekali ya America mono goetera USAID kwaretire obotutukanu ase ensemo ya obochenu ase ense ya kenya,monomono ase emeroberio ya oborwaria Bwa Enyamoreo, Esese na Esosera,eyio egosemeria ase obokonyi obwo.

en: There is no local transmission of malaria in Nairobi. If you have been a full time resident of Nairobi and you get sick with fever the probability that it is malaria is close to zero.
guz: Koambokera kwa Esosera tikoiyo, ime ya ensemo ya Nairobi. Onye kore omomenyi o Nairobi rioka ase engaki entambe na enyarekane kwarwarire na gotwara riberera,okonyarekana gwa okoba ne Esosera tikoiyo.

en: Rising temperatures elevate the risk to Nairobi's malaria-free status
guz: Ogokina Kwa riberera,gokomenta okonyarekana Kwa Esosera gotabao ase ensemo ya Nairobi

en: Malaria mortality rate rises to pre-pandemic levels, WHO report shows at least 597,000 people succumbed to the disease last year.
guz: Eripoti koru ase WHO nigo ekoorokia buna amakweri korua ase Esosera amentekanire goetania ebirengo magega ya ogoateka . Ase nse pi abanto 597,000,mbasiretie amagima kobwatekana na Esosera omwaka oera.

en: Mission for Essential Drugs and Supplies suspends orders for USAID-funded essential drugs, move likely to affect the distribution of HIV and malaria drugs
guz: Ekeombe Kia Amariogo aria aganirie mono, gotenenia okobagwa Kwa amariogo ye eng'echo korua ase USAID, egetambokero keranyare koreta obokong'u ase okobagwa Kwa amariogo a Esosera na Enyamoreo.

en: Devastating flooding in South Sudan is affecting around 1.4 million people, with more than 379,000 displaced, according to a United Nations update that warned about an upsurge in malaria.
guz: Embura embe y'eora ase ense ya south Sudan yaretire obokong'u ase abanto 1.4million na goetania 379,000 baborirwe ase okomenya kobwatekana na okoraria gwa ekeombe Kia Obomo Bwa Chinse ekio kiabete kegokurera okomentekana ase Esosera.

en: The Ministry of Health has reassured the public that there will be no shortage of essential drugs, including those for malaria, HIV/AIDS and TB for at least the next one year.
guz: Ewizara ya Afya yabaenekeirie abakenya buna amariogo ye ng'echo takobora gose gokea amo na aya Enyamoreo na esese ase omoaka oyomo okobwatia.

en: Kenya to release genetically modified mosquitoes to fight malaria
guz: Kenya gosokia chiumbu chionchoire amanyinga/DNA chinyare korwania malaria

en: To lower cases of HIV/AIDS, Tuberculosis and Malaria, and enhance the vaccines and immunisation programme in the country, I have proposed Sh28.7bn for the Global Fund and Sh4.6bn for vaccines and immunisation programmes.
guz: Gokeiyia oborwaire bwa Enyamoreo, Esese na Esosera na kogendereria emeroberio ye'chisindani chia ogotanga amarwaire aya, ase okorora kwane ndatebe, sh28.7 billion ase ekegancha gi'Ense na sh4.6bilion ase emeroberio ya chisindani chia ogotanga amarwaire.

en: You are six times more likely to get malaria if you visit Busia, Tana River, Kakamega, Bungoma, Kilifi, Kisumu, Trans Nzoia, Elgeyo Marakwet and Nandi counties, according to the latest data from the Ministry of Health.
guz: Kobwatekana na eripoti ya bwango iga korua ase Ewizara ya Afya, nabo ekonyarekana mara gatano na rimo aye korwara malaria ,koratarere chikaunti chya ,Busia,Tana River,Kakamega,Bungoma,Kilifi, Kisumu,Trans Nzoia,Elgeyo Marakwet na Nandi.

en: Scientists have found that a mosquito species blamed for malaria transmission in eastern and southern Africa has developed resistance to a long-used insecticide in the region.
guz: Abanasayansi banyorire ng'a eumbu ekoambokeria Esosera Africa ya mocha na irianyi, yatwarire okonara na korwania eriogo ria ogoita chiumbu erio riatumekire ase engaki entambe ase chinsemo echio.

en: Malaria's gendered burden: Recent floods heighten risk for women, girls
guz:
Omosigo Bwa Esosera ase abakungu/abasacha:
 Embura enyinge nigo ekomenta okonyarekana Kwa obobe gokorekana ase abasubati na chinyaroka

en: The Health Ministry also said the 2023/2024 mass net distribution campaign was launched in Homa Bay County on November 15, 2023, with 830,862 nets distributed, covering 91 percent of registered households.
guz: Ewizara ya obochenu nigo yateba ,omoroberio Bwa okoenana chineti ase obonge nigo ochagetwe ase ekaunti ya Homabay chitariki 15, November 2023, na chineti kobagwa goika 830,862, igo goikerania ekerengo Kia 91% ase chinyomba chiarigetwe.

en: Communities in Baringo fight back against malaria with local solutions and mosquito nets
guz: Ebinyoro ime ya Baringo korwania oborwaire bwa Esosera ase ogotumia ching'encho chiabo amo na chineti.

en: A malaria vaccine tested in Kenya gains WHO prequalification, costing as low as Sh300, becoming the world's second vaccine on the global prequalified list.
guz: Eriogo ria esindani y'ogotanga Esosera, riabeire rigotemwa ase Ense ya Kenya rianyarire goancherwa na goetigwa ase ekerengo egetang'ani na WHO. Nigo rikoonigwa sh.300, naende riabeire esindani ya kabere ase amariogo aria aetirigwe ase ekerengo ekio .

en: Global Fund, through the Kenya Medical Supplies Agency, is distributing mosquito nets in malaria-endemic regions across the country
guz: Ekegancha gi'ense, goetera ase ekampuni y'okobaga amariogo amo na ebinto ao ao bi'oborwaria, nkobagakere chineti ase chinsemo ao ao chi'Ense ya Kenya chiria chibwate Esosera kera engaki .

en: Malaria mortality has fallen back to levels seen before the Covid-19 crisis, the WHO said Wednesday, but called for faster progress against the disease that killed nearly some 597,000 people last year.
guz: Ogosiri obogima goetera ase oborwaire bw'Esosera gwakeire goikera ekerengo kiarenge nyuma ya Ogoateka gwa COVID-19, WHO yatebete rituko ria tichi gatato, korende gekagania amagenderero abwango korwania endwari eye, yagerete abanto 597,000 gosiria amagima abo,omwaka oera.

en: 10.9m treated mosquito nets to be distributed across 22 counties in fight against Malaria
guz: Chineti chie'chiumbu 10.9m chibekire eriogo ,kobagwa ase chikaunti 22 ase esegi ya okorwania Esosera.

en: Kenya signs six Global Fund grants amounting to Sh59.7 billion to support HIV, TB and malaria interventions; funding to strengthen health and community systems over three years.
guz: Kenya kobeka eseii obokonyi bwa chibilioni sh.59.7 korua ase ekegancha gi'ense'/Global Fund, echio chigokonya gosira emeroberio ya oborwaria Bwa Enyamoreo Esese na Esosera, ogoakana oko nigo kogokong'ia oborwaria naboigo chitini chiebisaku ase emiaka etato

en: The Ministry of Health has launched a mass distribution of mosquito nets in Tana River County to combat malaria in high-risk areas.
guz: Ewizara ya Oborwaria yachakire omoroberio bw'okobaga chineti chiechiumbu ase ekaunti ya Tana River erinde korwania Esosera ase chinsemo chia okonyarekana okonene Kwa endwari eye.

en: World Malaria Day: Kenya Joins the World in Commemorating Malaria Day.
guz: Rituko ria Esosera ase Ense: Kenya kobwatekana na ense engima ase okoarigania na gochengera rituko ria Esosera ria Ense .

en: There is a silver lining in the fight against malaria after Kenya was listed alongside 12 other African countries set to receive 18 million doses of the first-ever malaria vaccine in the next two years

Mental Health Check-Up Time!Mental Health Check-Up Time!
Your mental health is just as important as your physical health. Take a moment to check in with yourself today.
1. How are you feeling emotionally?
2. Are you getting enough rest?
3. Are you eating well?
4. Have you been active lately?
5. Do you need to talk to someone?
Remember, it's okay to seek help if you need it. Your mental well-being matters!

en:
This Men's Mental Health Awareness Month, lets break the silence. Society often tells men to "be strong," but real strength lies in acknowledging your struggles and reaching out.

1. Speaking up isnt weaknessits courage.
2. Your feelings are valid.
3.You dont have to face it alone.

Whether its stress, anxiety, depression, or just feeling overwhelmed your mental health matters. Talk to a friend, a counselor, or a support group. Asking for help is a sign of strength, not failure.
 You are human. You deserve support. You are not alone.

Prioritize your rest, recharge your mind, and wake up refreshed!

Your mental health matters. Choose smart solutions over short-term risks.

guz: Abanto basirete nnabo barabwatigwe goetera ekeombe ekebariri (Red Cross) amo nabariki amangana na komanyia abanto amang'ana.

en: Stagnant water breeds mosquitoes. Use bed nets and report mosquito infestations to health authorities.
guz: Chiumbu nigo chikoiborerana ase amache atereime. Tumia chineti chiebitanda korara na manyia abanyagitari igoro yokoromwa nechiumbu na buna abanto barwarete.

en: Communities should invest in boreholes and rainwater harvesting to ensure water access during droughts.
guz: Nere buya ebinyoro kobeka chinguri chiabo ase okorema ebisima ebinene bia abanto abange nomoroberion bwogotacha amache erio koba namache aisaine chingaki chieguragura.

en: Kenya's policy framework ensures coordinated disaster management. Understand your rights and government obligations.
guz: Amachiko aKenya igoro yobokoreri ekero kia omobasekano nkoenekia are ng'a okobeaterana nekomoti yemebasekano. Manya aboronge bwao neki eserikari ebwenerete kogokorera.

en: The national helpline 1195 is available at all times to provide immediate assistance to survivors of sexual and gender-based violence.
guz: Enamba yesimi yogokonya 1195 inao ere ase chingaki chionsi ase ogokonya bari batarareirwe, gotibonwa gose komocherwa nchera ende yonsi koreng'ana na eki ore.

en: Intimate partner violence often escalates gradually. Early recognition and training for frontline professionals support prevention and safe referrals.
guz: Eminano gose ogokurarana gati yomosacha nomokungu oye mara aanga nigo gokogenderera kogesekana na koba boke ng'orang'ora. Mbuya komanya ayio bwango na kwegeria abakoreri baria bare motwe gokonya ase okobaikera na kobakonya ebirengererio na kobaraa gochia nyagitari ase kobwenigwa.

en: Prompt reporting of gender-based violence protects survivors and preserves evidence. Specialized Gender Desks handle cases sensitively and survivors have rights to medical care, protection, and legal support.
guz: Komanyia ase obwango amang'ana eminano gose ogokorerwa bobe egekogera eki ore ngokonya kore baria bakoreirwe bobe, na gacha obosaidi igoro yayio. Egetengo kia beene ase Chinyagitari na Porisi nao amangana ogokorerwa bobe ase engencho yeki ore agokonyerwa, na baria bakoreirwe bobe mbare noboronge bwabo konyora obobwenia, korenda kemachiko na gokonya kemachiko.

en: All public health facilities in Kenya offer free medical services for gender-based violence survivors.
guz: Chinyagitari chionsi chieserikari aiga nka Kenya nkorwa chire obobwenia ao ao bogokorerwa bobe bosa ase baria bamocheirwe.

en: Personal safety plans help individuals prepare for dangerous situations by identifying safe locations and strategies for protection.
guz: Omoroberio oo aye omonyene kwerenda ngokonya ore kwebanga chingaki chiokong'u ase okomanya boronge ase ogotamera gochia na buna okwerenda.

en: Community support networks assist survivors by providing safe spaces, trained volunteers, empowerment programs, and coordinated referrals while prioritizing safety and confidentiality.
guz: Ebokundi biogosira ase ebinyoro nigo bigokonya baria bakoreirwe bobe ase enchera yokobaa aase bakobera atari namochando onde bwonsi goetera abakonyi babo bokwerwa begeirie buya, kobasira goetera ebinto bike bike bikobakonya, na kobwaterana gochia ase baranyare konyora obokonyi ao ao, oborendi bwaigoro nobobisi bwabo.

en: Harmful practices such as female genital mutilation and forced marriage are human rights violations. Kenya has committed significant investment to prevention and response.
guz: Chingencho chiaetire nechingaki gose chimbe buna chiria chiogokeba abana abanyaroka nenyomo ya bwango bataraisanera emiaka yokonywomwa nigo bire mamincha noboronge bwamwanyabanto. Kenya yaeraiganirie goetera korwa chibesa gotanga na korwa obokonyi bwa kera engencho gokora ayio. has committed significant investment to prevention and response.

en: Workplace policies and training prevent sexual harassment by establishing clear definitions, reporting channels, investigations, and support services based on national legal frameworks.
guz: Koba namachiko ase abanto bagokora emeremo na kobaegeria igor yoboronge bwa mwanyabanto ngokonya ere gokorerwa bobe kebwanchani egekogera kera omokori emeremo amanyete buya nga ogokora eke gose keria aya naria naro aramonyore, chinchera omonto akomanyeria abane igoro yayio, obotuki, amo nemeroberio yokomosira korengna nerichiko riense.

en: Child protection systems must prevent sexual abuse and exploitation and provide full support for affected children.
guz: Nebwenerete nga ebitengo bionsi bire bikorenda abana gtanga na abana gotibonwa na bosomba bonde bwonsi goetera okobaa ogokonya gwa kera engencho.

en: Technology supports gender-based violence prevention through safety apps and digital tools that offer emergency contacts and discreet help-seeking features.
guz: Etekinorochi ngokonya ere gotanga ogokorerwa bobe ekiagera eki ore goetera ebikoreri bioborendi bwaya amo negedichitari konyora chinamba chiesimi korigia ogokonya otari kwemanyekania.

en: Healthcare workers require specialized training in trauma-informed care, evidence collection, mandatory reporting, and coordinated referrals for survivors.
guz: Abakori emeremo bobochenu mbaganeirie amaorokererio abeene ase ogokonya barwaire babo komanya emechando nagekong'ia koyerwania, kobeka amo obosaiti , kobeka eripoti as ebitabu, na na okobwatera kobatoma gochia baranyore obokonyi bwa beene.

en: Safe houses and shelters offer secure temporary accommodation for survivors and their children.
guz: Aase agiya neyomba yokomenya nensemo eyemo yoborendi ase baria bakoreirwe bobe nabana babo.

en: Digital spaces can expose individuals to online abuse. Laws criminalize cyberviolence and support services help survivors secure devices, report incidents, and remove harmful content.
guz: Goetera obokonyi bwedichitari nkonyarekana ere gosioria baria bagokorera bobe abande goetera eintaneti. Amachiko nkorenda are abanto tobakorerwa bobe goetera eintaneti na kobakonya korenda chisimi nechikombiuta chiabo neintaneti korwa ebibago, korwa eripoti yokogoserwa, na gotinyia amangana aria akogechia.

en: Engaging men and boys in prevention programs promotes healthy relationships and challenges harmful gender norms.
guz: Renta abasacha nabura amo ase emeroberio yogosegeta oboamate obuya ase abanto na orokereria buna ogotareng'anana kwa banto ase engencho yebimira ere bobe.

en: Legal aid services ensure survivors access justice through free or subsidized representation.
guz: Ogokonya abanto kemachiko nigo korengete korora nga goikera ekeene goeera gokonywa bosa otari korwa kende gose ogoaka pesa inke igo omogambi bwebina gokogambera kotini.

en: Educational institutions must implement prevention programs that address harassment, assault, and exploitation in learning environments.
guz: Chisukuru razima chiikeranie emeroberio gotanga gokorerwa bobe kobasuguma gose kobagechi, kobarwania ngose komiga oboronge bwabo ase engencho bare abagongeru ase chisukuru.

en: Economic abuse limits financial independence. Financial institutions should recognize warning signs and support affected customers.
guz: Obosaria bwobogoko nigo bokomiga okwenyara nogwetenenera gwechibesa. Ebiombe baria bionsi bigokora nechibesa nere buya asebire komanya bwango emechando ere motwe na buna baranyare gokonya baria bakogachera chibesa chiabo.

en: Human trafficking for sexual exploitation is a serious crime. National laws provide strong penalties and survivor protections.
guz: Enchera yokobetereria gose koira abanto ase egete ase engencho yokobaonia ase ebiasara biobwanchani konyora chibesa okomocha okobe mono. Amachiko yense nkorwa are egesusuro ekerito na gokonya baria bakoreirwe bobe.

en: Risk assessment tools help identify individuals at high risk of experiencing or perpetrating violence to enable targeted interventions.
guz: Amasakara abwate amaborio na buna abanto bakoiraneria ebigokonya korora na komanya buna abanto baria bare ase ekonyarekana gokorerwa bobe gose kogenderera gokorerwa bobe erio gokonya kobeka emeroberio yogotanga ebwenerete.

en: Survivor-centered approaches uphold safety, dignity, and autonomy in all decisions about reporting and service use.
guz: Emeroberio yokobakonya baria bakoreirwe bobe nigo ekoimokereria igoro oborendi, amasikani, obobisi, nobosibore bwomonto korwa ebirengerio biaye neko aganeti gokorerwa.

en: Emergency settings heighten gender-based violence risks and require specialized prevention and response planning.
guz: Chingaki chiemebasekano gose obokongu nigo chikogesa ribaga abanto gokorerwa bobe ekiagera eki bare naya ekero abeire neganeirie chinchera chigotanga abanto gokorerwa bobe chaiabeene na emeroberio buna baranyare gokonywa.

en: Reliable data systems track violence trends and service use to inform evidence-based policies and programs.
guz: Amangana aria arikire amaikeranu buna chiripoti chiabasikari, chianyagitari na NGOs chikworokia buna abanto bagokorerwa bobe erio gokonya korosia amachiko nemeroberio yokobakonya.

en: Strategic communication campaigns promote non-violent norms and responsible media coverage of gender-based violence.
guz: Omoroberio bwoboamo obangire buya komanyia na gosomia abanto korengete gosegeta abanto goonchoreria na kwanga gokorera abanto bande bobe na korwa eripoti igoro ya baria bakoreirwe bobe otarikonyorwa, amo noboriki na komanyia abanto amang'ana goetera chiredio na amagaseti ase enchewra etari koeneria gokwanrera obobe bwogokorera aband bobe.

en: Persons with disabilities face higher risks of violence. Services must meet accessibility needs and provide inclusive support.
guz: Abanto abaremaru nigo bagokorerwa bobe kobua abanto bande. Ogokonywa kobarengete goika goikeranie buna bagoikerwa nokogania kwabo ase bonsi.

en: Refugee and displaced populations require protection measures and community involvement to reduce violence risks.
guz: Abanto baria abatemete chisegi korwa sobo na baria baseretigwe korwa ase abrenge ase chisegi chigesiasa nobogekaku mbaganetie chinhera buna bakorendwa ase okobwaterana nebinyoro gokeania gokorerwa bobe.

en: Correctional facilities must prevent sexual violence and respond effectively to any incidents.
guz: Chichera goika chitange ogokorerwa bobe ekiagera eki oro na korwa egusuro korengana nokomocha kwabamochi.

en: Technology-facilitated abuse requires digital security training and documentation skills for affected individuals.
guz: Ogokorerwa bobe goetra eintaneti neganetie oborendi bwegedichitari goetera ogosomia nenchera engiya yokorika na kogacha amang'ana ase bari bakoreire bobe.

en: Community-based prevention programs mobilize local leaders and groups to create safer environments.
guz: Oborendi goetera emeroberio yebinyoro goetra okoreta abarai nebiombe amo korora nga abanto bonsi mbuya bare kera ase bare.

en: Institutions must coordinate across sectors to provide effective, compassionate responses to survivors.
guz: Chinsemo chiserikari ao ao goika kobwaterana korwa obokonyi obuya nobwanchani ase abakoreirwe bobe.

en: Research strengthens program design and policy by generating evidence on effective prevention and response strategies.
guz: Amasomo okorigia chisemi chinyia, kobanga emeroberio na korosia amachiko goetera obomanyi obwo koba nechinguru gotanga gokorerwa bobe.

en: Women in politics face violence aimed at limiting participation. Electoral laws protect candidates and voters from gender-based harm.
guz: Obakungu bagokora siasa nigo bagokorerwa bobe korengete gokeania esiasa yabo gochia ase abasqacha. Amachiko obochori nkorenda are abarigia chikura nabaaki chikura korwa gokorerwa bobe ekiagera eki bare.

en: Healthcare facilities must screen for violence and provide safe and comprehensive responses for survivors.
guz: Ase abanto bakobwenerigwa goikbapime ekerengo omonto okoreire bobe na korwa obobwenia boisaine naende obuya.

en: Public transport systems must address harassment through staff training and appropriate response measures.
guz: Abarai bechirori chikobogori abanto goika chitange ebikoru biokogosereria goetera ogosomia bakori emeremo babo na korwa egesusuro ase abamochi.

en: Women in agriculture face distinct risks. Cooperatives should adopt prevention policies and reporting options.
guz: Abakungu bagokora emeremo ase oboremi nigo bare ase okonyorwa nemechando yabeene. Ebiombe bioboremi nere buya bitabe amachiko yogotanga nenchera yokorwa chiripoti.

en: High-density informal settlements require community-led safety efforts to reduce violence.
guz: Abanto bamenyete chirandi mabaganetie okobwaterana newbinyoro erio gokeania chiburaburu.

en: Older women experience specific forms of abuse. Caregiver training supports prevention and protection.
guz: Abangina abagotu nigo bagokorerwa bobe enchera ching'ao. Egeria baria babarendete buna enchera eyemo yogotanga gokorerwa bobe na kobarenda.

en: Religious institutions influence community norms. Clergy training and counseling support safe and equitable environments.
guz: Chidini ngosegeta chire buna ebinyoro bikorosia amachiko ekemira. Gosomia barai bechidini nigo egokonya gosegeta ababwatai babo korenda amasingira.

en: Sports programs must prevent harassment, abuse, and hazing through clear boundaries and reporting procedures.
guz: Emeroberio yechigori goika ekonye gotanga ebikoru bikogosereri agose bikogechi, gose bikorasimisa omonto gosoa na chinchera chiokoripoti ayio.

en: Hospitality venues should recognize and address risks such as trafficking and harassment while protecting guests and staff.
guz: Aase abanto bakoriera chindagera buna emebogani nere buya komanya na gotanga emechado eyio buna kobetereria gose kobasoi ase obosomba bwechinguru, kobatumia ase chinchera chiogokora obwanchani koegwa chibesa nayande, kobarenda abageni and nabakori emeremo babo.

en: Fishing industry environments pose risks of exploitation. Safety improvements at docks support worker protection.
guz: Emeremo yoborubi chinswe yaretire obwoba bwokorerwa bobe na koriananigwa. Gokongia oborendi aaria ase chinswe chigoikerigwa korwa obwato ngosira ere oborendi bwabokori emeremo.

en: Women living with HIV face increased risks and barriers. Integrated health, counseling, and legal services provide essential support.
guz: Abakungi bawate endwari yenyamoreo mbwango konyorwa nobobe nebitango. Obobwenia ase oboamo, obosemia, amo nogokonywa kemachiko nkorwabire ogokonya kwabeene.

en: Mining areas require strict policies and safety measures to prevent harassment and exploitation.
guz: Okorema amadini nigo koganetie amachiko amaikeranu noborendi gotanga okorera abande bobe, kogechi gose gochaya nakobarianania .

en: Nomadic pastoralist communities need mobile services, leader engagement, and economic support to reduce harmful practices.
guz: Abatugi baria bokong'anyanga'nya mvaganetie obokoreri bokobaikera goetera eintaneti, gokwanerana nabarai babo, na kobasira ase okabaa chisebesa erio kobarenda korwa ebikoru biraberetere obokong'u.

en: Market environments must establish reporting systems and committees to prevent harassment and extortion.
guz: Chichiro goika chibe nemeroberio egokonya abanyabiasara korwa okwemurangania kwabo gotanga gokorerwa bobe, kiogechigwa, kogosererigwa gose kobetererigwa gkorwa chibesa.

en: Residential facilities for persons with disabilities require strong safeguards and accessible education on rights and reporting.
guz: Aase abanto bamenyete na mono baria bare noborema chinchera chiokobarenda chingiya nchiganeirie na kobakonya goikera chisemi chioboronge na buna baranyare goteba ekero bakoreirwe bobe.

en: Higher education institutions must address campus sexual violence through comprehensive strategies and anonymous reporting.
guz: Chiyunifasiti goika chitange okobetereria, okogosereria gose gokorera abande bobe ekiagera eki bare goetera okomanyia abarai beyunifasiti otari kwemanyekani.

en: Refugee camps must prioritize safety planning, adequate lighting, and women’s participation in governance.
guz: Aaria chikambi chia baria batamire chisegi korwa chinsobo goika baroberie igoro yoborendi, oborabu boisaine ase chikambi chiabo, na gosangia abangina ase emeroberio yoborendi bwabo.

en: Government workplaces must maintain zero tolerance for harassment through training, accountability, and independent reporting systems.
guz: Aaria chiofisi chieserikari ase abanto bagokorera emeremo goika chitange ogokorerwa bobe, kobabetereria gose kobagosereria oetera okobasomia, obotenereri, nechinchera chiokorwa okwemurangania kwabo.

en: Climate disasters increase risks of violence. Preparedness must include violence risk assessments and mitigation actions.
guz: Emechando yogoonchoreria kwerire nigo egosegeta abanto gokorerwa bobe. Emeroberio yogwetanga nayio goika erigererie ebinto biragere ogkorerwa bobe gose kogosererigwa na buna baranyare gotangwa.

en: Children face online risks. Parents should monitor use, apply controls, and teach safe behavior.
guz: Abana mbare ase hatari goetera eintaneti. Abaibori goika bamongere buna abana babo bagotumia eintaneti, batabge na komanyia abana babo chinchera chingiya chibaretere emechando.

en: Suspected child abuse should be reported immediately to police or through the *116# anonymous helpline.
guz: Abana ekageire gokorerwa bobe gose gotibongwa goika eripoti erugwe gotachererwa gochia ase abasikari goetera enamba eye yesimi *116# otari kwemanyekania.

en: Child trafficking remains a major threat. Communities should report suspicious activity to authorities.
guz: Ogosoi abana ase ebinto bitancheiri, kobatamia gose kobabisa erio kobatumia ase chinchera chitabwenereti neringa rinene riokogosia. Ebinyoro goika birwe amang'ana igiro yebinto bare nechitangutangu ase abagambi gose abasikari.

en: Schools must implement protection policies, anti-bullying systems, and counseling services to safeguard learners.
guz: Chisukuru goika chiikerania amachiko oborendi, gokorera abana abande bobe, na korwa obosemia erio korenda abana buya.

en: Foster caregivers must be vetted to ensure safe environments for vulnerable children.
guz: Abaibori abarendi babana barigererigwa buya bataraegwa abana korenda erio korenda nga abana baria abake batanyare kwerenda.

en: Child marriage harms children’s health and future. Communities must report cases and support girls’ education.
guz: Enywomo yabana abake nigo egosaria afia yabana nobogima bwabo bwa motwe. Abanto goika barwe eripoti igoro yobobe obwo na gosira chisemi chiomwana omonyaroka.

en: Children experiencing trauma need psychological support available through free counseling services.
guz: Abana bare ase ogochandeka bwebirengererio mbagabeti ogokonywa kobakonya gokinania omochando oyio bosa goetera chinkwana nomonyagitari konyora chinguru chiogokinana nebirengererio.

en: Street-connected children require shelters, education, and reintegration programs for safety and development.
guz: Abana baria banarete obogima bwokobera ebisona ase chitaoni mbaganetie ase bakorara, chisemi, nemeroberio yokobairania chinka chiabo ase oborendi namagenderero.

en: Child labor is illegal. Report hazardous child work to the Labour Department or call 0800220444.
guz: Obosomba bwabana mamincha yerichiko. Karwe eripoti igoro yabana bare ase emeremo eranyare kobaretera emechando gochia chiofisi chitenererete obokori emeremo gose goaka esimi 0800220444.

en: Children involved in legal processes should receive specialized legal aid through the Office of the Director of Public Prosecutions.
guz: Abana abwo bare ase okoariganigwa gotamigwa mamincha yerichiko neganeirie konyora obokonyi mwachiko bosa goetera ofisi yomoteneneri bwobosoi ebina (ODPP).

en: Children should learn to protect personal information online and report suspicious interactions to trusted adults.
guz: Nere buya abana kwegera buna baranyare korenda amangana abo arikire are ase eintaneti na komanyia oyo begenete igoro yechitang'utang'u.

en: Domestic violence harms children. Report incidents to local authorities or child helplines.
guz: Chiburaburu chiekenyomba nigo chikoumisa gose gosaria abana. Karwe amangana igoro yaya gochia abagambi gose chiofosi chieserikari chirendete abana.

en: Government and NGOs support orphaned children with essential services. Adoption and foster care follow legal guidelines.
guz: Eserikari na NGOs ngokonya chire abana chitankana ase okobakonya ase chinchera ao ao chiengencho. Buna okogora abana ase enchera yamachiko gochia abaibiri bakabere na kobabwatia kemachiko komanya ng'a mbuya barendete abana abwo.

en: Every child has rights to education, healthcare, and protection. Communities must report violations.
guz: Kera omwana nare noboronge bwokonyora chisemi, obobwenia, na oborendi. Abanto goika barwe eripoti igoro yotaikeranigwa kwayio.

en: Bullying leads to depression and school dropouts. Schools must enforce strict anti-bullying policies and provide counseling for affected children.
guz: Ogokorera abande bobe nigo gokoreta ogochandeka kwebirengererio, ogoichania goika gotiga amasomo. Chisukuru nere buya kobeka amachiko amakong'u gotanga ogokorera abande bobe na korwa obosemia ase abana baria bakoreirwe bobe.

en: In disasters (floods, fires), children are most vulnerable. Ensure they are evacuated safely and receive psychosocial support.
guz: Ekero kiemebasekano buna (etoigo, nopgwateka kwemerero), abana nabwo bagochandeka mono ekiagera batari naguru chigokonya. Rora ng'a batammigwe gose korusigwa aroro buya na bae ogokonywa kwebirengererio goetra okobakwanera.

en: Sexual predators target children online and offline. Parents should monitor interactions and teach children about body safety.
guz: Ebibago bitagete gokoria abana chingencho chiobonyaka nigo bikembete abana goetera eintaneti gose kobaikera abanyene. Nere buya abaibori komongera okoererania chinkwana chiabo na kobanyia igoro yoborendi bwomebere yabo.

en: Children with disabilities face higher risks of abuse. Ensure inclusive education and accessible reporting mechanisms for their protection.
guz: Abana bare noborema nigo ere raisi ase bare gokorerwa bobe. Rora nga abana bonsi ba kera engencho banyorire chisemi na buna baranyare komanyia igoro yogokorerwa bobe ase oborendi bwabo.

en: Local communities should establish child protection committees to monitor and report abuse cases, working closely with government agencies.
guz: Nere buya ebinyoro koba nechikomiti igoro yoborendi bwa abana chikomongera na koripoti buna abana kogorerwa bobe, gokora emeremo yabo ase ase okobwaterana nebiombe bieserikari.

en: The Kenya Police have specialized desks to handle child-related cases with sensitivity and confidentiality. Report cases at any police station.
guz: Chipori stesheni nchire negetengo kiabeen kegosugurikia buna abana bakomecherwa buna ogoakwa, ogotibongwa, obosomba, okoiba gose gokengania abana ase enchera chiobosani nabana na erendete obobisi bwabana. Karwe eripoti ase porisi stesheni ende yonsi.

en: Neglect harms a child's development. Parents and guardians must provide basic needs, love, and security to prevent long-term trauma.
guz: Ogotarenda gose koa omwana ebinto atagete nigo ekogocha ogokina na okogenderera kwomwana. Abaibori nabarendi babana goika bae abana babo ebi bakonyara, buna obwanchani, noborendi gotanga mechando yebirengererio nogochandeka ase engaki entambe.

en: Refugee children are vulnerable to abuse and trafficking. Humanitarian agencies provide safe shelters and education in camps.
guz: Abana ba baria batamete chisegi korwa sobo igo ere raisi ase bare gokorerwa bobe gokenganigwa gose koibwa. Ebiombe bikorwanerera oboronge bwekemwanyabanto bieserikari nkorwa bire obomenyo obuya nechisemi aaria ase chikambi.

en: Some communities still practice harmful traditions involving children. Report such cases to authorities immediately.
guz: Abanto bande mbagenderete gokora ebienyechi buna ogekeba abanyaroka ebio bire mamincha noboronge bwa abana. Karwe eripoti yamang'ana ayio gochia ase abambi otari konyorwa.

en: Positive parenting reduces abuse risks. Attend government-sponsored parenting programs to learn child protection strategies.
guz: Oboreri obuya nigo bogokeania abana gokorerwa bobe. Soa gose kabe oyomo ase omoroberio bweserikari gosomigwa chinchera buna oranyare korenda abana.

en: Children involved in legal matters should go through specialized courts to ensure fair and trauma-sensitive proceedings.
guz: Ebina birengete abana goika ebina biabo bigamberwe ase chikoti chiabeene korora ng'a biagendiigwe buya birendete gotatubania obongo naende korwa obobe bwabete.

en: Underage drug use leads to crime and health issues. Schools and parents should educate children on substance abuse dangers.
guz: Abana abake konywa amarwa nigo gokogesa obosaria nemechando ya afia. Nere buya chisukuru nabaibori basomie abana igoro yemachando yokonywa amarwa.

en: Dial 116 (Child Helpline) or 999 (Emergency) to report child abuse, neglect, or exploitation for immediate assistance.
guz: Aka esimi 116 (Obokonyi ase Abana) gose 999 (Emebasekano) komnyia igoro yogokorerwa bobe kwomwana, ogoserigwa gose okwangwa, gose koba ase obosomba erio onyore ogokonya kegima.

en: Children in areas like Northern Kenya face abduction and recruitment into armed groups. Security agencies must prioritize their safety.
guz: Abana bare chinsemo chiria buna Kenya ya Irianyi nigo ere raisi ase bare koibwa na gosoigwa ase ebiombe biobokebago. Ebiombe bieserikari goika birwe birigerie ayio ase okobarenda.

en: Perpetrators of child abuse face severe penalties, including life imprisonment. Report offenders to ensure justice for victims.
guz: Ebibago biria bigosaria abana mbirigereririe negesusuro ekenene, gosse giibwa maisa. Ripoti ebibago ebio ase okorigia ekeene ase baria bokoreirwe bobe.

en: Schools in high-risk areas should have security measures to protect children from terrorist threats and abductions.
guz: Chisukuru chiria chire aase ere raisi abana gokorerwa bobe mbuya chibe nomoroberio omuya bwoborendi korenda abana korwa obwoba bwebibago koruta chipomu noboibi bwechiombe.

en: Children's identities can be stolen for fraud. Parents should safeguard birth certificates and monitor credit reports.
guz: nabo ekonyarekana nga ebiband biabana bibwe gokorera obongainereria. Abaibori brende buya chisatificate chiokoiborwa chia abana babo no komongera buna chibesa chigosao chisimi chiabo.

en: Victims of sexual abuse need medical, legal, and psychological support. Specialized centers offer free services nationwide.
guz: Baria bakoreirwe bobe gose gotibongwa nere buya konyora obokonyi bwobobwenia, kemachiko, anakebirengererio. Chisenta chiegeirie gokora emeremo eyio nkorwa chire obokonyi bwa bosa Kenya engima.

en: Many children drown in open water sources. Parents should supervise kids near pools, rivers, and wells.
guz: Abana abange nigo bkogwa nagokwera ime yechinsemo chiamache. Abaibiri goika barande abana babio ekero bare ange nase aria agoakerwa ontimbu, chindoche, amo nechinsoko.

en: Churches and mosques must vet staff and implement policies to prevent child abuse within their facilities.
guz: Chikanisa nemesikiti goika bakongori abakori emeremo babo na goikerania amachiko agotanga gokorera abana bobe imse yechinyomba chiikanisa gose emesikiti.

en: Media should avoid exposing children to harmful content and respect their privacy when reporting on abuse cases.
guz: Abariki na baria bagotangasa amang'ana goika barende gotanga nga amangana agosaria abana ase ogotatora amarieta abo nase barwete ekero bakomanyia amangan buna abana bagokorerwa bobe.

en: Criminal gangs exploit children for begging. Report such cases to the police for rescue and rehabilitation.
guz: Ebibago nigo bigotumia ribaga riabana gotenyara ase ogosaberera. Manyia abasikari kobakonya na kobarongei.

en: Ensure school vans are properly licensed and drivers vetted to prevent accidents and kidnappings.
guz: Rora nga chirori chisukuru nchuibwate chirensesi buya nomotereba buya achoretwe korenga gotanga emebasekano na koibwa kwa abana.

en: Extremist groups target vulnerable children. Communities should report suspicious recruitment activities.
guz: Ebiobago biria bigosaria amongo abanto na kobaira obokebago bwokotuta chipomu nigo nigo birengete abana baria batari kwenyara gose korwa emchie emetaka . Abanto gioka barwe eripoti igoro yebinto bare nechitang'utang'u nabirobio gose okorikwa gosoa obokebago obwo.

en: Hospitals should have trained staff to handle child abuse cases with confidentiality and care.
guz: Chinyagitari mbuya koba nabakori emeremo begeirie gosugurikia ogokorerwa bobe kwabana ase obobisi obonene noborendi boisaine.

en: Teach children fire safety measures and ensure homes have working smoke detectors to prevent tragedies.
guz: Somia abana chinhera chiokwerenda nomorero na rora ng'a chinka chibwate egento keria gekomanya ekero erioki rireo erio gokonya gotanga emerero gwateka.

en: Online games can expose children to predators. Parents should monitor gaming interactions and set time limits.
guz: Chigosori chieintaneti nigo chigosuguma abana ang'e gochia ase ebibago biabo. Abaibori goika bamongere chingaki abana bakorrigereria chigosori na ase chinsa gete.

en: Families should include children in disaster drills and ensure they know emergency contacts.
guz: Chifamiri goika chisangie abana babo amo koroberia buna baranyare gotange omorero tibwateka sobo na ekero bwatekire ase bagotamera gochia nechinamba chiesimi barangerie konyora ogokonya.

en: Teach children stranger danger rules and ensure they travel in groups. Report missing children immediately.
guz: Somia abana tibakwana omonto batamanyeti gose kobwatia amang'ana yomonto batamanyeti buna enchere engiya yokwerenda na gotara amo abanto abange. Karwe amangana igoro yomonto otaoyi otari konyorwa gochia ase abambi gose porisi.

en: Businesses must avoid employing children and support initiatives for their education instead.
guz: Abanyabiasara goika barende tibarika abana buna abkori emeremo yabo korende basire emeroberio yogokonya ng'a bachire esukuru gosoma.

en: Sports academies must have policies against physical and sexual abuse of young athletes.
guz: Aaria ase abanto bagosomera gokora chogosori goika babe namachiko agotanga gokorerwa bobe ekiagera eki ore gose ogotabatabwa ase abanyagosori abasae.

en: Keep medicines and chemicals out of children's reach to avoid accidental poisoning incidents.
guz: Beka amariogo mo nebinto biria bionsi bire hatari ase abana are korwa ase bare buna enchera eyemo yogotanga abana konywa chisumu ase egesio ekebe.

en: Event organizers should provide child-safe spaces and lost-child protocols during large gatherings.
guz: Baria bakoroberria emeyega nere buya kobekaase abana basirete bakobekwa negento abaibiri basireriigwe nabana babo babwenerete gokora ekero kiesangerekano emenene.

en: Tourist hotspots sometimes exploit children for labor or sex. Report such cases to the Tourism Regulatory Authority.
guz: Aase abanto bakorwa isiko (abatari) bagotarera chingaki chinyinge nigo akoba aase abana bagokorigwa egasi gose gotibongi. Karwe eripoti gochia baria batenenerete obotari.

en: Kenya's laws are evolving to better protect children's rights. Stay informed on legal changes affecting child welfare.
guz: machiko a Kenya akongiigwe erio korenda abana baria batari konyara kwerenda gose korwa emechie emetaka erio korenda oboronge bwa abana. Kabe gokomanyigwa igoro yamaonchorerio arengete ebiombe biabana.

en: Neighbors, teachers, and relatives must speak up against child abuse to create safer environments for children.
guz: Abaamate,abarimu, na abairi goika bakwenere ringana igoro yabana gokorerwa bobe erio korora ng'a abana tibari ase hatari yogokorerwa bobe.

en: Livestock theft remains a challenge in pastoralist regions. Communities should form watch programs, brand animals, and report suspicious activities.
guz: Oboibi bwechiombe nabo botigarete koba omochando aaria chinsemo chiobotugi. Nere buya ebinyoro koba nemeroberio yobomongeri, basambererie chiombe chiabo chinamba, na korwa eripoti igoro yamangana bare nechitangutangu naro.

en: Regular vaccination protects livestock from major diseases. Veterinary services offer free campaigns during high-risk seasons and farmers should keep records.
guz: Ogochancha etugo ase chingaki chionsi nigo egotanga amarwaire yetugo korwa amanene. Abanyagitari betugo nkoba bare negeseto chingaki endwari yetugo egwateks na mbuya abaremi koba nomobaro bwetugo yabo.

en: Water scarcity during droughts causes losses. Farmers should adopt water harvesting methods such as dams, pans, and subsurface storage.
guz: Ogokeana kwamache chingaki chieguragura nigo ekorenta asara Nere buya abaremi kwegera gotacha na kogacha amache ase okorema chingoro, kogora ebibuyu ebinene, koagacha chitangi chia'mahe inse yeriraba.

en: Biosecurity prevents disease outbreaks. Disinfect footbaths, quarantine new animals, control wildlife access, and report sick animals promptly. Proper carcass disposal is essential.
guz: Gotanga okoererania etugo korwa ensemo eyemo gochia eyende nigo egotana okwambokerana kwamarwaire yetugo nabanto. Beta chiombe esindani yoborwaire bwomonwa namagoro, chiombe chikorwaa gochia aria chichanche, renda chingiti chiorosana tichiika ange, na karwe eripoti ioro yetugo erwarete otrikonyorwa. Tindeka etugo eri yakure inse kabisa.

en: The Kenya Livestock Identification and Traceability System assigns herd numbers and ear tags to support theft prevention and disease control.
guz: Omoreoberio o'Kenya komanya etugo, na komanya ase yarwete ngosambereria ore chiombe chinamba gose gochikera chinamba ase amato buna enchera yogotanga oboibi.

en: Wildlife predation causes losses. Farmers should construct predator-proof enclosures and use guard animals. Compensation is available for verified cases.
guz: Ogoitwa gwetugo nechingiti chiorosana buna endagera yabo nigo gokoreta asara ase omoremi. Nere buya abaremi koagacha gose kogitera etugo yabo buya gotanga chingiti chiorosana goikera etugo yabo na koyeita bua endagera yabo. Ogoakanwa ase baria etugo yabo yaitetwe nechingiti chiorosana nereo ase baria bagitere etugo yabo buya.

en: Index-based livestock insurance protects pastoralists from drought losses using satellite data triggers.
guz: Ensuarence erendete abaremi bobotugi nereo ekero rioka yamanyakinire nga omobaso omonene gose etoigo gose ogwateka kwendwari etare konyarekana ekorenda abatugi gotera ebimoreki bieintenet igoro aa ase rire bokorenga ekerengo omochando ore gokonys chiinsuarence komanya nechibesa irenga bagoakana omoremi.

en: Unauthorized livestock movement spreads disease. Farmers should demand permits and follow quarantine notices.
guz: Okoererania gwetugo gotancheirie nigo kogotaria amarwaire. Nere buya abaremi basabe rirube rikobanchera goetia etugo korwa aa gochia aari na kobwatia amachiko ogochancha chitugo chiabo.

en: Proper slaughter methods protect meat safety. Only use licensed slaughterhouses or follow public health guidelines for home slaughter.
guz: Obonyenyi etugo obuya na gacha enyama buya protect. Tumia ebichinchio biria biancheire gose bwatia amachiko yobochenu ekero okonyenya etugo yao nka.

en: Certain plants poison livestock. Farmers should remove toxic plants and provide alternative fodder during drought. Veterinary analysis supports diagnosis.
guz: Ekero etugo yarire emete gete nigo ekoba esumu mebere yabo. Nere buya abaremi batogore emete buna eyio yonsi na koa chitugo chiabo obonyansi obuya chinaki chiguragura. Ogopima etugo yao nomonyagitari bwetugo nabio bikoenekia ayio.

en: Criminals target livestock markets. Trade only in official markets, verify identities, and keep transaction records.
guz: Ebibago nigo birengete echiro yetugo. Kora ebiasara nechichiro chiria chiancheire neserikari, rora nga etugo eyio nemanyekanete buya nomoneyene obo, na gacha amariko buna okogora etugona koyeonia.

en: Ticks spread deadly diseases. Regular dipping, chemical rotation, and daily inspections protect livestock.
guz: Amagecha nigo agotambokeri amairwaire amabe ase etugo. Koira etugo chidipu, gochenchia amariogo ase edipu, gose goyesibia ase okoyesiarera eriogo riogoita amagecha nepambu, na korigereria kera rituko nga etugo yao tebwati amagecha.

en: Drought requires special management. Provide minerals, reduce herd size early, and conserve water.
guz: Eguragura nego eganitie emeroberio emeikernu korenda amache, gosiarera ebimeri amache, na koa etugo amache okonywa. Karwe amache echichuba, keania obonge bwetugo yao genkioy, na gacha amache.

en: Proper feed storage prevents aflatoxin contamination. Keep grains dry, mold-free, and securely stored.
guz: Kogacha endagrera buya nigo egokonya ogotabosa kwendagera.

en: Early reporting prevents outbreaks. Contact veterinary officers or the Toll-Free Animal Disease Hotline 0800721313.
guz: Korwa eripoti bwango igoro yamarwaire gochia ase abanyagitari nigo egotanga oborwaire kwambokerana/koranda. Manyia omonyagitari bwetugo rangeria esimi eye yamorero 0800721313 otari goakana kende.

en: Climate change increases animal risks. Provide shade, drainage, windbreaks, and use early warning systems.
guz: Ogoonchoreria kwerire nigo gokogesa emechando ase atugo. Beka etugo yao inse yekiriri, emetaro yogosokia amache amachafu, chimbago gotanga embeo, na komanya bwango igoro yogoonchoreria kwerire bwebage.

en: Milk safety requires hygiene. Wash udders, use clean containers, cool milk, and sell only to licensed processors.
guz: Okogacha amere buya neganetie obochenu. Sibia enyeri nechimbere buya, beka amabere ase egento ekerabu, kendia amabere, na yaoneri bari bawete amarube yokobanchera koonia amabere boke.

en: Internal parasites reduce productivity. Deworm regularly, rotate grazing, and test fecal samples.
guz: Ebianda nigo bikei amabere. Kae etugo yao eriogo riebianda, onchoreria ase okorisia etugo yao korwa aa gochia aaria, na pima esike yetugo yao komanya gose nere nebianda.

en: Pastoralist migrations need planning. Obtain permits, choose safe routes, and avoid conflict areas.
guz: Okonganya korwa aa gochia aaria kwa abatugi nkoganetie emeroberio emiya. Nyora ogwancherwa gwokong'anya netugo yao, etera ase atari nemechando, kabe are korwa chingongo chiria chire neminano.

en: Misuse of veterinary drugs creates resistance. Buy from licensed sources and follow prescriptions.
guz: Koa etugo amriogo otabirie nabanyagitari betugo nigo egosaria obonyamasi bwetugo gose amariogo atari gokora egasi buya ase etugo. Gora amariogo korwa amonyagitari omoronge eriogo ribwate amalezo buya.

en: Accurate records improve management. Track births, deaths, treatments, and vaccinations.
guz: Amariko abwate maeleso yoboremi bwetugo yao nigo akogokonya ase emeroberio yao. Bwatia komanya chitariki chia kera etugo ekero yabiaretwe, ogokwa, buna kwarure obobwenia, na gochichancha.

en: Beehive theft is rising. Secure apiaries, mark hives, and report suspicious buyers.
guz: Oboibi bwemetana yechinchoke mbogendererete kogeseka. Renda buya emetana, yebeka chinamba, na manyia igoro yabagori bakengeka.

en: Industrial pollutants harm animals. Report dumping, fence off contaminated sites, and test water.
guz: Obochafu bokorwa ase chifakitori nigo bokorentera etugo obokongu. Karwe eripoti igoro gotuguta obochafu bwabo ase enchera etari engiya, gita aase eubochafu bogotugutwa, na pima amche komanya gose nabwate ebinyinyi.

en: Floods kill animals and spread disease. Move herds to higher ground and disinfect pens after floods.
guz: Omogoko omonene nigo ogoita etugo na okoranda kwendwarim yetugo. Siarera obweri eriogo motwe yemegoko.

en: Community policing reduces livestock theft. Share intelligence and support police investigations.
guz: Oborendi bwebinyoro nogo bogokeania oboibi bwetugo. Karwe amanagana obotuki na bwatisia porisi kobeka oborendi.

en: Proper manure handling prevents disease. Compost before use and store away from water sources.
guz: Kogacha na gotumia bobe obwoyo buya nigo kogokeania amarwaire. Karwe ribaga risaine ase eubo koguna na goonchoreria koba obwoyo omanye kobotumia na bobeke are korwa ase amache.

en: Snakes bite animals in dry seasons. Clear bushes and seek immediate treatment for bites.
guz: Chingiti chingenda nse nkorasa chire etugo aaria chingongo chinyomo. Rabia orsana na rigia obowenia bwa bwango ase etugo yao rasirwe neng'iti engenda nse.

en: Poor transport harms animals. Ensure ventilation, avoid extreme heat, and inspect animals after transport.
guz: Okobogoria etugo bobe nechirori nigo akoumisa etugo. Rora nga erori okobogoreria etugo yao nebwate ebigorero bisaine koreta embeo ime, renda nga riberera tibucha erori ime, na rigereria buya nga etugo mbuya ere magega goika ase kware koyeira.

en: Auction yards attract criminals. Use licensed yards, verify buyers, and maintain registers.
guz: Ase ebinto bigoakerwa omonada nigo akongusa ebibago. Akera omonada aase aitabire neserikari, rigereria buya abagori baino, na gacha buya amariko buna ogoaka omonada ebinto ebio.

en: Contaminated feed causes losses. Test for aflatoxins and store feed safely.
guz: Endaera enchafu yetugo nigo ekorenta asara. Pima komanya gose engaera eyio nebwae obobosu na gacha endagera eyio buya.

en: Large birds prey on young livestock. Use scare devices and provide sheltered pens.
guz: Ebibaki na makotu nigo akira ebichichu buna endagera yabo. Gitera etugoyao buya na rosia ebinto binga buna omonto obogoretie enyimbo gochia igoro na koyeka aroro kogosa ebinto ebio bitgete koira etugo.

en: Disaster preparedness reduces losses. Identify evacuation routes and store emergency supplies.
guz: Kweroberia buya nyuma yemechando nigo ogotanga asara. Orokia chinchera chiokominchoreria ekero kiemebasekano na gacha endagera orarie ekero kiemebasekano.

en: Water points attract thieves. Water animals by day and patrol high-risk areas.
guz: Ase amache akobucherwa nigo akongusa ebibago. Ira chiombe kere mobaso konywa amache animals no mokera buya aase okagerete abaibi barabaise korwera.

en: Animal noise disturbs communities. Proper housing reduces noise and prevents complaints.
guz: Okwana gwechiombe nigo gokogechia abanto. Koagacha obweri obuya nigo bogotanga eriogi riokwana na igo gotanga abanto kwemurangania.

en: Stray animals destroy property. Maintain secure fencing and report damage promptly.
guz: Etugo yabagoire nigo egosari ebimeri biabanto. Gitera buya etugo yao na manyia abanyene ekero etugo yao yasaririe ebinto bia bande.

en: Dry season fires threaten grazing areas. Create firebreaks and report arson incidents.
guz: Omorero chingaki chieguragura nigo okorenta obokongu ase oborisia bwetugo. Onye omogondo bwendagera gose rinani ore omonene, yobarore gati gati na koyatiga atri namete gose obonyansi gotanga omorere gotamboka gochia asande na manyia abarai onye nomonto bwogetie obomorero eyio makusudi.

en: Proper breeding management prevents injuries. Use healthy stock, maintain hygiene, and record breeding dates.
guz: Renda korora nga ekero etugo yao ekobwata embego yakorirwe ase enchera engiya etarikoumisa etugo eria ekobwata embego. Tumia eeri ebwate afia engiya , renda obochenu, na rika inse chitariki kwaete etugo yao embego.

en: Equipment theft affects productivity. Secure tools and machinery and report theft immediately.
guz: Oboibi bwebinto bioboremi buna chitinga chiokorem nebinde nigo bikoirania magega gose gokei rigesa. Gacha buya ebinto biao biogokora oboremi buya na manyia abagambi igoro yoboibi biebinto biao bioboremi bwngo.

en: Lightning kills grazing animals. Install lightning rods and avoid tying animals to isolated trees.
guz: Enkoba nigo egoita etugo ere getii korisia. Beka ebinto biria bikobwata enkoba na tiga gosiba etugo ase omote ore oymo.

en: Misuse of antibiotics creates resistance. Follow prescriptions and dispose of drugs safely.
guz: Ekero amariogo aria agotanga ebinyinyi komenta omobere ime agotumeka bobe, nigo akoa ebinyinyi chinguru goika eriogo riasinywa gokora egasi yobobwenia buya. Bwatia amereso omonyagitari buya na tuguta amariogo ase enchera engiya buna eyokoyatindeka.

en: Large gatherings increase theft risks. Supervise herds and coordinate with security agencies.
guz: Omoganda omonenenbwabanto nigo okongusa abaibi. Renda etugo yao buya na bwaterana nabarendi boborendi.

en: Plan feed supplies to avoid shortages. Preserve fodder and use drought-resistant varieties.
guz: Rosia na kogacha endagera yetugo yao genkio gotanyorwa nobokongu abwo motwe. Gacha endagera yetugo yao buya na simeka endagera yetugo eria ekoremereria omogaso omonene.

en: Blue-green algae poison animals. Avoid contaminated water sources and report cases.
guz: Esosera ime yamache rooche nigo ere esumu ase etugo ekero yayenyure. Renda korora nga ebiberero biamache nebirabu. Renda nga etugo yao terikonywa amache korwa aase achafu na manyia abangagitari betugo ekero etugo yarwarire.

en: Multiple identification methods enhance security. Brands, tags, and microchips support recovery.
guz: Beka etugo yao ebimanyererio ao ao gokonya kobirenda korwa oboibi. Chisambererie ekemanyererio, beka chipachi amato, and Kobekera chiombe ekagento gete ime yerisankwa riabo nechera eyemo yogotanga oboibi bwetugo ekiagera ekero yaibirwe egento keria kebisire ime yerisankwa nabo gekoorokia goetera eintaneti ase etugo eyio ere nakoyebwatia bwango.

en: Poor handling causes stress and injury. Use non-slip floors and proper restraint equipment.
guz: Ekero etugo ekoirwa ase enchera etari engiya nigo ekoba nobwoba, ogochandeka ebirengererio an koumia. Beka etugo aase atari noboterere na yesibe buya.

en: Faulty electrical systems harm animals. Inspect wiring and test for stray voltage regularly.
guz: Esitima etbikirie buya nabo are hatari ase etugo. Rora gose chigwaya nchiererete inse na gopima gose nchire nomorero kera engaki erio korenda etugo teakwa nesisitima.

en: Steep water edges trap animals. Install gentle slopes and fence dangerous areas.
guz: Koira etugo rooche konya amache aase are egetionko nabo etugo aranyare gotereria na kogwa amache ime ekwe. Rosia buya aase etugo yao ekonywera amache na gita aase are atari ase etugo.

en: Research farms need strict security. Use CCTV, controlled access, and patrols.
guz: Aaria ase oboremi bogokorerwa amasomo ogotema ao ao naganetie oborendi obuya. Tumia ebimoreki biria biekamera bikobwata buna abanto bagosoa nagosoka, renda nga tari kera omonto ogosoa aroro, nobomongeri obuya.

en: High temperatures reduce productivity. Provide shade, ventilation, and constant water.
guz: Ekero riberera rire igoro mono nigo rigokei amabere ase etugo. Beka ekiriri, karwe ribaga ase embeo rgoetera, na beka amache okonya ase etugo chingaki chionsi.

en: Early warning prevents losses. Monitor conditions and share forecasts with herders.
guz: Komanya omochando bwango nigo kogotanga asara. Rigeria buya komanya rire buna rire na sanga nabatugi bamino.

en: Be cautious of investment apps advertised during football matches on illegal streams. Many are fronts for data theft or financial fraud
guz: Erende korwa omochieso ogotangaswa ase chisimi kobeka chibesa ase etimi gete ng'a nonyore chibesa goetra esimi chingaki chiegosri yomopira. Abange ba abwo bakorenta chigosori echi nigo barengete koiba amanga iigoro yao bakorere oboibi.

en: "DCI is investigating a fake 'youth startup grant' program circulating on TikTok and Instagram. There is no such initiative funded by the Government of Kenya."
guz: Abanyanyimbo mbagendererete gotuka igoro yogochaka ogokonywa ase abasae neserikari ya Kenya goetera TikTok na Instagram. Gento kenga buna ekio tikeiyo korende noborimo bwoka.

en: The Ministry of Public Service reminds job seekers that all internship postings are free to apply for. Avoid anyone asking for bribes or airtime in return
guz: Eminisitiri yobokoreri bwabanto nkoinyoria are abakorogia egasi nga baria bakorigia gosoa ase okwegera mono igoro yamosomo abo nigo agwancherwa na gosoa bosa. Kana monto onde bwensi oragosabe riaki.

en: Several Kenyans have reported scam calls claiming to be from international couriers requesting customs clearance payments. Confirm such calls with KRA or the courier directly
guz: Abakenya abange banyorire chisimi korwa ebobagp bikobasaba chibesa gose kobaa amanga igoro yabo korwa abakweroka buna baria bagokora emeremo yobobogoria emesigo korwa chinse chia isiko mbare nomosigo oo abae chibesa chiogoetia omoesigo iyio erio bagokonye. Koranyore esimi yengencho etye manyia office chia chiebango (KRA) gose ekambani eyio bakogotebi.

en: "Be cautious of business mentorship programs advertised by influencers that ask for hefty registration fees. Many lack legal registration."
guz: Renda kegima tosoa ase emeroberio yogosomia igoro goetera chisimi nabanto bare nokobua gokong'ina nakobebegena bagosaba chibesa chinyinge gosoera Abange babanto aba tiberigeti neserikari.

en: "We urge wananchi to report any person asking for 'expedited NHIF services' in exchange for cash. NHIF does not charge for processing."
guz: Nigo togosaba abanto komanyia abagambi gose abasikari igoro yabanto bagosaba chibesa basuguikie akadi yao ya NHIF ekore egasi. NHIF teri gosaba besa goetia emesigo.

en: The Judiciary warns of false bail refund letters sent to unsuspecting litigants. Refunds are processed only through court registries
guz: Ekoti yaonyire abanto igoro yamarube oborimo ogotomwa gochia ekoti korigia koiranerigwa chibesa babegete ebondi false bail refund letters sent to unsuspecting litigants. Okoiranerigwa chibesa chiepondi nkotini kogokorerwa na tari ande onsi.

en: "Ministry of Housing has not contracted any agents to collect payments for affordable housing units. Application is done through Boma Yangu portal only."
guz: Eminisitiri yobokoreri bwabanto nkoinyoria ere abakorogia egasi nga baria bakorigia gosoa ase okwegera mono igoro yamosomo abo nigo agwancherwa na gosoa bosa. Kana monto onde bwensi oragosabe riaki.

en: Red Cross Kenya cautions citizens against donation drives using MPESA till numbers not registered to the organization. Always crosscheck before sending money.
guz: Ekeombe Ekebaririri gia Kenya kiarure ogokurerwa ase abanainchi igoro yemechango goetera MPESA chinamba chia till chitarikiri rasimi na Safaricom ase abwo bagosaba omochango . Tema komanya buya nyuma otatatoma chibesa chiao.

en: Public warning: PSC does not conduct interviews on WhatsApp. Any job ad asking for 'application fees' is fake and should be reported
guz: Ogokurera ase bonsi: Enseo yesrikari eria etenenerete emeremo yeserikari (PSC) teri gokria abanto ogotema gwokorigia emeremo goetra Whatsapp. Any job ad asking for 'application fees' is fake and should be reported

en: "CBK is aware of mobile apps charging 'CRB clearance' fees upfront. CRB requests are processed through licensed bureaus only."
guz: "Ebengi enene ya Kenya (CBK ) nemanyete ebikoreri biechisimi apps charging 'CRB clearance' fees upfront. Ogosaba gochia baria batenenerete ogosaria kwobogoko (CRB) nigo kogokorwa nabanto bancheire gokora egasi eyio boka"

en: EACC has flagged a syndicate offering forged title searches and valuations in Kisumu. Use verified government channels only
guz: Ekeombe keria gekorwania obokengeka (EACC) yarure ogokurerwa igoro yamarube oborimo koa abanto emeremo, gose chinamba chiamaremo chioborimo, na korenga oboremo obwo nga nirenga boisaine aaria Kisumu. Tumia chiofisi chieserikari ekero otagete komanya ayio boronge.

en: "DCI confirms arrests of fake NGO representatives claiming to partner with World Food Programme in Northern Kenya. Always verify through official NGO registry."
guz: "Omotuki omonene enekirie okobwatwa kwa abatenereri be'NGO boborimo bakweroka abakobwaterana nekeombe kia Omoroberio Bwendagera Bwense (World Food Programme) aaria Kenya ya Irianyi. Botambe manya boronge korwa egetabu gia NGO."

en: "Wanafunzi wanaombwa wasitumie wasimamizi wasiojulikana kusajili HELB. Maafisa bandia wamekuwa wakichukua pesa wakiahidi kufanikisha mkopo."
guz: "Abana babioriigwe tibatumia abatenereri batamanyekaneti ekero bakwerika konyora ogokonya gwechibesa korwa HELB. Abanene ba pandia babeire bagosaba chibesa ase okobatebia ng'a mbabae chibesa chieroni ya HELB."

en: Communications Authority warns of cloned betting apps circulating on Telegram. Many steal your phone data and banking information
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene getenerete okoererania amangana ase embeo kiarure ogokurera igoro yegokoreri gia bahati na sibu kioborimo kerandete ase Telegram. Abange nigo bakoiba amanga ao are ase esimi amo nayenamba yebengi yao.

en: KRA reminds taxpayers that agents are not allowed to collect cash payments in person. Use official PayBill numbers and receipts
