guz: Ekeombe ekenene giokorusia ebango gia Kenya (KRA) nkoinyoria kere baakani abango nga abaachenti babo tibaganeirie korusia ebango gose koegwa chibesa tbarabwo abanyene. Tumia enamba yabeene ya PayBill na nyora risiti riogoakana.

en: "We urge Kenyans to confirm job offers from airlines, especially Emirates and Qatar Airways. Multiple scams promising airport jobs have been flagged.
guz: "Nigo togosaba abakenya komanya buya amatangaso yechigasi korwa ase ebitii bienchindege, mono kobua buna keria Emirates na Qatar. Amatangaso amange yoborimo igoro yemeremo ase ebitii biechindege bwaansire.

en: EACC is investigating individuals posing as ministry auditors soliciting bribes from small schools. All inspections are officially scheduled and documented
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene gekorwani obopkorekanu (EACC) ngotuka kere abanto gete bagwekora baria bakorigereria amatumisi yechibesa chieserikari na igo gosaba amaaki korwa ase chisukuru chinke. Okorigererigwa bwebitabu nigo gokoba ekero gwatangasirwe.

en: "CBK reminds Kenyans that legitimate banks do not conduct promotions via Facebook inboxes. Ignore messages asking for account details to 'activate rewards'."
guz: "Ebengi enene ya Kenya (CBK) nkoinyoria ere abanto ba Kenyan ng'a chibengi boronge tichiri gokinia abakori emeremo babo goetera Facebook. Ombia mang'ana ande onsi akogosaba obae ennamba yao yebengi erio bakobekere ekeegwa gie chibesa."

en: "DCI warns against conmen selling fake 'church land' in Kayole and Ruai. Verify ownership documents at the Ministry of Lands before making any payment."
guz: "Omotuki omonene orure ogokurera gochia abangainereria baria bakkonia amaremo echikanisa ataiyo aari kayole na Ruai. Manya buya abanyene oboremo ase ofisi chia amaremo otaraakana besa chinde chionsi."

en: NSSF alerts contributors to disregard WhatsApp messages claiming there is a special withdrawal window for those over 40. No such provision exists.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene kiabagotu (NSSF) giakureire abanto baye bonsi baombie amanga ande onsi korwa WhatsApp agotebia abanto ng'a baria bonsi baikire emiaka 40 nkonyarekana ere korusia chibesa chiabo. Mang'ana anga buna ayio taiyo.

en: Be cautious of investment apps advertised during football matches on illegal streams. Many are fronts for data theft or financial fraud.
guz: Erende korwa amatangaso yokonyora chibesa goetera chitimu chiomopira chikobua chigotangaswa ekero kiemepira egoakwa ase abarimo gagwesoi ime. Abange babwo nigo barengete komanya na koiba amangana yebinto biao bakoibere nonya nechibesa.

en: "The Judiciary has received complaints about fake court summons sent via email. Summons are never delivered electronically or through WhatsApp
guz: "EkKoti yanyorire okwemurunganania okonge igoro yokorangerigwa kwa abanto baike kotini ase enchera yoborimo goetera eintaneti. Amangana yokorangerigwa goika kotini tari gotomwa goetera eintaneti gose goetera Whatsapp.

en: EACC warns of imposters offering job placements at parastatals for upfront cash. All official job listings are published on PSC and organization websites.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene gekorwania obokengeka (EACC) giakureire abakwebeka buna mbare namabaga ase yemeremo ase chikambani chiserikari ase okobaakana besa inke. Emeremo yonsi yeserikari nigo egotangaswa ase ensemo yeserikari tenerete emeremo yeserikari (PSC) na ase eintaneti yechikambani echio.

en: "People have been sent 'Safaricom refund claim' links that look like the real site. Safaricom does not issue refunds without an official claim form."
guz: "Abanto batomeirwe amang'ana koiranigwa chibesa ase bare ase egsio ekebe korwa safaricom. 'Ogosabwa oko koirania chibesa nigo kogokorwa ase enchera omonto okonayra kwegena. Safaricom teri gosaba koiranigwa gwechibesa otaichoretie efomu yabeene."

en: The Ministry of Transport has received reports of fake NTSA agents collecting bribes along major highways. Report any suspicious activity via 999 or NTSA portal
guz: Emonistiri yobobogoria yanyorire amang'ana igoro yabateneneri boborimo ba (NTSA) bagosaba amaaki ase chinhera chinene. Karwe amangana igoro yamang'ana anga buna ayio are nechitang'utang'u naro goetera enamba yesimi yamorero 999 gose eintaneti ya (NTSA)

en: "CBK reminds Kenyans that any investment requiring you to recruit others to earn returns is likely a pyramid scheme. Report such activities immediately."
guz: "Ebengi enene ya Kenya (CBK) nkoinyoria ere aba'Kenyan ng'a moroberio bwokobeka chibesa ande yonsi eganetie orike abanto gosoa aroro erio konyora eng'eria rnigo enga buna emeroberio yoboibi buna eria ya pyramid scheme. Karwe eripoti ya yobokenga ebwo kegima kwayarora."

en: "Fraudsters posing as election observers have been soliciting money from aspirants for fake clearance. IEBC does not charge for clearance forms."
guz: "Abangainereria bagwekora buna abarigereria buna chikura chigoakwa babeire bagosangereria chibesa korwa ase baria bakorigia chikura kobarusia korwa erkodi yogokora bobe. Ekeombe keria gietenenerete buna chikura chiogoakwa (IEBC) nkeri gosaba chibesa erio korigereria gose nore namamocho aragotange toboria goakerwa chikura."

en: We advise Kenyans not to share photos of their ID, NHIF or voters card on Facebook job groups. These details are being harvested for fraud
guz: Nigo togosemia abanto ba Kenya tibasanga chipicha chibibande chiabana babo, chiria chia nyagitari (NHIF ) gose chikadi chiogoaka chikura ase okorigia emeremo goetera Facebook. Amangana aya yabana bao nigo agotumika gokora obosaria.

en: NSSF has suspended several field agents found collecting cash for 'special processing. NSSF does not charge for fast-tracking services
guz: Ekeoombe keria ekenene kiabagotu (NSSF) kiabutire abakori emeremo abange banyoretwe bagosangereria chibesa korwa abagotu erio kobakonya korosia chibesa chiobogotu bwabo. NSSF teri gosaba besa chinde chionsi ekero ekobwatia komanya ayakorengete.

en: Several students have lost fees to fake school accounts shared on WhatsApp. Always pay school fees through officially designated bank accounts.
guz: Abana abange basisiririe chibesa chiesukuru fisi goetera chiakaonti chioborimo chibekire WhatsApp. Chingaki chionsi akana chibesa chiesukuru goetera ebengi yesukuru yekeene.

en: KRA warns taxpayers not to use agents who claim they can erase penalties for a fee. All tax waivers are issued through formal channels.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene getenenerete korusia ebango (KRA) kiarure ogokurera ase baria bagoakana chikodi chiabo tibatumia abaachenti abwo bakobang'aina nga nabo baranyare gotinyia chifaini chiabo ase okorwa gento geke. Okonacherwa gose kogokeaneri abango nigo kogokorwa goetera enchera ya ofisi yoka.

en: Those job ads for 'NGO agents hiring enumerators' without an interview are a scam. Verify with the actual NGO before sending money."
guz: Amangana ogosegeta korwa abaagenti ba'NGO ng'a nkorika bare abanto bakorika amang'ana gotakorigwa ogotemwa kwemeremo namangana oborimo. Manya boronge ng'a NGO ki yatomete amang'ana ayio."

en: EACC notes rising cases of impersonation in procurement offices. Report anyone claiming to 'influence' tender outcomes
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene gekorwania obokorekanu (EACC) kiarorire ng'a ekogeseka kwobosaria bwogwekora abakori emeremo ba eofisi yobogori bweserikari. Karwe eripoti igoro ya monto onde oresio kobukania obogori bwechitenda chuieserikari

en: "The Ministry of Agriculture has disowned individuals collecting registration fees for 'subsidized fertilisers. All legitimate lists are displayed at ward offices."
guz: "Eminisitiri yoboremi yangire abanto abanto bagosangereria chibesa chiokwerika ase okonyora obwoyo bweserikari. Amariko akworokia emeroberio eyio nkonantigwa are ase kera Ewodi Yomokansera oino."

en: CBK warns Kenyans against sending money to social media groups promising weekly payouts from investment plans. These are unregulated and illegal.
guz: Ebengi enene ya Kenya (CBK) yakureire abaKenya igoro yogotoma chibesa gochia chigurupu chiembeo bakobangaina konyora obwaita kera ewiki. Ebinto binga buna ebio tibiri bia amachiko igo nebiobong'ainereria.

en: "Public notice: DCI has shut down a fraudulent real estate company operating under multiple names in Kiambu. Always perform a search at the Lands Ministry."
guz: "Ogokurera ase bonsi": Omotuki omonene osiekire ekampani yobokengeka ogokora obokengeka bwaye goetera amarieta ao ao aaria Kiambu ekongaina abanto kobaoneria emechi yokomenya operating. Kera engaki rigia komanya obomaene bwebinto binga buna ebio korwa ofosi yamaremo."

en: Fake insurance brokers have been selling invalid motor covers in bus stations. Confirm your insurer through IRA  public registry.
guz: Abaonia bechinsuarensi boborimo babeire bakoonia ebinto bioborimo nonya nime yechirori chibasi. Manya buya ng'a einsuarensi yao nerikire gose neitabire neserikari goetera Insuaren Regulatory Authority (IRA).

en: Communications Authority has warned of fake WiFi installers operating in residential estates. Confirm service providers through the CA licensed list
guz: Communications Authority has warned of fake WiFi installers operating in residential estates. Confirm service providers through the CA licensed list

en: "We have received multiple reports of individuals faking job placement letters for Qatar and UAE. All foreign employment must go through accredited agencies."
guz: "Twanyorire chiripoti chinyinge chiabanto bagwegokora ng'a mbare namarube yemeremo gochia Qatar na UAE. Emeremo yonsi gochia chinse chia isiko goika aetere ebiombe bimanyekanete buya nabwo bagotebwa nga mbare nemeremo neserikari ya Kenya"

en: "The Ministry of ICT reminds citizens that all eCitizen payments are automated. Do not send money to personal numbers for services."
guz: "Eminisitiri yamang'ana netekinorochi yokoererania amang'ana (ICT)nkoinyoria ere abanainchi chibesa chionsi chia eCitizen nigo chigoakanwa goetera ebengi na Mpesa chimanyekanete neserikari . Tiga gotoma chibesa gochia chinamba chabanto nonya ngake."

en: "Fake humanitarian campaigns using stolen photos have been flagged on Twitter. Always verify fundraisers through trusted platforms like M-Changa or Red Cross Kenya."
guz: "Chibicha chioborimo gotumia chibicha chiabanto bande baibete korigeria chibesa chiangirwe buna okogenda mamincha yerichiko ria twiter. Kera engaki chungusa abakorigia chibesa goetra chinchera chiegenire buna M-Changa gose Omosaraba Omobaririri) Red Cross Kenya."

en: Nairobi residents, beware of people who claim to provide business loans within an hour. The government does not have such a cash-in-hand program.
guz: Abamenyi ba Nairobi, kab maiso nabanto bagwekora ng'a nkorwa bare chironi chiebiasara ase engaki yensa eyemo yoka. Eserikari tebwati moroberio onga buna eyio bwechibesa koboko chiokorwa.

en: Kenyans are warned to avoid online forex traders promising guaranteed profits. CBK does not license individuals to offer such services.
guz: Abakenya bakureirwe gwetanga koonia chibesa chiechinse ao ao goetera eintaneti abanyabiasara bakongaina abanto nga abaita obonene mboreo. Ebengi enene ya Kenya (CBK) teri korwa erensesi as omonto oyomo gkora agasi eyio.

en: DCI cautions the public against forged university admission letters being used to defraud parents. Always verify admission directly with the institution.
guz: Omotuki omonene okureire aanainchi igoro yamarube yogosa eyunifasiti yoborimo agendererete gotimeka kongaina na koibera abaibori. Kera engaki chungusa rirube riogosoa eyunifasiti goetra uyunifasiti enyene.

en: Public warning: There are no County Government jobs offered via agents in town. Anyone asking for a facilitation fee is running a scam.
guz: Ogokurerwa kwa bonsi: Meremo teiyo yechikaonti okorugwa goetera abaachenti abwo emechie gose chitaoni. Onde bwensi ogosaba chibesa chiokomokonya agokorere ayio noboibi maiso marore.

en: "Communications Authority has launched a hotline for reporting impersonation scams involving fake mobile providers. Dial 0800 222 777 to report."
guz: "Ekeombe getenenerete oboererania bwamang'ana giaansire enamba ya morero gokonya koyemanyia gose abasikari igoro yabanto bagwekona nga nkorwa bare obokoreri beintaneti. Aka esimi 0800 222 777 koyemanyia amang'ana ayio."

en: "Be cautious of agents offering NHIF registration at matatu stages. Report such individuals to the nearest police post. NHIF registration is free."
guz: "Kabe maiso korwa abanto bagwekora ng'a nkorika bare ase omoroberio bweinsuarensi ya nyagitari (NHIF) abwo ase chirori chikorinerwa. Ripoti abanto abwo ase eporisi ere ange naye. Kwerika koba oyomo ase Einsuarensi ya Nyagitari (NHIF) mbosa egokorwa."

en: "The Ministry of Education reiterates that bursary forms are distributed freely and do not require payment. Any demand for money should be reported."
guz: "Eminisitiri yechisemi yabekire chinguru nga chibasari chiesukuru nigo chikorugwa bosa fnaigo tegaineirie nga oakane. Gosabwa besa chinde chionsi nere buya korwaipoti."

en: "We urge Kenyans to double-check the legitimacy of any NGO requesting donations via mobile payment. Many have been flagged for fraud."
guz: "Nigo togosaba abakenya koirorera gocheki oboamaene bwebiombe bia NGO dchigosaba ogokonya goetera entaneti. Chinyinge chiechio chianyorirwe koba echioboibi"

en: Do not give your M-PESA PIN to anyone! This is a very common scam.
guz: Tobaisa korwa epini ya M-PESA yaogochia ase onde bwensi! Eye nero enchera abange baibeirwe.

en: Enable two-factor authentication (2FA) for all bank and social media accounts.
guz: Enable two-factor authentication (2FA) for all bank and social media accounts.

en: Beware of emails pretending to be from banks asking for account verification.
guz: Beware of emails pretending to be from banks asking for account verification.

en: Use a strong password like 'Nairobi2023!/' that is not easy to crack.
guz: Tumia enomba yesiri enkongu okoigorera esimi yao buna Gusii2025! Eyio etari raisi ase monto onde koigora.

en: Never click on suspicious links like 'Youve won KSh 100,000!' in SMS.
guz: Tobaisa kobata eraini yeintaneti orechitangutangu nero buna eria ekogotebi ng'a kwanyorire chibesa 100,000!' goetera amangana ameng'e eyesimi.

en: Update your phones software monthly to fix security vulnerabilities.
guz: Kera engaki tema gokora keboyia einchini yesimi yao kera omotienyi erio koyerenda korwa okoriegwa nebinyinyi.

en: If your child is being bullied online, report it to the DCI Cyber ​​Unit immediately!
guz: Onye omwana oo ogochandwa, kogoswa gose koramwa goetera eintaneti, manyia omonene bwobotuki otari konyorwa!

en: Avoid using public Wi-Fi for banking. Hackers can steal your data.
guz: Tiga gotumia chisimi gose eintaneti kobeka gose gotoma chibesa gochia akaonti yao yebengi. Gokora igo nigo okorwa ribaga abaibi bare nobang'aini bwogosoa eintaneti yao na gokoibera ase obowororo.

en: Teach children to avoid sharing personal details with 'online friends'.
guz: Abana batige gosanga amangana abao nabasani babo bembeo goeera eintaneti.

en: Check 'Serena_254's' profile to see if it's legit before accepting the friend request.
guz: Risegereria komanya inki 'Serena_254's' erengete nyuma otarakora kende nabarabwo.

en: Use a VPN on public networks to encrypt your internet traffic.
guz: Tumia chinamba chiesiri ekero ogosoa ase Wi-Fi yabanto bonsi erio bwerende korwa abant barengete koyetuka komanya ninki kere ime.

en: Lock SIM yako kwa *something#! Usiache mtu atumie line yako kufanya maovu.
guz: Sieka ESIM kadi yesimi yao buna *gentogete#! Totigera omonto atumie eraini yesimi yao gokora obobe

en: Fake job offers like 'Earn KSh 50k daily from home' are scams.Avoid upfront payments.
guz: Emeremo yoborimo buna Nyora chinusi chilifu 50 kera rituko korwa nka' namangana oborimo agotumeka gokora oboibi. Tiga korwa chibesa omanye konyora chibesa.

en: Monitor bank statements for unauthorized transactions weekly.
guz: Mongera buna chibesa chia chigosoa na gosoka kera ewiki ase akaonti yebengi yao erio onyare komanya bwango boibi bonde bwonsi bobaise kobao.

en: Don't write your passwords down in a book! Use an app like 'SafePass' to save them.
guz: Tiga korika ringana riao riesiri riesimi goge ebengi ase egetabu! Tumia omoroberio beintanati yao ekero okoyeigora 'SafePass' rio korenda ringana erio ria riabobisi.

en: Use biometrics (fingerprint/face ID) instead of PINs where possible.
guz: Tumia egento buna ekiara kiao gose epicha yobosio bwao rika ria enamba yesiri ase ekonyarekana.

en: Download apps only from Google Play Store or Apple App Store.
guz: Nyora ebinto biria gigokonya esimi gokora emeremo yaye goetera Google Play Store gose Apple App Store.

en: If you are using a cyber computer, log out after using your Gmail!
guz: Onye kogotumia ekombiuta yesaiba, rimia Gmail akaonti yao ekero gwakorire korora ebinto gwatagete!

en: Ignore messages like 'Youve won Safaricom Jackpot!'Theyre scams.
guz: Ombia amang'ana ameng'e esimi buna 'Kwabuire ejakipoti ya Safaricom' Aya namangana arengete gokoibera.

en: Encrypt sensitive files before sharing them online.
guz: Amanagana ao obobisi yakeborane gochia enkwana yobobisi otayarasanga ase eintaneti.

en: Don't use the same password for Gmail, Facebook, and bank! If hacked, they'll all be gone.
guz: Totumia enamba yesiri eyemo ase esimi, ebengi, akaonti ya Gmail, sose Facebook! Omonto aise gwesoi ase akaonti yao, onso aria kwabwate aroro nigo agosira pi na tokoyanyora rinde.

en: Verify charities before donating online.Fake fundraisers are common.
guz: Kongoria buya ebiombe biria bigosaba ogokonywa goetera eintaneti otararwa besa ende yonsi. Abarigia chibesa boborimo nao bare.

en: Install antivirus software to protect against malware and spyware.
guz: Beka egento keria kegotanga ebinyinyi ase esimi nekombiuta yao koyerenda korwa ebinyinyi bia malware na spyware.

en: Avoid 'get rich quick' schemes promising high returns.Theyre Ponzi scams.
guz: Tiga kongaineka ng'a notenke bwango' emeroberio amangana akogotebia obwaita bwa bwango. Obo noborimo.

en: Secure home Wi-Fi with a strong password like 'Jamhuri@1963'.
guz: tanga abanto korwa eWi-Fi yao ya nka goetera ringana rikingu kwegia buna'Jamhuri@1963'.

en: Turn off your Bluetooth when you're not using it! Others can access your phone.
guz: Rimia eBluetooth yao ekero otari koyetumia. Abanto bande bensemo nabo barosoe ase esimi yao otamanyanyeti.

en: Check for 'https://' and a padlock icon before entering payment details online.
guz: Rigereria 'https://' amo nekeogorero kiaye nyuma otarabeka gose goskana chisebesa goetera eintaneti.

en: If someone says 'I'm with DCI, help me fix your computer', hang up! It's a scam.
guz: Omonto aise kogotebi 'nao inde nomotuku omonene, nkonye nkoroserie enkombiuta yao, rimia omonto oyio korwa enkwara nere! Oyo nkogokona are akoibere anamangana ao korwa ekombiuta.

en: Back up important data to an external drive to avoid ransomware attacks.
guz: Rosia ekopi yamangana ao yengencho ase esimi goe ekombiuta gochia ekegachi kende terio gwekonya korwa ogosarigwa nebinyinyi

en: Use privacy screens on laptops in public to prevent shoulder surfing.
guz: Tumia ekerore ase ekombiuta yao yakoboko ekerore monto onde ore ange naye atanyarekorora eki okorikagose gwancha monto abekerere gento igoro ase ekombiuta yao. Eyio nabe arabe enchera eyemo yomoiba amangana ao gose kokoibera chibesa.

en: Don't use 'Mothers maiden name' for security questions! Use a fictional answer.
guz: Tobaisa gotumia erieta riorera ria mama omino buna ring'ana ria riobobisi bwesimi gose ekombiuta. Tumia erieta riokwebaka orayare koinyora.

en: Fake DHL parcel alerts are common scams.Verify via official customer service.
guz: Amanagana agokomanyia igoro yemesigo yoborimo goetera DHL nenchera eyemo abanto bakongainwa. Rigia komanya buya emeremo ekambani eyio egokora.

en: Do not open the 'Free Movies' USB on your computer! It may contain a virus.
guz: Tobaise koigora gose kobeka chisiinema chia bosa ase ekombiuta yao goetera egento keria gekogacha chisinema gekorokwa eflash! Nabo keeranyare gosaria ekombiuta yao goetera ebinyinyi eflash ebogoretie.

en: Use incognito mode on shared devices to avoid saving browsing history.
guz: Ekero ogotumia ekombiuta yeintaneti, yebeke tabaisa kogacha eki kware korora gose gosoma ekero gwasiekire eki kware gokora. Renda gotagacha eki ogokora ase ase ekombiuta.

en: If you are looking for customer support, use the numbers on the company's website.
guz: Onye gokorigia ogokonywa korwa ekambani, tumia chinamba chiesimi gose eintaneti yekambani.

en: Disable browser password-saving features to protect accounts if your device is stolen.
guz: Tobaise gwanchera ekombiuta okogachere ringangana riao riobobisi koyeigora erio korenda amagnana ase ekonbiuta eise koibwa gose gosira.

en: Visit rental properties in person. Online listings can be fake.
guz: Tarera chinyomba chigokomboa aye omonyene. Amangana goetera eintaneti nabo arabe oborimo.

en: Download apps only from official stores like Google Play or Apple App Store.
guz: Nyora ebinto biria bigokonya esimi gose ekombiuta gokora emeremo korwa aase egenire buna Google Play gose Apple App Store.

en: Enable 'Find My Device' on phones to track them if lost or stolen.
guz: Ase chisimi bata Enable' Rigia Esimi Yane' ase chisimi erio koyebwatia ekero yasirire gose koibwa.

en: Never share OTPs.Even with 'bank staff'. Legit banks wont ask for them.
guz: Tobaise gosanga OTPs. Nonya nase okori emeremo bwebengi'. Chibengi chiekeene tichiri koyesaba.

en: Use ad blockers to stop malicious pop-ups like 'Youve won an iPhone!'.
guz: Tumia egento kegotanga amangana ogotangasa ebiasara buan kwanyorire esimi iPhone eye nencher eyemo yogotanga ebinyibigosaria esimi giose ekombiuta yao.

en: Check email sender addresses for typos like 'support@paypa1.com' (scam!).
guz: Rora buya ng'a ningo otomete eimeil komanya eyebingainereria buna 'support@paypa1.com' (Oboibi!).

en: Avoid public USB charging stations They can steal your data.
guz: Erende korwa nogochacherigwa esimi yao nomorande o USB. Ebi nabo biraibe amang'ana ao.

en: "Do not download apps from random websites. Always use Google Play Store or Apple App Store. Unverified apps may contain malware."
guz: "Tiga korusia ebikoreri biria bigonya esimi gokora egasi korwa eintaneti aende yonsi. Kera engaki binyore korwa Google Play Store gose Apple App Store".

en: Avoid using public Wi-Fi for banking. Use a VPN if you must connect. Most free networks are not secure."
guz: "Erende korwa eWi-Fi yabanto bonsi kobeka chibesa ebengi. Tumia a VPN onye gokonyara gosoa ime. Chinetewaki chinyinge chia bosaare nchibwati borendi buya."

en: "If you receive an email asking you to verify your bank account, dont click  it's phishing. Report to the DCI Cybercrime Unit."
guz: "If you receive an email asking you to verify your bank account, dont click it's phishing. Report to the DCI Cybercrime Unit."

en: Do not share your MPESA PIN with anyone. Safaricom and banks will never ask for it. If in doubt, call official support.
guz: Tobaisa gosanga enemba yao yobobisi ya MPESA nonde bwensi. Safaricom gose ebengi mbarikobori koboria nga obayetebie. Ekero ore nechitangutangu yeringana erio, rangeria ebengi yao koboria buya okonywe.

en: "Set up 2FA (Two-Factor Authentication) for all your accounts. If your password is stolen, you will still be protected."
guz: "Eroserie 2FA (Chinchera ibera komnya buya) buna chiakaonti chiao ebengi chigendererete. Onye ringana riao riobobisi riaibirwe, nobe kwerendete ekiagera orosetie 2FA."

en: Always wear a helmet when riding a bodaboda - it saves lives!
guz: Kera engaki beka ehofia eri egokorende ekero kiomobasekano korinete epigipigi - ngokonya ere obogima!

en: Don't use your phone while walking on the road! Look both ways before crossing the road.
guz: Tiga gotara kogotumia esimi ekero ore epara! Rigereria rigoro na maata otarantamboka.

en: Keep children away from open flames and hot surfaces in the kitchen.
guz: Beka abana are korwa ase omorero ore gose ebinto bigosamba aaria echikoni.

en: Install barriers on windows and doors on upper floors to prevent children from falling.
guz: Sambereria gose beka ase emerangwa nechitirisa ase enyoba yeekorofa ebinto bigokonya gotanga abana tibagwa inse.

en: Never leave children unattended near water bodies - drowning happens silently.
guz: Tobaisa gotiga abana boka aase amache amange are - okonywa chintobe nigo ekoba raisi otamanyeti.

en: Use crossing points and traffic lights where available.
guz: Tumia gotamboka epara aase ebimanyererio bibekire gose chitochi chikogotebia ekero obwenerete gotamboka epara.

en: Install smoke detectors in your home for early fire warnings.
guz: Beka ebinto biria bikonyonka erioki ase enyomba yao gokomanyia bwango elero enyomba yabwatire omorero oyorimie bwango.

en: Keep a first aid kit at home and learn basic first aid procedures.
guz: Kabe namariogo nyomba aria aragokonye gokonyera oborwaire bwa mobasekano gose omonto oumiire otaramoikia nyagitari.

en: Always check expiry dates on food products to avoid food poisoning.
guz: Kera engaki mongera chitariki chiendagera kogunda otaragora erio bwerende gotara na koria endagera eng'undo ekoretere obokong'u.

en: If you see a power cable fallen, stay away and call 999 immediately.
guz: Korarore omorande bwesitima ogwete inse, toika ang,e rangeria enamba ya morero ya porisi 999 otari konyorwa.

en: Secure heavy furniture to walls to prevent tip-over accidents with children.
guz: Torerania ebinto buna eborogo gose chimesa chidito nyomba ase chinyasi gokonya hitichigwera abana ekero bagotema korina igoro.

en: Do not use gas stoves indoors - keep them in a well-ventilated area.
guz: Tiga gotumia eagsi gotugera nyombe ase etirisa gose morangwa otari koreta embeo nyomba - yetumie ase aigogete embeo egosoa buya.

en: Learn basic swimming skills - it could save your life or someone else's.
guz: Egegera buna oranyare goaka ontimbu -nabo eragokonye gose gokonya omonto onde.

en: Put emergency contacts in your phone: Police (999), Ambulance (911), Fire (990).
guz: Bechaka chinamba chiemebasekano ime ase esimi yao: Porisi (999), Egari yemebasekano (911), Omorero bwatekire (990).

en: Always have a fire extinguisher in your kitchen and know how to use it.
guz: Kera engaki kabe negento keria gekorimia omorero ase echikoni yenyomba yao na manya buna okogetumia.

en: If you see water on the road, do not try to cross it - It may be deep.
guz: Korarore amache ase epara, tobaisa gotamboka- nabo oranyore amache ayio namange orimere.

en: Teach children their full names, parents' contacts, and home address.
guz: Egeria abana komanya amarieta abo onsi, enamba yesimi, inka sobo buna ekorokwa, agose enamba yeposita yerirube.

en: Keep emergency exits open and unblocked in shops and offices.
guz: Manyia gose orokereria buya aase abanto bakominchoreria gochia ekero kiobokongu na koyatiga aigoire chingaki chionsi egasi egenderete.

en: Never overload electrical sockets - it can cause fires.
guz: Tiga gotumba ebinto ebinge ase esoketi eyemo yesitima -eye nabo erabe enchera eyemo yomorero gwateka nyomba.

en: If you notice a foul smell from the gas, leave the house immediately and call the gas company.
guz: Ekero oranyoke rimisu riegasi, tama korwa enyomba eyio kegima na rangeria abanto bekambani yegasi eyio gose porisi.

en: Always wear seatbelts - front and back seats - on every trip.
guz: Siba omchibi kore erori ime chingaki chionsi - nyuma na magega kera engaki egari ekogenda.

en: Do not allow children to play near stones during construction.
guz: Totiga abana gotienera ase amagena are ekero amaagacho agendererete.

en: Keep emergency numbers visible in your home and workplace.
guz: Beka chinamba chiria chiemebasekano ase chikororekana buya chinka chiaino na ase emeremo.

en: Create a family emergency plan and meeting point for disasters.
guz: Manyererania genkio nabanto benyoma yao aase ogotamera chingaki chiomobasekano.

en: Always supervise children when they're using playground equipment.
guz: Kabe ange nabana bao ekero bakogosori nebinto biria biogokorerwa chigosori.

en: Do not use damaged or burning electrical appliances.
guz: Tobaisa gotumia ebinto biesitima bisaregete gose bigisamba.

en: Learn the Heimlich maneuver to help someone who's choking.
guz: Soma na komanya igoro ya Heimlich maneuver erio omanye buna orkonye omonto ongentirwe nandagera gose amache.

en: Put covers on unused electrical outlets, especially in homes with children.
guz: Tibua ande onsi aase esitima egosokera buna chisoketi, mono kegima ase chinka chire nabana.

en: Never leave candles burning unattended - use hurricane lamps instead.
guz: Totiga omosuma ogwoka bwoka monto taiyo korora buna ogwoka - tumia etaya nyakio rika riomosuma.

en: If you are riding a bodaboda, make sure the driver has a helmet and a reflective jacket.
guz: If you are riding a bodaboda, make sure the driver has a helmet and a reflective jacket.

en: Keep walkways clear of obstacles to prevent trips and falls.
guz: Rusia kegocha kende giosni ase abanto baogoetera gokonya abanto mbagochwa na kogwa.

en: Keep  mosquito repellent at home, especially during the rainy season.
guz: Kabe naguta aria agoseria chiimbu korwa nyomba, na mono kegima chingaki chiembura.

en: Always check weather forecasts before planning outdoor activities.
guz: Rigereria buya rire buna rire otarasoka kogenda gose gosoka gochia esafari.

en: Do not leave your vehicles open or valuables visible.
guz: Tomocha gotasieka erori yao gose gotiga ebinto biengencho kororekana ime.

en: Install carbon monoxide detectors if you use gas or kerosene heaters.
guz: Beka egento keria gekonyonka embeo embe onye kogotumia amaguta etaya gose egasi.

en: Make an emergency kit with a flashlight, batteries, first aid, and drinking water.
guz: Kabe nebinto bia ntenera biranyare kogokonya ekero kiobokongu buna ekero esitima etaiyo obe etochi koreta oborabu ase eyomba, amo namasasi, na amariogo, namache okonywa.

en: Never drink and drive - even small amounts of alcohol impair judgment.
guz: Tonywa amarwa naende ogendie erori - nanya namarwa amake igo nigo agosaria ebirengererio nachisemi eki obwenerete gokora.

en: Keep your doctor's and hospital's numbers nearby in case of emergencies.
guz: Gacha enmba yanyagitari nomonyagitari oo ange nase ebogete omobuko oo bwemebasekano buna amarigo.

en: Teach children how to call for help in emergencies (999 or 112).
guz: Somia abana bamanye buna baranyare krigia ogokonya ekero kiemebasekano goetera (999 gose 112).

en: Do not leave dangerous items within the reach of young children.
guz: Tiga kobeka ebinto bire atari ase abana ase baranyare kobikera.

en: Always have an emergency evacuation plan for your workplace.
guz: Kera chingaki kabe na ase oranyanyare kominchoreria ekero kiomobasekano ase egasi.

en: If you have farms, clearly label fertilizers and pesticides.
guz: Onye kobwate omogondo bwoboremi, orokereria buya obwoyo mborobi, n amariogo boigo.

en: Never use generators indoors - they produce deadly carbon monoxide.
guz: Tobaisa kobeka echenereta nyomba na koyiokia - erioki riaye nesumu ase omobere.

en: Install waterproof devices on all electrical sockets in the home.
guz: Beka egento kegotuba aase esitima egosokera korwa buna esoketi nnka bwoo.

en: Keep emergency exits clearly marked and unobstructed in public buildings.
guz: Erokeria buya aase okominchoreria elekero kiemebasekano ere na etbwati binto biranyare kogocha abanto kabagotama.

en: Use sunscreen and avoid the sun between 10 am and 4 pm.
guz: Use sunscreen and avoid the sun between 10 am and 4 pm.

en: Always check depth before diving into water - neck injuries can be fatal.
guz: Kera engaki pima komanya obotambe bwamache otarasoa goaka ontimbu. - nabo oraumie bobe ebigoti.

en: Do not leave cooking utensils uncovered when using cooking oil.
guz: Kunekeri chufuguri ekero ogotumia amaguta amaguta ogokaranga endagera.

en: Learn basic first aid for burns, cuts, and choking incidents.
guz: Manya chinchera chia bwango buna oranyare gokora ekero kwayire, kwenachire gose kwangentirwe nandagera gose amache.

en: Emergency contacts are: Police (999), Ambulance (911), Fire (990).
guz: Chinamba chiemebasekano: Porisi (999), Erori ya Ambulance (911), Omorero bwatekire (990).

en: Never leave children alone in vehicles - temperatures rise dangerously fast.
guz: Totiga abana boka erori ime - riberera ime yorori nigo rikomenta bwango.

en: Use easy-opening windows in bedrooms for emergencies.
guz: Beka chitirisa chikoigoka kebwororo ase chinyomba chiokorara koba aororo ekero kiemebasekano kominchoria.

en: Keep walkways well-lit at night to prevent accidents and deter crime.
guz: Rora nga nobegeta chitaya ase abanto bagoetera botuko ase ogotanga emebasekano yomonto kogochwa and gotanga obosaria.

en: Do not leave electrical appliances plugged into sockets when not in use.
guz: Tobaise gotiga ebinto biria bigotumia esitima bisomekire ase esoketi ekero otari kobikorera egasi.

en: Always have a working flashlight and extra batteries at home.
guz: Kera engaki tema koba netochi inka orayare gwokia ekero esitima yagendire amao nasasi ande oranyare koyebeka ekro aria are ime aerire.

en: Keep an emergency contact list on the fridge and with your older children.
guz: Rika chinamba orarangerie onyore ogokonya ase egento keria kegokendia endagera (efurichi) amo nabana bao abanene.

en: Always lock doors and windows when leaving home, even for short periods.
guz: Kera chingaki sieka emerangu nechitirisa ekero ogosoka korwa inka, nonya nase egeka egeke.

en: Report suspicious activities in your neighborhood to police immediately.
guz: mnyia amangan ore nechitangutangu naro agokorekeka ase chiamate chiao gochia ase omogambi gose abasikari kegima.

en: Install security lights around your property to deter burglars.
guz: Iboka chitaya chikomoreka buya ase enibo yao ere buna enchera eyemo yogotanga abaibi.

en: Don't display valuables in your car - keep them out of sight.
guz: Tiga kworokia ebinto bierigori ime yerori yao - keep them outside.

en: Join or start a neighborhood watch program in your area.
guz: Join or start a neighborhood watch program in your area.

en: Take photos of your valuables and record serial numbers for identification.
guz: Aka ebicha ebinto bia biengencho bionsi chibicha na rika chinamba chiokobiatanana.

en: Use strong padlocks for gates and sheds - avoid cheap, easy-to-cut locks.
guz: Tumia ebiburi ebikong'u ase ebiita biao nekiriri igoro yabo - tga kogora ebinto biebei enke, bikobutoru naibaibi bwngo.

en: Be cautious about sharing travel plans on social media.
guz: Tiga gwatora-tora emeroberio yechisfari chiao ase eintaneti.

en: Keep bushes and trees near windows trimmed to eliminate hiding spots.
guz: Nacha emete na rabia orosana ase chitirisa gotanga abaibi tibebisa aroro.

en: Mark your property with UV pens or engraving to help recovery if stolen.
guz: Beka ebinto biao nekemanyererio "UV pens or engraving" gokonya kobinyora onye biaibirwe.

en: Install peepholes in exterior doors to identify visitors before opening.
guz: Bochora ebingoro biabeene ase emerangu yaisiko kogokonya korora nakomanya omonto korwa nyomba otaramogorera.

en: Don't carry large amounts of cash - use mobile payment options instead.
guz: Tiga kobogoria chibesa chinyinge - rika riokobogoria chibesa, tumia chinhera chigedichitari.

en: Park in well-lit areas at night and check surroundings before exiting vehicle.
guz: Ekero ogoteneni erori yao botuko yeteneni ase oborabu bore boisaine, na mongera aaria na gochia aaria buya nyuma otarasoka korwa erori ime.

en: Teach domestic staff to verify identities before opening gates/doors.
guz: Somia abakori emeremo bao ba nka korigereria buya ebibande bia'bageni nyuma batarabaigoreraebiita gose omorangu.

en: Use timers for lights when away to give appearance someone is home.
guz: Ekero gwasokire gochia esafari, beka chitochi chia chiesitima chinsa chireokie chinyene buna egento giokworokia nga omonto nare nka.

en: Keep car keys in a secure location at home, not near doors/windows.
guz: Gacha ebibunguo bierori yao inka ase agiya, korende tari ase omorangu gose etirisa.

en: Verify credentials of service personnel before allowing access to property.
guz: Verify credentials of service personnel before allowing access to property.

en: Install security cameras at entry points and make them visible.
guz: Beka chikamera chikobwata buna abanto bagosoa na gosoka korwa bwoo as omorangu gose egeita hirirekanete buya.

en: Be aware of common scams like fake lottery winnings or inheritance claims.
guz: Erende korwa ebinto biobongainereria buna kong'ainwa ng'a kwabuire bahati na sibu buna omonyamwando bwomonto osirete.

en: Don't resist during armed robbery - your safety is more valuable than property.
guz: Ekero ebibago biobibi bikogosagana tiga kwamererania nabarabwo- obogima bwa nobwengencho kobua enibo.

en: Keep emergency numbers programmed in your phone for quick access.
guz: Rika na kogacha esimi yaoime chinamba orarangerie chingaki chiemebasakano.

en: Use different routes when traveling regularly to avoid establishing patterns.
guz: Etera chinhera ao ao echi ogosokera korwa inka na koirana erio osirerio amabarato yorogendo rwao buna enchera eyemo yokwerenda.

en: Shred documents containing personal information before disposal.
guz: Tandora na gosria gose samba amasakara ao abwate amang'ana bobisi otarayatuguta.

en: Join us in the fight against corruption. Be part of the solution.
guz: Tobwatisies ase ekinano nobokengeka. Kabe oyomo ase okoreta ekeganeirie.

en: Promote integrity and transparency in all institutions. Together, we can prevent corruption before it starts.
guz: Segeta ekeene nobomaiso marore ase chinsemo chionsi chiobokoreri. Ase oboamo, nabo togotanga obokorekanu tiboba.

en: Report irregular hiring and misuse of public office. Fair recruitment builds trust and accountability.
guz: Karwe eripoti igoro yokorikwa kwa abanto omoroberio omoronge otabwatirie ase ogotumia bobe ofisi yobokoreri bwabanto. Okorika abanto ase omoroberio omuya nigo ogosegeta obwegenwa noboteneri obuya.

en: Corruption weakens counties. Ttake a stand! Uphold ethics in public service and support anti-graft initiatives.
guz: Obokorekanu nigo bokogengeria chinguru chiense. Chora buya! Segeta na goikerania obokereri obuya ase na sira emeroberio yokorwania obokorekanu.

en: Every Kenyan must join the fight against corruption.Uuphold our dignity and justice.
guz: Nere buya kera omo'Kenya kobwatisia esegi gotanga obokorekanu. Segeta amasikani nekeene.

en: Building partnerships with counties strengthens accountability. Say no to graft.
guz: Koagacha oboamate obuya gati yechikaonti nigo kogokong'ia obotenereri obuya. Kana obokengeka.

en: Urgent reforms at Kenya Power & Lighting Company (KPLC) are vital to restore public trust. Be part of the change.
guz: Oboonchoreria bwa bwango ase ekambani yesitima ya Kenya (KPLC) nayengencho ase okoirania obwegenwa gati yekambani eyio yomorero nabanto ba Kenya. Kabe oyomo ase baria bakorenta amaonchorerio.

en: Automation of the self-declaration process is now live. Uphold integrity by complying online today.
guz: Okwemanyekania aye omonyene igoro yenibo obwate bono nigo ogekorwa goetera egedichitri gose eintaneti. Segeta obokeene ase ogoikerania ayio goetera eintaneti.

en: Embrace innovation for greater impact. Ethical leadership starts with you.
guz: Bwata chinchera chinyia chiogokora emeremo ase obokoreri oboikeranu. Engencho engiya nigo egochaka naye.

en: Unified action is needed in the war against graft. Stand firm, report corruption.
guz: Okobwatera amo nkoganeirie erio gosegeta esegi ase obokorekanu. Tenena bokong'u, teba ase obokorekanu bore.

en: Search warrants are investigative tools, not criminal proceedings. Uphold the law, uphold integrity.
guz: Abasikari gocha kogotuka buna koti yabatomete nokorigia obosaiti, na tari ekina kiobosaria. Sika richiko, kabe nekeene.

en: Visit the ASK Eldoret Show and stand with us in the fight against corruption. Together we can safeguard Kenya’s future.
guz: Tarera amaorokererio yoboremi (ASK) aaria Eldoret na koba oyomo oito ase okorwania obokengeka. Amo nabo torakonye Kenya ayito aiga motwe.

en: Keep our roads safe. Corruption in licensing and inspections is “licensing to kill.” Report bribery in transport.
guz: Bwatia amachiko obogendi chirori gotanga emebasekano. Konyora erensesi yokogendi erori ase obokengeka gose eroi yao koegwa amarube yoborigereria nga mbuya ere yoborimo “nokorwa erensesi yogoita.” Teba igoro yokoria riaki ase obobogoria.

en: Join our outreach in Nandi County: raise awareness, promote ethics, and stand with us against graft.
guz: Inchuo naintwe ase ogoikera abanto isiko gokwanerana aiga ekaonti yaito ya Nandi: manyia abanto, segeta chingencho chingiya, na tenena naintwe korwania obokengeka.

en: Be cautious of strangers asking for personal or financial information.
guz: Erende korwa abanto otamanyeti bagokobori amangana igoro yao gose chibesa chiao.

en: Install window security film to make glass harder to break.
guz: Sambereria chichuma ase chetirisa chia erio gotanga ebirore tibiateka raisi.

en: Don't leave ladders or tools outside that could help burglars gain access.
guz: Totuiga engasi gose kende gionsi keranyare gokonya abaibi korina mwao ase ekorofa na kogoikera.

en: Keep car doors locked and windows up when driving in high-risk areas.
guz: Sieka emerangu yerori yao na koyeroki buya ekero okogendia erori yao ase chirori nabanto bare abange gose obosaria bwa igoro.

en: Use tracking devices for valuable items like electronics and vehicles.
guz: Beka erori yao ebinto biria biranyare koyebwatia gose koyerora ase ere ekero yaibirwe nebinto binde bia bionsi biingencho.

en: Be wary of strangers offering unsolicited help with ATMs or banking.
guz: Eborie buya igoro tabanto otamanyeti bakorwa ogokonya kwa bosa goetera obokoreri bwechisimi, (ATMs) gose ebengi.

en: Create inventory of household items with photos and receipts for insurance.
guz: Rika inse ebinto bionsi bia mwao. biake chibicha na gacha amarisiti kwabigorerete gonya insuarensi kogoakana ekero birayie gose koibwa.

en: Use deadbolt locks on exterior doors for added security.
guz: Use deadbolt locks on exterior doors for added security.

en: Be cautious about sharing personal information on phone calls.
guz: Renda tobaise gosanga amangana ao abobisi gose ayengencho na monto onde bwensi goetera chinkwana ase esimi.

en: Install motion-activated lights in dark areas around your property.
guz: Beka ase enkna yao gose ase enibo yao ere ebirobu biesitima biria ekero biarorire omonto botuko bigwoka gokomanyia nga onto nare isiko.

en: Keep shrubbery near entry points low to maintain visibility.
guz: Simeka amaoga ase omorangwa gose egesona kiao.

en: Don't leave spare keys in obvious places like under doormats or flowerpots.
guz: Totiba ekopi yebinguo biao bia kobera aase aamo engaki entambe buna inse yomogeka bwenyomba gose ase enyongo yamaoga - bichenchie kera engaki.

en: Use security bars or grilles on vulnerable windows and doors.
guz: Sambereria egiriri ase chitirisa nemerangu gochikong'ia.

en: Be alert in parking lots - have keys ready and check backseat before entering.
guz: Be alert in parking lots - have keys ready and check backseat before entering.

en: The Police Service urges Patriotic Kenyans to report cases of illegal immigrants for arrest to the nearest police stations.
guz: Abasikari baboririe abakenya baria banhete ense yabo Kenya bamanyie igoro yabanto bakagere gosoa Kenya goetera emerangu ya magega gochia eporisi steseni ya ange babwatwe.

en: We urge citizens to cooperate with security personnel as they perform their duties and use lawful channels to address their grievances.
guz: Nigo togosaba abanainchi babweterane nabarendi boborendi chingaki bagokora emeremo yabo ase ogotumia chinchera chireo korwa okwemurunganania kwabo.

en: We urge citizens to continue volunteering information that will lead to the arrest of Francis Gaitho.
guz: Nigo togosaba abanainchi bagenderere korwa amang'ana gochia ase abasikari aranyare gokonya komobwata Francis Gaitho.

en: Let's continue playing our part in thwarting terror by sharing information on suspicious activities with relevant authorities.
guz: Kera oyomo oito atigare koba maiso nagokora ensemo yaye gotanga obokebago bwokoruta chipomuin goetera akomanyania amang'ana gose ebinto tore nechitangutangu nabirobio.

en: If you have information, #ReachDCI through hotline number 0800 722 203. Let's work together to uphold justice and accountability. #FichuaGaitho
guz: Onye kore nering'ana, #Moikera omotuki omonene goetera enamba ya morero 0800 722 203. Tiga tokore emeremo amo gosegeta ekeene nobotenereri obuya. #Bisora Gaitho

en: The public is advised to exercise restrain and is explicitly cautioned against any attempts to enter without authorisation or break into JKIA as it is a protected zone under the laws of Kenya.

en: Youths are advised to reject alshabaab propaganda to avoid premature death or such hefty jail sentences.

guz: Ogoturubania omorembe, ogosegeta abanto, okiba, na gosaria ebinto nigo bire mamincha yerichiko.

guz: Rigereria buya ekabande kiomonto ogokoba gose korenta ebinto buya nyuma otaramwanchera gosoa.

guz: Totiga ebinto biengencho birorekane ime yerori yao ekero oyeteneneties ase chirori chikobekwa.

guz: Nere buya koba nase agiya okobeka amanag'ana ao na ebinto biaobiengencho.

guz: Kabe maiso nechisimi korwa ase abanto bagwekona buna abamo babamino chigokorangeria nga omonto omino nare ase emechando eganetie oboknyi bwa bwango gokonya obogima bwaya.

en: Use security chains on doors even when expecting visitors.
guz: Sieka emerangu yao yenyomba nenyororo nonya nekero okagerete abageni gocha kogokwania.

guz: Tiga gotiga ebibeti biechibesa bitarendiri na monto ase eduka, echiro gose aande onsi.

en: Be cautious of 'shoulder surfing' at ATMs and when entering PINs.
guz: kabe maiso ase emachini eria ekorusia chibesa ase ebengi na abanto bakoigoka ang'e okobata PIN emachine ekoe chibesa.

en: Use security cameras with cloud storage to preserve evidence if needed.
guz: Beka chikamera chiria chibwatanirie neintaneti chikobwata abanto buna bagosoa na gosoka gose ebinto bigendererete kogonya obosaiti ekero boganeirie.

en: Usifanye maonyesho ya mali thamani kwa umma - weka kwa siri na salama.
guz: Tobaise kworokia enibo yao ore nero ase abanto- yegache ase obobisi na buya.

en: Install security film on glass doors to prevent easy break-ins.
guz: Beka egamu gatigati yebirore bierori yao gotanga abaibi kobwata ase obwororo.

guz: Beka ekemayererio kia beene ase ebinto biao erio onyare kobiatanana buya ekero biabirwe.

guz: Gacha amasakara kwagorerete erori yao amo neinsuarensi kafa yerori yao ase agaya , na tari ase erori yao ome.

guz: Kabe maiso nebinto bikororekana buya na buna ebiekeene bikorugwa ogore enyomba aase gete.

guz: Tobaise gotiga omorangu gose etirisa bitasiekirie botuko, nonya riberera rire rinene.

guz: Nere buya kobwatana nabanyabiasara ase oborendi bwebiasara biano aaria ase ebiasara.

guz: Ikera ogokonywa chingaki chiemebasekano goetera: Porisi (999), Omotuki omonene (0800 722 203).

en: Be cautious of strangers asking to use your phone for 'emergencies'.
guz: Erende nabanto otamanyeti bakogosaba esimi yao baake ase ingana rinde rionsi riomobasekano'.

guz: Abasikari bobokoreri (APS) baeire abarendi boborendi buna babwenerete gokora mechando ende meke goetera chinkwana erio gokora eminano.

guz: Amangana omonisita bwoborendi bwa ime Murkomen akwanete arengete goikeranigwa kemachiko yobokoreri bwa bwabarendi bwoborendi (COP)

guz: Ekeombe kia baria bagokora amaonchorerio ase obokoreri bwabasikari nigo kegosaba ogokongigwa kwa abarendi boborendi (COP)

guz: Ayarorekanete goetera okomanya kweyunifasity ya Nairobi igoro yemechando ereo ase ogoikerania obokoreri bwabarendi boborendi (Cop) aaria Kibera.

guz: Obokongoria bwa KIPPRA igoro yamaonchorerio igoro yabarendi boborendi.

guz: Abarai bekaonti ya Nakuru mbabete nomoroberio obonsi aaria esiteseni ya Elementaita gokwanerana nechikomiti chia abarendi boborendi (CPC) nabateneneri bebinyoro gokong'ia obokoreri bwabarendi boborendi (COP)ase okobwaterana.

guz: Abarendi boborendi bekaonti ya Machakosyamanyirie ng'a ogkeania obosaria kwarorekanire aaria ensemo ya Mwala.

guz: ekeombe keria kiobomo bwechisukuru chioboroso  (KEPSSI) nkiabwateranete nekeombe kiabanyanyimbo (NPS) kuorokereria ekamati yabarendi ase ekenyoro

guz: Okobwatwa kwebibago aaria ase emate ya Yatta nogo kwanyarekanete nyuma yabainchi korwa korwa amang'ana gochia ase abasikari buna enchera eyemo yabainchi kobwaterana nabasikari

guz: Ekeombe ekenene giense getenerete gokongia obokoreri bweserikari (IOM) giakonyire gosira abanene babasikari gokora emeremo yabo ase okobwaterana gokora emeremo yabo amo nabainchi aaria Garissa.

en: Stakeholders including police chiefs and counselors trained in GBV community policing and awareness in Kisumu County
guz: Abanto bonsi amo nabasikari na baria bonsi batagegete oborendi amo nabasemia basomiigwe igoro komanyia abanto igoro yobobe bwogochaya gose gokorera abande bobe ase enncho yeki bare aaria ekaonti ya Kisumu

en: Kenya Methodist University/IJRISS research shows community policing significantly improves service delivery and trust in Nairobi County

en: Police credit community policing efforts for a marked decline in murders, defilement and other serious crimes in Mwala Machakos County

en: Community forums sponsored by IOM improved trust and intelligence sharing between residents and security.

en: The Inspector General pledged to implement IPOA recommendations to strengthen oversight, disciplinary processes, and responsiveness to misconduct complaints.
guz: Omorai omonene bwasikari (IG) nriete eira goikerania okoboria gwekeombe keria gietenerete korora buna abasikari bagokora emeremo yabo (IPOA) erio gokong'ia obomongeria, nchera yokorwa egesusuro, na koiraneria bwango gochia okwemuranganania kwa abanainchi.

en: A report documented systemic excessive force during protests and called for prosecutions, crowd control reforms, and stronger conduct enforcement mechanisms.

en: NPS announced an internal affairs unit, whistleblower hotline, and new disciplinary procedures to address corruption allegations transparently.

en: Advocacy group PRWG urged criminal responsibility for senior commanders whose subordinates commit misconduct and expansion of command responsibility doctrine.
guz: Ebiombe bwabarwanereri bia abasikari baria batenerete korigia amaonchorerio (PRWG) mbamanyetie abanene ba abasikari kobogoria amamocho abasikari babo abwo bakomocha ase chigasi chiabo goetera oggochoreria amachiko as ayio.

en: The Kenya Human Rights Commission criticized the IG for bypassing the Police Service Commission’s authority, warning that it undermines constitutional oversight.

en: Media highlighted calls for an independent investigation into a custodial death, with families demanding prosecution and better detention oversight.
guz: Ebiombo biokomanyia abanto amangana mbiaboretie nga obotuki bwogwetenera bokorwe igoro yogokwa yabanto baria barenge eseri ya porisi, abowo ase baria bakweretwe nabamwabo nga abasikari basoerwe na buna baria bare ase chiseri chia porisi bakoreretwe gose barendire.

en: A senior police official stepped aside during a custody death probe to avoid conflicts in investigations handled by independent authorities.
guz: Chingaki omosikari omonene atenete ensemo korwa ribaga riobotuki ekero omonto akwerete eseri ime erio gotasoananera obotuki buna bwaregokorwa nebiombe biogwetenerera.

en: Press coverage summarized IPOA oversight statistics showing modest improvements and ongoing gaps in complaint handling and convictions.
guz: Amanagana amagaseti narwete ase obweng'e igoro buna engencho ekeombe keria gietenererete kia abasikari IPOA kegendererete gokora emeremo buya mono kegima ase oboremu borengete buna okwemuranganania gokoborigwa na gokorerwa emeremo.

en: Families of a shooting victim demanded legal action; IPOA confirmed active investigation and emphasized supervisory accountability.
guz: Amamwabo baria barasetie amasasi nabasikari mbaboretie ng'a ebotambokero biamachiko bibogorigwe as abasikari; ekeombe keria gietenererete kia abasikari (IPOA) nkiaenegetie obotuki obuya na koboria nga abateneneri babasikari babogorie amamocho ayio.

en: An NGO launched a citizen oversight toolkit with training materials and reporting templates to strengthen youth involvement in accountability.
guz: Ekeombe gie NGO yarwete egetabu kiomoroberio bwo'bomongeri bwabainchi nebinto bwokwegeria na buna babwenerete korwa amang'ana gochia erio gokongia abasae komanya na gotenerera ebikoru biabo.

en: Judicial leadership endorsed IPOA’s mandate and pledged support for stronger cooperation between the judiciary and the oversight body.
guz: Abatenereri bokogamba ebina mbaete okoboko ekeombe keria gietenererete kia abasikari (IPOA) buna kegokora emeremo na koenekia kobasira ase okobwaterana gti yechikoti nebiombe biria bikomongera obokoreri bwabo.

en: IPOA launched a toll-free hotline operating 24/7 for public reporting of misconduct to increase accessibility and transparency.
guz: Ekeombe keria gietenererete kia abasikari (IPOA) giansete esimi ya bosa ogoaka kobamanyia kobamanyia buna abasikari bakomocha ase emeremo yabo egokora emeremo amatuko onsi chinsa chionsi erio gokinia ogoikera obokoreri bwaporisi maiso marore.

en: A formal agreement between IPOA and the Law Society of Kenya aimed to streamline legal responses and improve prosecution support.
guz: Okoigwana kwabeene gati yekeombe keria gietenererete kia abasikari (IPOA) na ekeombe keria ekenene getenerete obogambi ebina namachiko gia Kenya kwarengete kobeka buya obokoreri bwamachiko na korongei na gosira buna ebina bigosou.

en: A review detailed IPOA’s achievements, challenges, and strategic direction and outlined next steps in police accountability reform.
guz: Okorigereria keboyia ngwatebe geikaranu buna ekeombe keria gietenererete kia abasikari (IPOA) giakorire buya, emechamndo ereo, amo nemeroberio yabeene yar koorokia ebitambokero bia motwe biogoikerania abasikari gotenera ebikotu biegasi yabo.

en: The Interior Ministry and IPOA launched a comprehensive police reform framework emphasizing oversight and streamlined complaint mechanisms.
guz: Ewizara yoborendi bwa ime na ekeombe keria gietenererete kia abasikari (IPOA) mbaansete omoroberio omonene bwokoreta oboonchoreria ase obokoreri bwa porisi na kobeka chinguri obomongeri nenchera engiya yokomanyia okwemurungania kwa abanto.

en: Following an IPOA probe, a senior officer and colleague were charged with torture and abuse of office, demonstrating judicial follow-through.
guz: Goetra obotuki bwe'keombe keria gietenererete kia abasikari (IPOA), omosikari omonene nomoke oye mbasoeretwe na gokumerwa igoro yogochanda gose komosuna omonto kare eseri ya porisi buna amamocho yogotumia amadaraka abo bobe, ekoenekia buna ekoti ekomongera amashitaka buya.

en: A court verdict held a police sergeant accountable in a fatal shooting case, setting precedent for misconduct prosecutions.
guz: Ekoti yanacherete omosikari omonene kobogori amamocho ase ekina giokorasa, kworokia buya buna amchiko agokora emeremo ase bonsi.

en: A legal ruling confirmed IPOA’s exclusive authority to investigate police misconduct and rejected attempts to limit its jurisdiction.
guz: Okonacha gwekoti nkwaete ekeombe keria gietenererete kia abasikari (IPOA) chinguru chiogotuka buna abasikari bagokora bobe na kwanga ogosaba ng'a chinguru chiabo chikeanigwe.

en: IPOA announced a prosecution outcome in a Nyeri manslaughter case involving a police officer, underscoring accountability progress.
guz: Ekoti ekanacha ekina ng'a ekeombe keria getenenerete korigereria buna abasikari bagokora emeremo (IPOA) nkere nokobua koringoria amamocho abasikari bakora igo ekanga ogosaba ng'a chinguru chiabo chikeanigwe.

en: IPOA spotlighted a serious misconduct case in Mombasa, calling for transparency and systemic discipline reforms.
guz: Ekoti ekanacha ekina ng'a ekeombe keri gietenenerete korigereria buna abasikari bagokora emeremo (IPOA) nkere nokobua koringori amamocho abasikari bakora igo ekanga ogosabang'a chinguru chiabochi keanigwe.

en: IPOA referred multiple misconduct cases to the DPP for legal action, aiming to convert oversight into convictions.
guz: Ekeombe keria gietenerete korigereria buna abasikari bagokora emeremo yabo (IPOA) nkiaorogetie maiso marore buna ekina kiagambetwe bobe aaria Mombasa, nagosaba ng’a obomaiso marore amo enchera yokorwa egesusuro

en: An analysis assessed police tactics used during mass demonstrations, focusing on proportionality, arrests, and rights-based policing.
guz: Amasomo abeene igoro yabasikari nkworokia kore buna abasikari bakoererania ekerogo korobererekana, bagotumia chinguru koreng’ana nobonge bwabanto, nagoetera enchera yekemwanyabanto.

en: IPOA issued updates on detainee fatality investigations and outlined measures to improve custodial conditions.
guz: Ekeombe keria gietenerete korigereria buna abasikariba gokora emeremo yabo (IPOA) nkiarwete eripoti yobotuki bwabo igoro yabaria babegetwe chiseri na buna baumiete amo nemeroberio yokorora ng’a baria bonsi babwatetwe mbaegwe obosibore bwabo ime yechiseri.

en: A judicial ruling found former officers guilty of murder, reinforcing accountability for serious misconduct.
guz: Ekoti yanyorete abasikari namamocho yogoita, egekoro kiabegete chinguru gokora emeremo buya gwanchereria gotaiyo goikerania korora ng’a kera omosikari ebogorerie emeremo yaye.

en: An IPOA warning stated that silence within the police force enables impunity and called for cultural reforms and safe reporting.
guz: Ogokurerwa korwa ekeombe keria gietenerete korigereria buna abasikari bagokora emeremo yabo (IPOA)ngwatebete ng’a ogotakwana buna abasikari bagokora bobe nenchera eyemo yagerire abasikari bagendererete gokora amamocho na gotegwa egesusuro, nagosaba ng’a oboonchoreria goetera chinchera chiegenka kobe erio korwa ribaga abanto koripoti.

en: IPOA inspected forensic labs and case files to improve evidence integrity and transparency in criminal investigations.
guz: Ekeombe keria gietenerete korigereria buna abasikari bagokora emeremo yabo (IPOA) nkiarogereretie buya chifaeri chiebina goikerania oboikeranu bwebinto bikworokia buna amagoso arenge ase enchera yamaiso marore ase obotuki bwebina.

en: A multi-agency forum aligned civil society, oversight bodies, and government to develop a coordinated police reform strategy.
guz: Okobwaterana kwebiombe biechi-enichio (NGOs), baria bakomongera, amo nesirikari korosia amo omoroberio bwokoererania ase okoererania kwa’maonchorerio a porsi.

en: A public forum in Kakamega enabled citizens to report misconduct directly to officials, strengthening community oversight.
guz: Omosangerekano obonsi aaria Kakamega okonyire abanainchi komanyia abane gotyaertera monto onde igoro yogokora bobe kwabasikari gochia abanene, naigo yakonya kwororobia gokora emeremo.

en: A police partnership initiative trained young women in self-defense and educated participants on rights and complaint channels.
guz: Omoroberio bwokobwaterana nabasikari mbwegeretie abangina abasae buna baranyare kwerende korwa emechando na gosomia omosangerekano igoro yoboronge bwabo amo nenchera yokorwa okwemuranganania.

en: An audit exposed misuse of public funds in police operations and prompted calls for fiscal transparency and procurement reform.
guz: Obokongoria mbwaorokia maiso marore igoro yogotumia chibesa bobe ekero abasikari bagokora emesako ekio kiagerete abanto gotaka komanya obokeene na obomaiso marore ase ogotumia chibesa echio na amaochorerio yobogori.

en: A live radio program educated listeners on detainee rights, proper custody treatment, and legal recourse for abuse.
guz: Amasomo goetera eredio nasomitie abategereri oborionge bwabaria bare chiseri chia polisi, buna babwenerete korendwa buya ime yeseri, na ekibaranyare gokora onye bakorereirwe bobe.

en: Posters distributed nationwide explained suspects’ rights, legal search limits, and how to file complaints with oversight bodies.
guz: Ebinto bwabwate amariko are komanyia oboronge bwomokagerwa, ekerngo giokomotababa, na buna oranyare gosoera abasikari gochia ase baria bakomongera buna abasikari bagokora emeremo.

en: NPS launched an online portal providing access to oversight reports, misconduct statistics, complaint status, and disciplinary actions.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene kiabasikari (NPS) giansire obokoreri bweintaneti goikera chiripoti chia’ bamongeri buna poilisibagokora emeremo yabo barenge bakorore mamincha, buna ayio agendererete korigererigwa, negeusuro kiarurwe.

en: APS introduced a yellow card system allowing citizens to report misconduct anonymously during patrols.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene gis abasikari bobokoreri (APS) mnkiarwete ekadi yerangi yomochununu buna enchera yogokonya abanainchi komanyia amamocho abasikari bagokora gotemanyekania naye ng'o chingaki bagora omosako.

en: Mombasa County launched a text-based reporting line for victims to send secure complaints to oversight officials.
guz: Ekaonti ya Mmobasa yaansete okomanyia gooetera rirube erieng'e riesimi ase baria bakoreirwe bobe gotoma ebirero biabo gochia abatenereri babasikari kobwatia amamocho ayio.

en: Community artists created a public mural in Naivasha promoting themes of oversight, justice, and citizen–police partnership.
guz: Abanyangero borogongo mabkorete emeremo amo yogwata chibicha chinene nagochinati chinyasi Naivasha gosegeta emeremo yamongeria, ekeene, nokobwaterana kwabanainchi nabasikari.

en: DCI urged citizens to submit crime complaints or tips directly to DCI offices or email to improve investigative response.
guz: Omosikari omonene bwobotuki (DCI) osoroire abanainchi babe bagotoma okwemurangania kwabo gose bosemia konde gwonsi gochia asare ere omonyene gose komotomera eimeiri erio kwangoyia obotuki nokoiraneria.

en: Guidance provided on how to file police misconduct complaints and the rights of complainants.
guz: Oborai borure buna obwenerete komanyia abatenereri babasikari buna bagokora bobe gose okwemuranganania amo noboronge bwoyokwemuranganania.

en: NPS refuted a false terror alert online and urged verification through official channels.
guz: Ekeombe ekenene kia abasikari (NPS) mbangete amangana oborimo igoro yokobamanyia obokebago goetera eintaneti, na bagasorora ng'a koenekia amangana ayio nere buya akoreke goetera chichera chiria chireo chiokobamanyia.

en: US Embassy warned citizens of increased terror threats at tourist sites and advised heightened awareness.
guz: Obobarosi bwa America Kenya (US Embassy) mbwaruete ogokurera gochia abainchi igoro yokogeseka kwobwoba nokogosereria kwobokebago ase chioteri chiria abageni korwa chinse chi isko bakobera na korwa ogosemia buna berure komanyia ayio.

en: Authorities warned Western and Nyanza communities of suspected terror recruitment and urged reporting of suspicious behavior.
guz: Aabarai mbakurerete ebinyoro bia Mocha na Nyanza igoro yogosoigwa ase obokebago bwogoaka chipomu na gosororwa komanyia abagambi igoro ya kende gionsi giechitang'utang'u.

en: Public informed of an Al-Shabaab attack in Garissa and encouraged to stay vigilant as security heightened.
guz: Abanainchi bamanyiigwe igoro yebikoreri bia akili bandia Al bia -Shabaab goaka epomu Garissa, na kobaa omoyo gotigara maiso ekiagera oborendi bwagesirwe.

en: Government launched a campaign promoting cyber hygiene and awareness of the National Cybersecurity Strategy.
guz: Eserekekari yachagete omoroberio bwokomanyia abanto igoro yogotumia buya eintaneti na korenda ng'a tesoa se abako amabe buna omoroberio omonene bweserikari igoro yeintaneti.

en: Interior Ministry announced increased multi‑agency patrols during the festive season to deter crime.
guz: Eministiri ya yoborendi bwa ime goetera abitengo ao ao yamentete ogoonchokanana korenda obokebago chingaki chia amatuko emeyega ao ao gotanga obokebago.

en: Interior CS briefed Senate on national security readiness and coordinated agency efforts.
guz: Omominisita bwoborendi bwa ine namanyetie ekegambero gieseneti buna yeariganetie ase oborendi bwense na okobwaterana nebitengo ao ao.

en: Security operations intensified in Kitale and North Rift to combat cattle rustling with specialized units deployed.
guz: Emeroberio yoborendi aaria Kitale na North Rift bangangane gokora aboibi bwechiombe ase okobwaterana nebitengo bieserikari bia beene biatomirwe aroro.

en: Government recognized GBV as a national security threat and called for inter‑agency collaboration.
guz: Eserikari yarorire ogkorerwa bobe ekiagera eki ore (GBV) koba ringana rokogosereria eborendi bwense na koreta amo ebitengo bieserikari kobwaterana.

en: A terror cell in Lamu was dismantled and suspects arrested in a joint security operation.
guz: Eseri ase ebibago biechipomu bibekire aaria Lamu yabunetwe na abakagerwa mbabwatetwe goetera ebitengo ao ao bieserikari.

en: NPS debunked a fake terror warning poster and cautioned against misinformation.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene gia abasikari (NPS) nkiarwete oboene igoro yongainereri goetera amariko ogokurera anantetigwe chinaysi bwogoakwa epomu na gokurera abanto batige korwa amangana agotantania.

en: US Embassy issued advisory warning of heightened crime and terror risks and urged caution.
guz: Obobalosi bwa America (US Embassy) aiga Kenya yarwete ogosemia kwogokurera igoro yobosareku bwaigoro mono nokonyarekana kwobokebago na gosaba koba maiso.

en: US Embassy imposed travel restrictions for staff in six counties due to insecurity.
guz: Obobalosi bwa America (US Embassy) aiga Kenya mbwarwete ogokurera gochia abanto babo koba maiso gotarera chikaonti 6 aiga Kenya ekiagera oborendi botaisaine aroro.

en: NPS published a list of most wanted terror suspects and urged anonymous public reporting.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene kia abasikari (NPS) nkiarwete omoroberio obaria baganeirie mono buna ebibago biogoaka chipomu na gosaba abanto babamanyie bakagerwa bande bateri gweteba barabwo mbarabi .

en: KAA heightened airport security after a bomb threat and advised early arrival for screening.
guz: Egetii giechindege kia Kenya (KAA) kiagesire oborendi ase egetii nyuma yobwoba bweombu goateka na gosaba baria bonsi bagochia koiruruka baike mapema gokorerwa oboringori.

en: US government advised citizens to avoid Eastleigh and Kibera due to security concerns.
guz: Eserikari ya America yasemirie abanainchi koba maiso gochia Eastleigh na Kibera ase engencho yoborendi botari oboikeranu.

en: Additional personnel were deployed to Naivasha to secure the Safari Rally event.
guz: Abakori emeremo abange batomirwe gochia Naivasha kobeka oborendi ekero gia Safari Rally event.

en: Public advised not to circulate graphic images after the DusitD2 attack to protect victims’ dignity.
guz: Abanainchi basabirwe tibasiarera chibicha chiokwoboi buna DusitD2 yaagetwe ebomu erio korenda amasikani ya baria baagetwe nepomu.

en: Cyclone Hidaya alert issued urging coastal residents to prepare for strong winds and floods.
guz: Ogokurerwa igoro ya yomorindo omonene okorokwa Hidaya kwarwetwe gosorora abanto bamenyete ang'e na nyancha ukwearigania ase emerindo emene netoigo.

en: Interior Ministry warned ahead of protests, urging peaceful demonstrations and placing security forces on alert.
guz: Eminisitiri yoboredi bwa ime yakurerwe nyuma yokoroberekana gotaraba, egosorora nga okoroberekana kobe okwomorembe na kobeka ebitengo bionsi bioborendi maiso.

en: National Cybersecurity Strategy published outlining plans to protect digital infrastructure.
guz: Omoroberio omonene bweserikari okorenda amang'ana aye arikire taminchoria gochia amaboko amabe nkiarurwete omoroberio buna ekorenda bionsi biria bigachete amang'ana.

en: Multiple suspects arrested in Lamu during a counter‑terror operation; public urged to report tips.
guz: Abakagerwa bobosaria ba kera engencho mbabwatetwe aaria lamu ekero kiomosako gotana ogoakwa nechipomu; abanainchi mbasabetwe koerwa chiripoti.

en: Residents in flood and conflict‑prone areas ordered to evacuate with routes and shelters listed.
guz: Abamenyi bari bare aase emegoko gose aregire chimanano bachikirwe kong'anya korwa ase ande onsi ararete emechando gochia ase atebire neserikari gose chinyomba chiria eserikariyatebire.

en: Government issued updates on North Rift anti‑bandit operations and reaffirmed commitment to security.
guz: Eserikari yarure eriport igoro ya yebitengo bieserikari gotanga aboibi bwechiombe aaria North Rift na kobaenekeria oborendi bwabo.

en: NPS reminded officers to avoid misuse of force during protests and maintain professionalism.
guz: Ekombe keria ekenene gia abasikari (NPS) kiainyoirie abobisa baye gotatumia chibunduki bobe chingaki chiokoroberekana na goikerania obokoreri emeremo obuya.

en: US Embassy warned of potential unrest during primaries and urged citizens to avoid large gatherings.
guz: Obobalosi bwa America aiga Kenya US Embassy) nyarwete ogokurera igoro yomoburakano ekero gwokorwanererera chitigiti chiebiama biegesiaia igo gosaba abanainchi berende gotaba ase emesangerekano emenene.

en: Government launched an initiative to combat illegal firearms trafficking with education and surveillance.
guz: Eserikari yachagete omoroberio bwogokora ebiasara biechibunduki goetra chisemi na education and buna chikoereranigwa.

en: Government declared a nationwide high-alert and urged citizens to remain calm, report suspicious activity, and cooperate with security agencies.
guz: Eserikari yatangasire koba maiso ense engima na gosaba abanainchi koba abatoreru, korwa eripoti igoro ya ebire nechitang'utang'u, na kobwaterana nabateneneri bobosrendi.

en: NPS warned the public about a fake police recruitment advert online and advised job seekers to rely only on official government platforms.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene kia abasikari (NPS) giakureire abainchi igoro yokong'ainwa goetera eintaneti ng'a abasikari nkorikwa bare na kobamanyia bonsi ng'a ogotangasa gwokorika abasikari ngoetera eintaneti yeserikari yoka.

en: NPS dismissed a viral terror-warning poster as a hoax and urged the public to verify information before sharing.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene kia abasikari (NPS) yakanete amangana igoro yokogosereria goetera eintaneti ng'a ebibago ngoaka biarenge epomu na gosaba abainchi koenekia amangana aya ase aruwete nyuma batarasareria.

en: APS responded to a school bomb threat by evacuating students, securing the area, and launching investigations into the source.
guz: Abasikari bobokoreri (APS) nkiairaneretie bwango igoro yamang'ana yokogosereria gwepombu ase esukuru goetera ogotamia abana, goetanana ase ayio, na goansa obotuki komanya ase amangana ayio arwete.

en: A curfew was imposed in Mandera County to address rising insecurity and facilitate ongoing security operations.
guz: Ogochika gotanga abanto mbasoka korwa chinka chiabo chinsa gete nkwabegetwe aaria ekaonti ya Mandera buna enchera eyemo yogokeania obokebago na kobeka oborendi ase omoroberio bwokogenderera.

en: Kenya Meteorological Department issued a flash-flood advisory for seven counties and urged residents to take safety precautions.
guz: Ekeombe keria gekorigeria rire buna rire nkiarwete ogkurera igoro yogocha kwembura enyinge nemegoko ime yechikaonti 7 naigo koboria abanto ng'a berende.

en: Airports nationwide were placed on high alert with intensified screenings following a classified security memo.
guz: Ebitii biechindeke Kenya engima mbiabiaboretigwe koba maiso na komongera buya baria bonsi bagosoa ase ebitii ebio korengana nogokurerwa kwa ime kwarwetwe nabarendi boborendi.

en: Authorities deployed surveillance, roadblocks, and emergency teams to ensure safety ahead of the Safari Rally.
guz: Abarendi mbagegete obomongeri, ebitumo ase chipara, na baria bagokonya ekero kiemebasekano goikerania oborendi nyuma yamashindano yechigari.

en: Government issued updates on North Rift anti-banditry operations, including arrests and livestock recovery, urging public cooperation.
guz: Eserikari yamanyetie abanto ba North Rift igoro yemeroberio yaye gotanga oboibi bwechiombe, abaibi babwatirwe nechiombe chianyorirwe na koiranigwa, na gosaba nga okobwaterana kobeo.

en: Ministry of Interior advised evacuations in conflict-prone and flood-affected areas and deployed emergency response teams.
guz: Eminisirtiri yoborendi bwaime yarwete ogosemia abanto barwe chngongo chiria neminano na chiria chigoterema amache na gotoma baria bagokonya elero kiemebasekano.

en: NPS reiterated guidance for officers to use proportional force during protests and to prioritize peaceful engagement.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene kiabasikari (NPS) kiairoreire komanyia abasikari gotumia chinguru chinke chingaki chiokorobererekana na koba nobwororo chingaki bakoiranererania nabainchi.

en: Government launched a nationwide campaign to raise awareness on the dangers of illegal arms trafficking through community outreach and media.
guz: Eserikari yachakire omoroberio omonene komanyia abanto goetera mesangerekano ao ao yebinyoro igoro yobobe bwebiasara biechibunduki chire ase amaboko amabe.

en: A national alert was issued over rising insecurity, with assurances that security measures were being strengthened across affected counties.
guz: Ogokurerwa Kenya engima nkwarwetwe igoro yoborendi, na koenekeria abanainchi ng'a oborendi boisaine bwabekirwe chikaonti chionsi.

en: U.S. Embassy renewed its advisory on possible unrest during U.S. primaries and urged heightened vigilance in demonstration-prone areas.
guz: Obobalosi bwa America (U.S. Embassy) aiga Kenya naende yarure ogokurerwa igoro yechiburaburu chingaki chiobochori bwa abarai bwebiam aaria America no kobeka obokongori bwa igoro kegima ase akageire koba nechiburaburu.

en: Authorities issued detailed Cyclone Hidaya safety guidance urging coastal residents to secure property and avoid non-essential travel.
guz: Abari mbwaretwe oborai boisaine igoro yomorindo okorokwa (Cyclone Hidaya) sna gosaba amenyi bonsi bamenyete ang'e na nyancha barende chinibo chiabo na gokeania chisafari chitari chiengencho.

en: Security agencies increased nationwide patrols during the festive season to deter crime and safeguard communities.
guz: Abatenereri boborendi bagesire obomongeri bwabo Kenya engima chingaki chiotimoko nemeyega ao ao gotanga obokebago eri korenda ebinyoro.

en: Interior CS briefed the Senate on national security readiness, highlighting anti-terror efforts and enhanced intelligence coordination.
guz: Omominisita bwoborendi bwa ime narwete enkwana gochia abagambi beseneti buna beariganirie igoro yoborendi bwense, na kobeka chinguru buna okwearigania kwa beene nabasikari baria batenenerete obokebago bwogoaka chipomu beariganirie goetera okoererania kwobotuki.

en: Government reaffirmed its commitment to combating cattle rustling through intensified patrols in the North Rift.
guz: Eserikari yaenekirie okwerwa kwaye gokora oboibi bwechiombe goetra obomongeria bwaye ase chipara nechinchera ase abaibi bagoetia chiombe chioboibi aaria ensemo ya North Rift.

en: Authorities notified the public of an Al-Shabaab attack in Garissa and urged vigilance as additional troops were deployed.
guz: Aabarai banyirie abanainchi igoro yobkebago bwogokwa epomu na Al-Shabaab aaria garisa Garissa na gosaba koba maiso buna enchera eyemo gokonya ebikosi bia abasikari biria biatomirwe.

en: NPS discredited multiple fake posters circulating online and urged the public to avoid sharing unverified content.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene kia abasikari (NPS)nkiangete ebinto birikire bia gosiarerwa goetera entaneti buna ebioborimo na gosaba banainchi berende kobisiarera.

en: APS promptly evacuated a school following a bomb threat and initiated investigations while strengthening safety protocols.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene kia abasikari (NPS) nkinganyetie abanto bwango gotanyorwa korwa esukuru nyuma yogosarera kwamang'ana kwogoakwa epombu na goansa obotuki ekero boigo bagesete oborendi.

en: PRWG urged police to prevent masked infiltrators during protests, maintain professional crowd control, and ensure accountability for misconduct.
guz: Ekeombe keria getenerete oboonchoreria ase abasikari (PRWG) ngiasororete abasikari gotanga bonsi baria bagwesoi ase okorobererekana koburukania okorobererekana kwomorembe, goikerania amachiko emeremo yabo ekero bakorwa oborendi ase abakorobererekana, na koba ange gotenenera ebokoro biabo.

en: Amnesty Kenya reminded officers to respect protest rights, protect medics and journalists, and avoid excessive force.
guz: Ekeombe kia Amnesty aiga Kenya nkiainyoretie abasikari gosika amchiko yokorobererekana, barendi abanyagitari nabariki amang'ana, na korenda gotatumia chinguru chinyinge ekero batenenerete okorobererekana.

en: IPOA opened a comprehensive investigation into allegations of police misconduct during June protests, including use of live rounds and mass detentions.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene gekorigereria buna abasikari bagokora emeremo yabo (IPOA) nkiagorete obotuki obonene komanya igoro yokwemuranganania ng'a abasikari mbakorete meremo yabo buya chingaki chiokorobererekana kwomotienyi 6, amo nogotumia chimbunde bobe na kobeka abanto ase egesibo getari kiaboronge.

en: PRWG reaffirmed that peaceful protests must be protected and criticized failures to separate violent actors from lawful demonstrators.
guz: Ekeombe keria getenenerete oboonchoria ase emeremo yabasikari (PRWG) nkiaenegetie ng''a okorobererekana kwomorembe goika korendwe naigo goteba ng'a abasikari mbasinyetwe goseberania abarobererekani bari bare notindi erio korwa ribaga ase abaroberekani bekeene.

en: Human Rights Watch noted lack of prosecutions for 2023 protest-related deaths and urged enforcement of IPOA recommendations.
guz: Ekeombe keria kerigeretie oboronge bwekemwanyabanto (Human Rights Watch) nkiaroche ng'a ogotasoera baria bausikanete namakweri yabaria bakwete ekero okorobererekana kwomwaka 2023 na gosaba ng'a amangana yekeombe keria getenerete obokori emeremo na abasikari (IPOA) yatebete akore emeremo.

en: Investigations revealed police attempts to misreport protest fatalities as accidents, raising concerns over deliberate cover-ups.
guz: Obotuki mbwaorogetie buna abasikari batemete kobisa enamba yabanto baumiete gose gosiria obogima goetera goetera okorobererekana, buna ringana riamakusudi kobisa amang'ana.

en: Reports detailed police-ordered lockdowns on Saba Saba Day, including blocked routes, live fire, and escalated confrontations.
guz: Chiripoti igoro ya buna abasikari batangete ogotara, gosanga na koererania amangana rituko ria Saba Saba, goetra ogosieka chipara, okorasa chimbunde, na kogesa emeburukano.

en: Opposition leaders demanded the president’s resignation after he appeared to endorse shoot-on-sight rhetoric during protests.
guz: Abarai bopinsani mbaimokererete igoro koboria omorai bwense erusie emeremo ekero aitabete ng'a abanto bagosangerekana baraswe amagogoro abwo abwo buna enchera yokobeka asikari chinguri chiogogokorera bobe baria bakorobererekana.

en: Reuters reported the arrest of activist Mwangi over alleged possession of tear gas and ammunition during protests, widely condemned as political intimidation.
guz: Abamanyi amangana ba Reuters mbamanyetie ense igoro yomoegereri Mwangi ase okomebekerera ng'a nabwate ebinto biria bikoraswa korwa erioki amo nechimbunde chingaki chikoroberekana, na kwanga okogoserigwa konga buna okwo kwegesiasa kwoboi abakoroberekana.

en: Times of India highlighted over 300 injuries during youth-led protests, with Gen Z activists criticizing police rigidity and government suppression.
