guz: Ekeombe giokomanyia amangana kia Times of India nkiarogetie igoro yabanto goetania 300 ekero giokorobererekana kwabasae, abwo abaegereri ba Gen Z abwo bwaatorete amamocho abasikari neserikari ase okwanga goonchoreria na kobwatia amachiko erio okomiga baria baroche nga esikari mbobe ere.

en: The Guardian covered the arrest of a constable linked to a political blogger’s death in custody, seen as a rare step toward accountability.
guz: Abariki amang'ana ba The Guardian mbarigete igoro yokobwatwa kwomosikari oyio otumegete gesiasa na komobwata kwomoriki amangana bwetenenerete oyio okerete eseri ya polisi buna enchera eyemo ekworokia buna abasikari babweneret goajibika.

en: AP News reported police use of tear gas on activists protesting a custodial death, reigniting public demands for justice and transparency.
guz: Amang'ana amayia yabasikari boborai (AP) namanyetie buna abasikari barasete ebinto biraia bigokrwa erioki ase gochia ase abaegereri baria bare koroberekana ogori yomoegereri gokwera eseri ya porisi, na gosegeta abanainchi godai ekeene na obomaiso marore ase ayio.

en: Reuters confirmed the arrest of Constable Mukhwana over the death of blogger Albert Ojwang, marking a rare formal charge amid unrest.
guz: Abarimi amang'ana ba Reuters mbaenegetie okobwatwa kwomosikari Mukhwana igoro yamakweri yomoriki amangana bwogwetenenera Albert Ojwang, eke nigo kiabete egento getanyagokoreka rinde, na konyorwa nare nekina giokoiraneria nonya chuburaburu chiareo.

en: The Guardian reported Constable James Mukhwana as the first officer arraigned over the custodial death case, signaling increased scrutiny of police conduct.
guz: Abariki amang'ana ba The Guardian mbamanyetie nga omosikari James Mukhwana buna omosikari omotangani gosoerwa igoro yomonto gokwera maboko aye ekero are eseri ya porisi, egekoro gekworokia ng'a abasikari mbarigereirie buna bagokora emeremo yabo.

en: Missing Voices documented a sharp rise in enforced disappearances and killings linked to protests, urging justice for families of missing victims.
guz: Ekeombe kia Missing Voices mbarigete igoro yokomenteka kwabanto gosira gose gokenganigwa, and goitwa ase engencho yokorobererekana kwanga oborai obobe, na gosaba ng'a ekeeneo gekoreke ase abanto bakenganirie gose kobiswa ase engencho yokorobererekana.

en: Washington Post highlighted unresolved disappearances tied to protest crackdowns, intensifying calls for investigative transparency.
guz: Abarai ba Washington Post mbaboretie igoro yabanto basira gose gokenganigwa ase engencho yokomiga baria bokorobererekana, eye yarangeirie okoboria ng'a obotuki bobe maiso marore.

en: Reuters reported police firing on protesters blocking roads on Saba Saba Day, causing injuries as authorities enforced lockdown measures.
guz: Abariki amang'ana ba Reuters mbarigetw ng'a abasikari korasa abarorobererekani, gosieka chipara ekero gia Saba Saba Day, koumisa abanto ekiagera absrai batebete ebe bo.

en: Al Jazeera reported at least eleven protesters killed during Saba Saba Day demonstrations, citing police use of live ammunition.
guz: Abariki amang'ana na Al Jazeera mbarigete ng'a goika ange abanto 11 barenge ase okorobererekana mbaitetwe ekero kierituko ria Saba Saba, na fgoteba ng'a abasikari mbarasete amasasi.

en: WSWS detailed mass mobilizations following a blogger’s custodial death, marked by tear gas, water cannons, arrests, and teacher solidarity strikes.
guz: Ekeombe ekene giense getenenerete oboitoni bwegesiasa, na buna omoganda omonene ogotenenerwa goetera obokoreri beintaneti (WSWS) nkiarigete ase oboikeranu buna abanto barangereretani ekero omoriki amangana bwogwetenenera akwete ase amabko abasikari, abatekaine nokorasa ebinto bierioko, amache abwate easidi, okobwatwa, na abarimi buna bagirete egasi ase kwogokwa kwoyomwabo.

en: Reuters captured escalating violence in Nairobi protests, including burning vehicles amid outrage over a blogger’s death in custody.
guz: Abariki amangana ba Reuters mbabwatete buna eburaburu yarenge aaria Nairobi, na gosamba chirori ase obororo bwogokwa kwomoriki amangana bwogwetenenera ase eseri ya porisi.

en: Reuters reported charges against activist Boniface Mwangi for alleged possession of tear gas and ammunition, raising concerns over politicized enforcement.
guz: Abariki amangana ba Reuters mbamanyetie igoro mamamocho nogosoerwa kwomoegereri Boniface Mwangi nga nabwate ebinto biria bigwateka biarusia erioki nechimbunde mamincha nerichiko, eri riaretire obwoba buna siasa yatumekire kobuna amachiko.

en: AP News covered Mwangi’s release on bail and rights groups’ criticism of terrorism charge misuse during protests.
guz: Managana amayia yabasikari boborai (AP) nyarigete igoo yokobwatokwa kwa Mwangi ase ogotenenerwa nebiombe biokoegerera ebio biangete okobekererwa kwobosaria bwobokegago bwokoruta chipomu ekero bakorobererekana.

en: Local media reported calls for prosecution of officers accused of excessive force during Gen Z protests, urging IPOA and ODPP action.
guz: Chisiteseni chai aiga inka chiokomnyia amang'ana nchiatebete konyora chisimi chikogosereri kobabwata na kopbasoera ase ogotangasa abasikari baria basoeretwe gotumia chinguru goetania ekero giokorobererekana chingaki chia Gen Z, na bakarigia ogokonya korwa IPOA na ODPP.

en: An academic analysis linked protest-related abuses to systemic police impunity rooted in historical failures of accountability.
guz: Amasomo yokongori igoro yabasikari kobuna amahiko ekero giokorobererekana kobwataine nagotakorerwa ekero kwamochire ase obokoreri bwabasikari bwairire emeri ase eiaka emenge yogotakorerwa kende ekero bamochire.

en: A quantitative summary outlined protest timelines, injuries, deaths, arrests, and legislative outcomes to contextualize state response.
guz: Amangana amanene arikire ase obwenge naorogetie chinsa, buna abanto baumiete, abkwete, ababwatetwe, na ekere kiabete kworokereria buna eserikari egokora emeremo yaye.

en: An encyclopedic overview documented causes, fatalities, economic triggers, and arrest numbers from the 2025 protests.
guz: Amangana ase oboamo arigetwe naorogetie ekiaretete, omkoumia kwabanto, okomigwa kiuchumi kebogoko buna egesegeto, na enamba ya baria babwatetwe ekero giokoroberereka kwa 2025.

en: Missing Voices published a registry of killings and disappearances among youth during Gen Z protests, calling for formal investigations.
guz: Abariki amang'ana ba Missing Voices mbarigete buna abasae bare goitwa, gokenganigwa gose kobiswa ekero giokorobererekana kwa Gen Z, na koboria ng'a obotuki bwakeene bokorwe.

en: A civic observance commemorated Saba Saba protest victims, spotlighting grievances over unresolved police brutality cases.
guz: Rituko riokoinyoro ogokwa kwa baria bare korobererekana ria Saba Saba, mabaorogotie ogotaisaneka igoro yobororo bwamanag'ana atarakwanerwa neserikari igoro buna abasikari batari gokora emeremo yabo koreng'ana namachiko ase abakorobererekana.

en: AP featured families of protest victims expressing grief, frustration with impunity, and demands for justice and oversight reforms.
guz: Abasikari boborai (AP)mbaorogetie buna chifamiri chia baria barenge ase emechando yogosiria abamwabo, na buna abasikari bakobuna amachiko batari okorerwa kende, na gosaba nga ekeene gekoreke na ogoonchoreria kwa amachiko arengete obokoreri bwa abasikari.

en: Human Rights Watch released video analyses showing police use of live rounds, teargas, arbitrary arrests, and command-authorized force.
guz: Ekeombe keria gekomongera oboronge bwa mwanyabanto nkiarwete esinema ekworokia buna abasikari bare korasa chimbunde, koruta ebinto biria bikorusia erioki, kobwata abanto bosaigo, negetengo kiabasikari inse yamachiko korwa abanene babo korasa chimbunde.

en: BBC aired evidence of coordinated brutality during Gen Z protests, identifying officers and urging prosecution of responsible commanders.
guz: Abamanyi amang'ana ba BBC mbagegete ase embeo obosaiti buna abasikari bare korasa abanto, gotumi chinguru goetania ekero giokorobererekana kwa abasae Gen Z, goteba abasikari bare gokora ayio na gosaba ng'a abanene ba abasikari baria bare korwa amachiko ng'a barase abanto basoerwe.

en: United Nations urged Kenya to respect human rights during protests and called for independent investigations into killings and disappearances.
guz: Obomo bwense (UN) mbwasabete Kenya gosika oboronge bwamwanyanto chingaki chiokorobererekana naboigo kobori ng'a obotuki bwetenererete bokorwe igoro yogoitwa kwabanto na gosira kwa abanto batamanyiri ase bare.

en: U.S. Embassy warned citizens of risks during ongoing protests, advising avoidance of demonstration areas due to potential violence.
guz: Obobarosi bwa america aiga Kenya (U.S. Embassy) mbakurerete abakenya kwerenda chingaki okorobererekana kwagendererete, na korwa ogosemia abanto gotaika ang'e ase okorobererekana kore ase obwoba bwobotindi boreo.

en: Media oversight body condemned arrests and assaults on journalists covering protests, calling for an independent inquiry into press violations.
guz: Abariki amang'ana ba Media oversight body mbatebete koba bobe okobwatwa na ogoakwa kwabariki amang'ana bare korika na kobwata buna okorobererekana kware gokorwa, na koboria nga obokongori bwabeene bokorwe komnya ninki kiagerete abariki amanga bare gosaganerwa.

en: Katiba Institute reported constitutional rights violations during protests and urged judicial safeguards and rights-based policing.
guz: Ekeombe gia Katiba Institute nkiamanyetie buna okobunwa kwa amachiko nabasikari kware gokorwa kwegosa gotaiyo chingaki chiokorobererekana na gosaba bororo ng'a amachiko atumeke korenda abakorobererekana buna oboronge bwabo.

en: JLTM NGO documented over 500 protest-related arrests, urging release of minors and access to legal representation.
guz: JLTM NGO mbarigete goetania abanto500 abarobererekani babwatetwe, na kobori ng'a babwatokwe ara rimo na mono abana abake na baegwe oborongo bwokoegererwa kemachiko.

en: Kenya Red Cross provided data on protest-related injuries and EMS response, urging improved pre-positioning of medical resources.
guz: Ekeombe kiomoslaba omobaririri nkiarwete enamba ya baria baumiete ekero giokorobererekana na buna abanyagitari bemebasekano gokonya (EMS), na gosaba ng'a okobwekwa kwebinto biobonyagitari chinsemo chionsi chiokorobererekana bibeo.

en: Law Society demanded accountability for commanders behind protest suppression tactics, calling for prosecutions including chain-of-command responsibility.
guz: Ekeombe kia amachiko (Law Society) nkiaboretie ng'a abanene babasikari baria bare korwa amachiko chingaki chiokorobererekana babogorerigwe ebitambokero, na gosaba ng'a abanene babasikari amo na baria baete richiko kobuna amachiko basoerwe.

en: A youth movement organized a peaceful march demanding justice for protest victims and reforms to use-of-force protocols.
guz: Obomo bwa'basae mwatwarete okorobererekana kwomorembe omotienyi 3 koboria ekeene igoro ya baria baumisetwe nabasikari amo nogoonchoreria kwamachiko igoro yekerengo giechinguru abasikari babwenerete gotumia.

en: Social media artists released protest-themed music amplifying survivors’ stories and urging public demand for police reform.
guz: Ebiombo biokomanyia amang'ana goetera chingero mbasogetie chingero chikorwa omogano bwa baria barasetwe nabasikari gosegeta abanainchi gosaba oboonchoreria ase amachiko abasikari.

en: Young influencers produced real-time video series documenting protest injuries and brutality to raise awareness and counter state narratives.
guz: Abasae abasegeti amaonchorerio mbarosetie esinema yechingaki chiokorobererekana na kworokia buna abarobererekani baumiete, na buna abasikari bare gotumia richiko goetania erio komanyia abanto buna enchera eyemo yokworokereria buna eserikari egotumia amachiko bobe.

en: Civil society coalitions opened legal clinics offering free representation to families of protest casualties and detainees.
guz: Obomo bwa (Civil society Coalitions) mbaigorete ebituo bikorwa obokonyi bwakemachiko bosa goetera kobatenere abarobererekani kotini buna abanogeri babo rase abamwabo baria basiretie abamwabo gose koumia na baria babegetwe echera gotaiwa kotini.

en: A trauma-support hotline staffed by psychologists was launched to assist survivors and witnesses of protest violence.
guz: Egetuo kiogokonya abachandeku bebirengererio kiabetwe abanyagitari ba bosa goetra enamba yesimi nkiaansetwe lgokonya abwo nabasaiti babo.

en: Civil society organized silent vigils in Nairobi to honor protest victims and call for justice across diverse communities.
guz: Omoroberio bwobomo bwebiombe bitari bieserikari okaroberia ogekengano aaria Nairobi koinyora baria baria bakwete na gokorerwa bobe na koboria ng'a ekeene ase abarobererekani gokoreke ase abanto bonsi Kenya engima.

en: A civic-tech initiative published live maps of protest zones, police deployments, and safe routes to enhance demonstrator safety.
guz: Omoroberio bwogotumia eintaneti oansirwe okworokia aase okorobererekana kware gokoreka Kenya engima, buna abasikari batometwe, nechinchera chiokominchoreria ase ogokonya abarobererekani.

en: An exhibition showcased photographic evidence of protest brutality and mass gatherings, documenting state response to civic unrest.
guz: Chipicha chianantetigwe kera aase nchiaenegetie buna abasikari bare gotumia chinguru goetania ase bria bare korobererekana na baria bare konyorwa amo ase obonge, nchiarogetie buna eserikari yaineretie igoro yokogechigwa kwa abainainchi ase obogambi obobe.

en: Academic forums examined youth trauma, state violence, and pathways to justice arising from protest repression.
guz: Okoumerana kwabasomi korigia ekerengo abasae baumiete kebirengererio nobongo, buna obogambi bogotumua chinguru koumisa abanainchi, amo nenchira chireo korigia obokonyi bwekemachiko ase okomiga abakorobererekana.

en: A rights group compiled a verified injury registry with photos and medical data to support accountability and prosecution efforts.
guz: Ekeombe kioboronge nkiabegete amo eripoti engikeranu igoro ya baria baumiete amo nechibicha neripoti ya nyagitari yabwate amarieta baria baumiete gosira emeroberio yokobabogoreria egatambokero na kobasoera.

en: Workshops trained young journalists in ethical verification, safe documentation, and protective practices during protest reporting.
guz: Abariki amangana mbasometigigwe buna bakomanya oboikeranu bwamangana, korenda obobisi bwa baria bonsi bausikanete, na buna bakwerenda chingaki bare ase emeremo yabo yokorika amangana ekero giokorobererekana.

en: Editorial commentary advocated reforms to the Public Order Act to safeguard peaceful assembly and curb excessive force.
guz: Amanga ya abange buna barwete ebirengererio biabo gosegeta oboonchoreria ase richiko ritenenerete buna abanto baukoumerana ase obonge na korobererekana erio korenda ogocha amo nokorobererekana kwomorembe igo gotanga abasikari gotumia chinguru chinyinge.

en: Interior CS announced reinforced security deployments and intelligence operations to address terrorism threats along Kenya’s borders.
guz: Omominisita bwoborendi bwa ime namanyetie igoro yokomentwa kwe'namba yabasikari nobotuki erio koba maiso korwa obokebago bwogoaka chipomu ase chimbebe chia Kenya.

en: Government launched the Jasiri Fund to support reintegration of former extremists through psychosocial care and business training.
guz: Eserikari yaansete ekegancha gia Jasiri Fund gosire okoirana kwa baria konye basiriigwe ebirengererio gochia obokebago bwogoaka chipomu goetera obosemia, nobobobwenia bwebirengererio nobongo amo nechisemi chioboonchoreria.

en: Community leaders in Garissa received training on early radicalization indicators and reporting procedures under PCVE programs.
guz: Abarai bebinyoro aaria Garissa mbanyorete amasomo agenkio buna baranyare korora na komanya ebokoro biogosarigwa ebirengererio na engencho yokomanyia abasikari inse yemeroberio yobokoreri bori botenererete gotanga and korwania okwegena gose ebikoro biomonto gose abanto kwegena gotumia obosareku goikera amaganio abo (PCVE).

en: Kenya and the U.S. signed a partnership to strengthen border surveillance, intelligence sharing, and law-enforcement training.
guz: Kenya amo neserikari ya America baigwanire kobwaterana erio gokong'ia obomongeri bwechinsinyo chiato, koererania obutuki, na amasomo buna amachiko agokora emeremo.

en: NCTC partnered with NGOs to educate youth on digital extremist threats and strategies to resist online radicalization.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene gekorwania obokebago bwokoruta chipomu (NCTC) nkiabwatanete NGOs gosomia abasae igoro gosarigwa ebirengererio goetera chinchera chiegedichitari amo nechira kwanga ogosarigwa ebirengererio goetera eintaneti and.

en: NCTC unveiled the “Jasiri Observatory” public portal to help communities identify and counter extremist ideologies.
guz: keombe keria ekenene gekorwania obokebago bwokoruta chipomu (NCTC) ngiaasioria omoroberio “Jasiri Observatory” eyio ere eintaneti yabainchi gokonya ebinyoro komanya na gotanga amasomo yogosaria abanto ebirengererio.

en: County-level forums were convened nationwide to review and update Kenya’s National Strategy to Prevent and Counter Violent Extremism.
guz: Emesangerekano yechkaonti yakoretwe kenya engima korigereria keboyia erio gokongia oborendi ase ogotanga uobokebago bwogotumia chinguru.

en: Government launched a revised national CVE strategy emphasizing technology integration and youth-focused interventions.
guz: Eserikari yarure omoroberio omoyia bwense na omoikeranu gotanga na korwania obokebago bwogotumia chinguru (CVE) ogosegeta kobwatania etikinorochi amo nemeroberio erengete abasae.

en: NCTC conducted training for county officials on raising public awareness and preventing radicalization.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene gekorwania obokebago bwokoruta chipomu (NCTC) ngiasometie abarai bechikaonti buna baramanyie abanto babo buna baranyare gotanga amasomo ogsaria abanto ebirengererio.

en: A multi-agency program enhanced ATPU officers’ capacity in ideological awareness and counterterror response.
guz: Oboamo bweitengo ao ao bieserikari mbwakongetie chinuru chiekeombe keria kiabasikari gekorwania gotanga obokebago bwokoruta chipomu (ATPU) korora na komanya buna kogosaria ebirengererio nokomenya amo.

en: NCTC and OAB (IOM-Japan) coordinated a community policing initiative in Lamu to strengthen early-warning and reporting systems.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene gekorwania obokebago bwokoruta chipomu (NCTC) na ofisi yomonene bwamachiko (OAB) goetera (IOM-Japan) bakabwaterania ase omoroberio bwoborendi bwebinyoro aaria Lamu gokongia komanya bwango na korwa eripoti.

en: An MoU was signed to integrate gender equality into national PCVE structures and empower women in terrorism-prevention roles.
guz: Okoigwanana nkwabegetwe egechara kobwatana amo oboreng'ananu bwabanto gochia ase omoroberio bweserikari bwogotanga na korwania obokegab bwogogosria ebirengererio (PCVE) gosomia na na kobaa ebire bineirie erio babe abakoreri bengencho gotanga komanya na gotanga obokebago bwokoruta chipomu.

en: Mining Department and NCTC jointly trained stakeholders on safe handling of commercial explosives to mitigate terror risks.
guz: Eminisiti yokorema  amadini na keombe keria getenenerete gotanga na korwania obokebago bwokoruta chipomu (NCTC) ase oboama baegeirie abasangi buna babwenerete kogacha, kobirenda kobibogoria na kobitumia buna enchera eyemo yogotanga ogosaganwa korwa isiko.

en: KDF and NCTC held a community engagement initiative in Lamu to build resilience against extremism and inter-communal tension.
guz: Ekeombe kioborendi bwa Kenya (KDF) na Ekeombe keria ekenene gekorwania obokebago bwokoruta chipomu (NCTC)mbabete nomoroberio nokoumerana nebionyoro aaria Lamu erio gikinana nogosarigwa ebirengererio na neminano yebinyoro.

en: NCTC facilitated training in Kakamega to help security personnel counter youth radicalization and emerging extremist tactics.
guz: NCTC facilitated training in Kakamega to help security personnel counter youth radicalization and emerging extremist tactics.

en: NCTC launched a sub-county engagement forum in Nyeri to enhance resilience, public reporting, and localized action plans.
guz: NCTC launched a sub-county engagement forum in Nyeri to enhance resilience, public reporting, and localized action plans.

en: NCTC highlighted socio-economic vulnerabilities—poverty and marginalization—as drivers of youth susceptibility to extremist recruitment.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene gekorwania obokebago bwokoruta chipomu (NCTC) nkiarogetie buna obogengeru bwobogoko nabanto - obotaka nogochaya buna ebinto bigoseta abase gosoa kwenyora abasqangi ase ogosoa ase ebiombe biria bigosaria amongo abo goitaba obokebago.

en: Government sought public input on leveraging AI and technology to detect and prevent self-radicalization trends.
guz: Eserikari nyarigetie ebirengererio korua isiko buna eranyare koreng'anania chisemi chia pandia (AI) na tekinorochia erio komanya na gotanga chinchera abasae bagwesaria ebirengererio barabwo abanyene goetera eintaneti.

en: NCTC led a national dialogue addressing youth vulnerabilities exploited by extremist groups and promoting multi-stakeholder resilience.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene gekorwania obokebago bwokoruta chipomu (NCTC) nkiaraete chinkwana chiense gokwanera buna obogongeru bwabasae bogotumeka nabibago biria bigosaria amongo abo na gosegeta okobwaterana korwa chinsemo ao ao.

en: Government sought public input on using artificial intelligence and new technologies to strengthen prevention of violent extremism and address rising online recruitment risks.
guz: Eserikari nyarigetie amaoni korwa abanainchi igoro yogotumia akiri pandia na tekinorochia enyia gokongia gotanga obokebago bwokoruta chipomu na gokwanera igoro yemechando yogosoigwa goetera eintaneti.

en: Training provided to mining sector stakeholders on safe handling of commercial explosives to reduce misuse by terror groups and prevent smuggling.
guz: Ekwegerigwa kwarurwe ase baria bakorema amadini  na baria bakobwaterana buna bakoiya, kogacha na kobibogoria bakeanie okobitatumia buya na baria abasaria bokoruta chipomu na gotanga oboibi bwebinto ebio.

en: Pilot sub county forum launched to build community trust and improve public reporting as part of the national countering violent extremism strategy.
guz: Emesangerekano ase chikaonti inke yakoretwe korenta obwegenwa ase abanainchi na gokong'ia emeroberio ya abaninchi korwa chiripoti buna ensemo yemoroberio yeserikari gotanga obokebago bwokoruta chipomu.

en: National Counter Terrorism Centre emphasized patriotism and integration of national strategy priorities into county forums to advance prevention efforts.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene gekorwania obokebago bwokoruta chipomu (NCTC) nkiabegete chinguru ringana riobwegenwa bwense yaito na kobwatania emeroberio yense gochia ase ebikaranso biechikaonti erio gokong'ia gotanga obokebago integration of national strategy priorities into county.

en: United Nations facilitated regional training in Nairobi to strengthen gender responsive approaches in counter terrorism and preventing violent extremism.
guz: Ekeombe ekenene giense (UN) nkiaegeretie abarai bechingongo chia Nairobi erio gokwanera obokongu abanto bechingencho ao ao babwate ario gosegeta oboreng'ananu buna enchera eyemo yogotanga obokebago nogosarigwa ebirengererio.

en: National Counter Terrorism Centre rolled out a community based strategy to deter extremism and urged awareness of technology related risks.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene gekorwania obokebago bwokoruta chipomu (NCTC) ngiansete omoroberio bwebinyoro gotanga ogosarigwa ebirengererio na gosaba okomanyigwa igoro yobwoba bwegetekinorochia.

en: National Counter Terrorism Centre launched the Jasiri resilience portal to help communities identify extremist ideologies and promote counter narratives online.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene gekorwania obokebago bwokoruta chipomu (NCTC) yaansete eintaneti ya Jasiri resilience portal gokonya abanainchi komanya amasomo agosari ebirengererio na gosegeta chinkwana chiogotanga gosarigwa ebirengererion goetera eintaneti.

en: Expanded training in Kiambu brought together county officials, youth, media, and civil society to strengthen local prevention networks.
guz: Okogareigwa kwamasomo aaria Kiambu nkwaretete amo barai bechikaonti, abasae, abariki amang'ana, amo nebiombe bitari bweserikari (NGOs) samo gokong'ia oborai bwebinyoro gotanga obokebago.

en: Ongoing training in Kakamega supports security personnel in staying ahead of evolving violent extremism tactics affecting youth.
guz: Okwegererigwa gwakogenderera aari Kakamega gwakonyire abarendi borendi gotigara maiso igoro yechiburaburu chiogosaria abasae ebirengererio chiakegeire koba.

en: Public invited to contribute to development of artificial intelligence tools for detecting self radicalization and improving prevention strategies.
guz: Abanainchi baariganiigwe gochia korosia ebokoreri bi'akiri pandia bikomanyia omonto buna asriigwe eberengererio na komenta chinchera omonto aranyare kwerenda.

en: Kenya and Indonesia held a Nairobi–Mombasa workshop to share community based approaches and draft a memorandum of understanding on PCVE collaboration.
guz: Kenya na Indonesia mbabete negeikaranso kia Nairobi – Mombasa gosanga buna ebinyoro biranyare korika amang'ana okoigwanana gose kobwatana igoro yogotanga ogosarigwa ebirengererion gwancha obokebago bwogotumia chinguru (PCVE) ase oboamo.

en: National Counter Terrorism Centre organized a five day workshop to contextualize a national manual on gender mainstreaming in counter terrorism.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene gekorwania obokebago bwokoruta chipomu (NCTC) nkiaroberetie ogasanga amo kwegera komanya egetabu gekworokia buna okobwaterana na banto bechingencho ao ao nobomanyi bwabo erakonye korwania obokebago bwokoruta chipomu.

en: National Counter Terrorism Centre helped develop social media monitoring systems to detect hate speech and radical ideologies while protecting freedom of expression.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene gekorwania obokebago bwokoruta chipomu (NCTC) ngiakonyete korosia chinchera abariki amangana baranyare komongera, koigwa na komanya amangana, chinkwana gose ebiorokererio biokogosereria, gochegia, gose gosegeta ogochaya abande egekogera eki bare, na chisemi chiogosaria ebirengererio ase okwebisa ime yerichiko riobosibore bwogokwana.

en: Five day regional training focused on disengagement, de radicalization, and reintegration for security personnel across East Africa.
guz: Amatuko atano yechingongo kwegera igoro yokwerusia gose gotiga amangana ogosaria ebirengererio na koirana gati yabarendi boborendi Kenya, yuganda na Tanzania (Afrika ya Mocha engima).

en: National Counter Terrorism Centre worked with the Ministry of Basic Education to train teachers on identifying and mitigating radicalization risks in schools.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene gekorwania obokebago bwokoruta chipomu (NCTC) kegakora emeremo amo neminisitiri yechisemi chioboroso gosomia abarimu buna bakomanya na gotanga obobe bwiogosarigwa ebirengererio chisukuru.

en: One hundred forty eight park officers trained to strengthen early detection of terror related threats around major tourism areas.
guz: Obaofisa emia eyemo na merongo ene na batana na batato boborendi aaria ase chingiti chiorosana kirorerwa mbasometigwe gokongia obokoreri bwabo buna bakomongera na komanya ebokoru biobokebago bwokoruta chipomu chinsemo chiabo.

en: Youth beneficiaries in Lamu received entrepreneurship kits and awareness training on preventing violent extremism as part of reintegration efforts.
guz: Abasae aaria Lamu mbasometigwe na koegwa ebinto kobakonya gochaka ebiasra buna enchera eyemo yogotanga ogosarigwa ebirengererio gosoa obokebago bwokoruta chipomu na koiranigwa inka.

en: Media Council of Kenya urged journalists to report violent extremism responsibly with emphasis on fact checking and ethical coverage to avoid amplifying radical narratives.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene getenenerete oboriki bwamang'ana ngiasabete abariki amangana korika na komanyia ense igiroro yobokebago bwogosaria ebirengererio ase enchera engikaranu gose yobomaene gokonya gotanga ogosarera kwobosaria bweberengererio.

en: County public forums in Nairobi reviewed the updated National Strategy to Prevent and Counter Violent Extremism focusing on gender, youth, and technology.
guz: Omosngerekano obonsi aaria Nairobi norigereretie keboyia emeroberio yaye na korwa omoroberio omoyia igoro yogotanga na korwania obokebago bwogosaria ebirengererio kwarengete abanto bechingencho chionsi, na mono abasae na tekinorochi erio gokora obokebago obwo.

en: National Counter Terrorism Centre invited public contributions for artificial intelligence solutions to counter online radicalization and self recruitment.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene gekorwania obokebago bwokoruta chipomu (NCTC) nkiaariganetie ebirengererio korwa abanainchi korigia amachibu igoro yechisemi chia pandia buna enchera eyemo yokorwania obokebago bwogosaria ebirengererio goetra eintaneti na na kwerika barabwo abanyene gochia ase obosaria obwo.

en: Community policing campaign in Lamu engaged youth, elders, and security agencies to strengthen early warning and reporting systems.
guz: Oborendi bwebinyoro aaria Lamu mbabete nechinkwana chiogosegeta abasae, abakwani bebinyoro, neserikari buna bagokong'ia obomongeri komanya bwango ebikoru biobosaria na komanyia abarendi kegima.

en: National rollout of the prison based CVE awareness program reached over thirty thousand officers through national and international partnerships.
guz: Omoroberio omonene bwabasikari bechera noansete komanyia buna chinchera chiogotanga obokebago bwogosaria ebirengererio oyio oikerete goetania abaofisa chilifu 30,000 goetera okobwaterana Kenya ase okobwaterana nense engima.

en: Journalists from multiple counties trained on responsible reporting of violent extremism to prevent sensationalism and reduce harm.
guz: Abariki amangana korwa chinse ao ao mbaegeretie igoro yokorika na komanyia goetra amangana ase enchera engikeranu igoro yogosarigwa ebirengererio buna enchera eyemo yogotanga ogosarigwa obongo amangana echinkuma, okogosia gose okongainereria erio gotanga ogosareka kwa'bange.

en: County level action plan launched in Baringo to address extremist recruitment in schools and religious institutions through community engagement.
guz: Emeroberio yechikaonti gokwanera igoro yogosarigwa amongo nagosoigwa obokebago ase chisukuru gose chikanisa bemesikiti noansetwe aaria Baringo goetera chinkwana nabanyabinyoro.

en: Security Sector Counter Violent Extremism partners held public forums in Mapenya and Mkunumbi to build resilience and counter extremist messaging.
guz: Ensemo yoborendi ase okobwaterana korwana nobokebago bwogosaria amongo koba ekabago gikoruta chipomu mbagete nechinkwana nabanainchi aaria Mapenya na Mkunumbi kobaa chinguru gotenena na korwania obokebago bwogosaria amongo goetera ogotoma amang'ana ameng'e esimi.

en: Training delivered to Anti Terrorism Police Unit officers to strengthen ideological awareness and operational skills under the national CVE framework.
guz: Amasomo arwetwe ase abasikari bari batenererete gotanga ogwateka gwechipomu gokongia chinhera chikomanya ebirengererio biogosari obongo na buna oranyare gotanga ayio goetera amachiko yokorwania gotanga gosarigwa obongo.

en: County security engagement forums enhanced collaboration between communities and security agencies for early warning in high risk areas of Lamu.
guz: Okobwaterana ase aborendi bechikaonti ngwakongetie oboererania gati yebinyoro nabarendi boborendi komanya bwango ebiorokererio bwobokebago bwokoruta chipomu chinsemo chiria chiregire nobokebago aaria Lamu.

en: United Nations launched a youth engagement and empowerment program to train young leaders on policy, advocacy, and preventing violent extremism.
guz: Onomo bwechinse (UN) mbwachagete omoroberio bwogokwanerana nabasae na kobabeka chinguru ase okwegeria abarai ba abasae igiro yamachiko, amasomo igor yebinto bibweneretye goonchoreria, na gotanga ogosarigwa obongo koba ekebago.

en: Over thirty thousand Kenya Prison Service staff received training on detecting and mitigating violent extremism within correctional facilities.
guz: Goetania abasikari 30,000 bechera mbanyorete amasomo buna bakiomanya na gotanga ogosarigwa obongo koba ekebago giokoruta chipomu ime ase chichera.

en: Regional training of trainers workshop in Nairobi promoted gender sensitive counter terrorism policies across East Africa.
guz: Okwegerigwa kwa abarai bechingongo buan abegeria abande aaria Nairobi nosegetete engencho yokorenta amo abanto bechingencho chionsi buna enchera eyemo yokorwania gotanga koruta chipomu orgongo rwa Afrika ya Mocha engima (East Africa).

en: Learning event in coastal counties brought religious leaders and civil society together to strengthen local prevention efforts.
guz: Emesangerekano yogosoma aaria chikaonti chire mbarabare nechinyancha marete amo abarai bechidini amo nebiombe biria bitari bieserikari (NGOs) goikerania okobwaterana nabarai korwa inse.

en: Advisory notes high likelihood of terrorist attacks targeting public areas and urges awareness and adherence to security guidance.
guz: Abasemia baorokirie okonyarekana goakwa chipomu chirengete aba abanto bare na igo gosaba abanto komanyigwa berende na kobwatia amachiko oborendi.

en: United States advisory urges increased caution due to terrorism and kidnapping risks and recommends reviewing personal security plans.
guz: Abasemia ba America koba maisi enchera ya igoro mono igoro igoro yobokebago nokobwatwa na gotamigwa kwa'banto na gosaba nga amachiko oborendi arigererigwe keboyia.

en: Counties along the Somalia border face heightened terrorism threats and essential travel only is advised.
guz: Chikaonti chiruia chibebekanete na Somalia chire ase obwoba bogoakwa chipomu ase igo gababwa ng'a bkeanie chisafari chiabo.

en: Security tightened in Lamu following recent attacks and travelers are urged to remain vigilant and avoid certain road routes.
guz: Oborendi bwabekirwe boisaine aaria Lamu ase engencho yogoakwa chipomu bwango iga, ase ayio na abanto bare ase chifari chiabo baboriigwe koba maiso ase ogotaetera chinchera chiria chiregire.

en: United Kingdom advisory urges alertness in hotels, malls, and transport hubs and encourages use of counter terrorism guidance.
guz: Abasemia ba United Kingdom basabire abanyene bechinyoma chiokoragera na korara, chiduka chinene chikoonia ebinto ao ao, amo naase chirori chikorinerwa erio koba maiso na kobwatia amachiko ogotanga obokebago.

en: DusitD2 attack underscores importance of knowing emergency exits and procedures in hotels and office buildings.
guz: Ogoakwa epomu gwa DusitD2 nogokurera ng'a komanya bwango na gotanga obokebago nechinchera chiokominchoreria nemeroberio yonsi ase chinyomba chiokoragerera nechiofisi eikaranigwe.

en: Advisories recommend avoiding large gatherings and taking caution during religious and cultural events due to elevated risks.
guz: Obosemia obwo nigo bokomanyia ng'a bonsi baria bare ase emesangerekano yabanto abange buna chikanisa nemesikiti na emesangerekano ende yonsi babe maiso ekiagera yogoakwa chipomu okwo gokageire koba.

en: National Counter Terrorism Centre promotes the See Something Say Something campaign encouraging prompt reporting of suspicious activity.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene gekorwania obokebago bwokoruta chipomu (NCTC) ngoseta kere ng'a kore omoroberio okorokwa "rora egento - teba gente gete" ogosegeta abanto komanyia abarai bwango amangana gose ebikoru biechitang'utang'u.

en: High threat of kidnapping targeting foreigners in northern and coastal areas and travelers are urged to avoid high risk zones.
guz: Obwoba bwa igoro bwokobwatwa na kobiswa kwabanto korengete abarwa isiko bamenyete aaria Irianyi mbarabare nenyancha na baria bonsi bagotumia chigari ase rogendo baboriigwe gotaika ange nchinsemo echio chiregire nobokebago.

en: Terrorist attacks are more likely during major holidays and the public is urged to maintain heightened awareness and avoid crowded spaces.
guz: Ogoakwa chipomu ngokageire mono chingaki chiemetiko nemeyega emenene igo ogosaba goikarania koba maiso kwarurwe goetra okomanyania na kwebacha korwa omoganda bwabanto abange.

en: Government outlines offenses classified as terrorism under the Prevention of Terrorism Act and urges public awareness of legal obligations.
guz: Eserikari yarure omoroberio ogoatanana igoro yamnamocho yobokebago bwokoruta chipomu inse yamachiko yogotanga obokebago bwokoruta chipomu na gosaba abanto komanya igoro ya ayare obwenerete gokora aye buna omokenya.

en: Kenya hosts regional training to strengthen capacity in combating terrorism financing with participation from experts across Africa.
guz: Kenya yaretire amo okwegerigwa kwa abarai bechingongo gokongia okobua kwabo korwania obokebago bwokoruta chipomu na baria bakorwa chibesa gokora ayio ase ogasanga nabimanyi korwa Afrika engima.

en: Analysis identifies persistent terrorist activity in counties bordering Somalia and urges adherence to safety recommendations.
guz: Obokongori bwaorokirie igoro yokogenderera kwobkebago bwokuruta chipomu ase chikaonti chiria chibebekaine na Somalia na gosaba ng'a okobwatia amachiko oborendi buna ring'ana riengencho.

en: Interior Cabinet Secretary reaffirms commitment to prosecuting acts that qualify as terrorism including destruction of property and threats to public services.
guz: Omominisita bwoborendi bwa ime oenekirie okwerwa gweserikari gosera na kogambia ebikorwa bigosegeta obokebago amo nogari chinibo na korenta obwoba ase obokoreri bwa'banto.

en: United Kingdom advisory urges continued vigilance due to unpredictable threats in public places, hotels, and religious sites.
guz: Obosemia korwa United Kingdom bwasabire omongeri bwakogenderera ase engencho yogotamanyereria ekero ebibago birarute chipomu ase abanto, chinyomba chiokoragera, naase gosabera.

en: National Assembly strengthens laws to detect and prevent terrorism financing and improve transparency across financial systems.
guz: Bunge yakong'irie laws yokomanya na gotanga obokebago bwokoruta chipomu n baria bakobaa chibesa gokora ayio naboigo koba maiso marore buna chibesa chigoeta anaboko abanto.

en: Kenya and the United Kingdom opened a modern Anti Terrorism Police Unit headquarters in Mombasa to enhance coastal security capacity.
guz: Kenya amo na United Kingdom Bigoire polisi enyia buna oboikaranso bwaye obonene aaria Mombasa etenerete gotanga obokebago bwokoruta chipomu gokong'ia oborendi boetanaine enyancha.

en: Canada advises high vigilance across Kenya due to ongoing extremist threats and warns against large gatherings.
guz: Canada yarure obosemia koba maiso Kenya engima ase engencho ykogosia okwo kogendererete jkwogoakwa chipomu na gosaba nga abanto tibaba ase emesagerekano ybanto abange amo.

en: Kenya introduced legislation regulating virtual asset service providers to reduce money laundering and terrorism financing risks.
guz: Kenya yaansire amachiko goyotanga baria bagotoma chibesa goetera eintaneti bakeanie oborosia bwechibesa pandia gosegeta obokebago ase akobaa chibesa echio.

en: United Nations and Kenyan agencies co hosted workshops to help local officials and communities address incitement and prevent extremism.
guz: United Nations amo na Kenyan nebitengo biaye mbaraete omosangerekano barai ba inse nebinyoro biabo gotanga obosegeti korwania obokebago bwogosaria obongo.

en: The National Counter Terrorism Centre and Operation Amani Boni conducted community workshops in Lamu County that focused on awareness, intelligence sharing, and resilience building.
guz: Emeroberio yekeombe keria ekenene gekorwania obokebago bwokoruta chipomu (NCTC) orogetwe "Amani Boni" nokorete emesangererekano aaria ekaonti ya Lamu yamoregete omokanyia abanto, koererania amang'ana obotuki, na kobakong'ia.

en: Kenya, Indonesia, and the Netherlands held a joint knowledge sharing program to improve strategies for preventing and countering violent extremism.
guz: Kenya, Indonesia, amo na Netherlands mbabete nogocha amo koererania oboinga'ini nechisemi gokong'ia emeroberio gotanga na korwania obokebago bwogosaria obongo.

en: The ODPP issued guidance explaining Kenya’s legal definition of terrorism under the Prevention of Terrorism Act.
guz: Omorai omonene bwobosoi ebina (ODPP) narwete oborai bware bogeteba igoro ya Kenya buna okomanya kwabo igoro yobokebago bwokoruta chipomu inse yerichiko riogotanga obokebago.

en: The Interior Minister restated the zero tolerance stance toward acts classified as terrorism and emphasized justice and public protection.
guz: Omominisita bwoborendi bwa ime nairanetie richiko ritari gwanchereria amamocho a'Kenya igoro yobokebago bwokoruta chipomu ase engencho yokorenda ekeene noborendi bwa Kenya.

en: Reports show continued Al Shabaab activity near the Somalia border and call for sustained vigilance.
guz: Chiripoti nkwrokia chire buna ebikoru bia Al Shabaab ang'e nechimbebe chia Somalia igo koboria koba maiso chingaki chionsi.

en: Parliament is reviewing amendments to strengthen oversight and enforcement against terrorism financing.
guz: Bunge negendererete korigereria amaonchorerio gokong'ia obomongeria nechinguru igoro yokoa ebibago bwokoruta chibesa.

en: The National Counter Terrorism Centre continues public alerts urging vigilance and reporting of suspicious activity.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene gekorwania obokebago bwokoruta chipomu (NCTC) nkegendererete korwa ogokurerwa na korwa amang'ana igoro yebikoru biechitang'utang'u gochia ase abarai.

en: UNODC and the National Counter Terrorism Centre are training officials to improve detection of terrorism financing.
guz: Office enene yense etenerete omariogo nobosaria (UNODC) amo na ekeombe keria ekenene gekorwania obokebago bwokoruta chipomu (NCTC) nkwegeria bare abakori emeremo babo gokongia obomongeria igoro ya baria bakoa ebibago chibesa chigokora obokebago vbwokoruta chipomu.

en: Kenya and the United Kingdom opened a new Anti Terrorism Police Unit facility in Mombasa to strengthen operations.
guz: Kenya nobomo bwa Boraya mbaigorete egetuo kiabasikari kegokinana nobokebago bwokoruta chipomu aaria Mombasa gokongia obokoreri.

en: Critics warn that terrorism related charges applied to protestors must balance security with constitutional rights.
guz: Abmongeria goro yekeene basiemire eserikari ase ogotumia richiko riobokebago bwokoruta chipomu gosoera abakorobererekana koba mamincha nerichiko kobiga abakorobererekana na mamincha yobosibore bwomonto bwerichiko gotara, gosangererekana na gokwanerana.

en: After the 2015 Garissa University attack, authorities increased security and encouraged vigilance in learning institutions.
guz: Ekero eyunifasity ya Garissa yasaganetwe nobokebago bwogoakwa epomu, abarai mbagesete oborendi na gosegeta obomongeria ime yechisukuru.

en: The National Counter Terrorism Centre and the EU expanded campaigns to mobilize Kenyans against violent extremism.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene giokorwania obokebago bwokoruta chipomu (NCTC) amo nobomo bwa'Bongeresa (EU)mbagareetie chinkwana chiabo ase ogosegeta abanto ba Kenya korwania obokebago bwokoruta chipomu.

en: A Kenyan court sentenced two men to thirty years for assisting al Shabaab in the 2019 DusitD2 attack.
guz: Ekoti ya Kenya yanacherete abasacha babere ekina ba kobabeka echera emiaka 30 ase ogokonya ebiibago bia al Shabaab omwaka 2019 bwarogetwe ogoakwa gwa DusitD2.

en: The National Counter Terrorism Centre continues nationwide coordination of security and awareness programs.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene giokorwania obokebago bwokoruta chipomu (NCTC) nkegendererete kobwaterana na koererania emeroberio yobomanyi bwoborendi.

en: The Anti Terrorism Police Unit conducts preparedness training and urges ongoing vigilance.
guz: Abasikari bensemo yokorwania obokebago bwokoruta chipomu ngokora bare okwegeria igoro yokoba maiso na gosaba ng'a abanto batigare koba maiso.

en: The National Counter Terrorism Centre calls for prompt reporting of suspicious activities.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene giokorwania obokebago bwokoruta chipomu (NCTC) kiaboririe nga abanto bagenderere gokenyia ebikoru baroche biechitangutangu.

en: The United Kingdom advises visitors to remain vigilant due to terrorism threats targeting public areas.
guz: Obomo bwa Boraya (United Kingdom) bwasemirwe abare bakobatarera koba maiso ase engencho yobwoba bwobokebago bwokoruta chipomu borengete ase abanto abange bare.

en: A UN workshop brought together multiple sectors to improve strategies for preventing violent extremism.
guz: Obomo bwechinse (UN) mbwaretete amo abanto ao ao korwa eserikari goikerania emeroberio yogotanga obokebago bwogosaria abanto amongo goetera amorokererio amabe.

en: The Financial Action Task Force commended Kenya for expanding efforts to counter terrorism financing.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene gieserikari gekorwania oborosia bwechibesa pandia, koa ebibago biokoruta chipomu chibesa gokora emeremo eyio na nobosaria boonde bwechibesa nkiagete Kenya okoboko ase ogotanga koa ebibago eebio biokoruta chipomu chibesa.

en: Advisories highlight persistent al Shabaab threats and urge high situational awareness.
guz: Abasemia bamanyirie igoro yokonyarekana kwa al Shabaab kogenderera koruta chipomu na gosaba ng'a abanto babe maiso komanya eki barengete.

en: A terrorism threat report outlines activity by al Shabaab and IS and stresses public vigilance.
guz: Erpoti yobokebago igoro yokoruta chipomu yaorogetie ebokoru bia al Shabaab amo nobomo bwaisabanto batigare maiso.

en: The 2025 update to the Prevention of Terrorism Act strengthens Kenya’s capacity to prosecute terrorism.
guz: Okogesa gochia richiko ria omwaka 2025 igoro yogotanga obokebago bwokoruta chipomu ngakongetie chinguru chia Kenya gosoera na kogambia ebibago ebio.

en: UNODC issued training manuals focused on balancing counter terrorism with human rights.
guz: Ekeombe ekenene giense gokorwania amariogo nobosaria (UNODC) nkiaruete ebitabu biogosomia biarengete korenganania okorwania obokebago amo noboronge bwa mwanyabanto.

en: The United Kingdom warns of high terrorism risk in Kenya, especially targeting UK interests.
guz: Obomo bwa Boraya (United Kingdom) bwarure ogokurera igoro yokonyarekana goakwa nebibago bwokoruta chipomu aiga nka Kenya, mono kegima birengete abanto bense yabo abwo bare iaga Kenya nebinto biabo.

en: The IMF highlights Kenya’s new regulations on crypto assets to counter terrorism financing.
guz: Ekeombe giense keria kerendete korora ng'a chibesa chia kera ense mbuya chire ase ogochikonya ekero chikogwa ebirengo gose ense ere namadeni (IMF) nkiaorogetie ng'a Kenya amachiko amayia a Kenya ase okoererania chinibo goetera eintaneti igo chitari goetera ebengi gose eserikari korwa oborai bonde erio gokinana nokoa ebibago chisebesa kogendereria nobokebago bwabo.

en: Authorities warn that extremists may continue targeting critical infrastructure.
guz: Aborai bwarure ogokurerwa ng'a ebibago biogosaria abanto amongo mbirengete goaka ebikoreri ao ao bioborendi biserikari.

en: The UN Office of Counter Terrorism emphasizes collaboration with partners to counter evolving tactics.
guz: Chifisi chiobomo bwechinse (UN) echio chigokinana nobokebago babekire chinguru okobwaterana ase oboamo erio gokinana nechinchera chiobokebago.

en: A UN factsheet outlines rights during counter terrorism operations and stresses oversight.
guz: Egetabu kia obomo bwechinse UN gekworokereria oboronge bwabanto ekero obokebago bokorwanigwa naboigo gekobeka chinguru amangana yobomongera korora nga kera egento buya kegokorwa.

en: An annual analysis reviews terrorism trends and advises residents and travelers on safety.
guz: Okorigereria gwa kera omwaka bunayeboba bikoruta chipomu gwasemirie abamenyi na baria bakogenda chisafari berende.

en: Summary of tactics used in Westgate, Garissa, and Dusit attacks with government guidance on reporting, preparedness, and emergency response.
guz: Obwenge bwa'mangana igoro yechinchera chiatumegete goaka chipomu aaria Westgate, Garissa, na Dusit eserikari yarwete oborai buna abariki amang'ana na komanyia amangana ayio abanto yakoretwe, koba maiso, na ekere kiare gokorwa chingaki echio chiemebasekano.

en: Advisory highlighting increased terrorism threats in the United States and urging vigilance and reporting of suspicious activities.
guz: Ogokurerwa korwa eserikari kwamanyirie abanto igoro yokogeseka kwobokebago bwokoruta chipomu aaria America na koboria ng'a babe maiso na komanyia ase obwango gento kende gionsi bare nechitang'utang'u nakerokio.

en: National campaign encouraging the public to report suspicious activity to prevent terrorism related crimes.
guz: Omoroberio omone bwense ogosegeta abanto komanyia eserikari bokoru binde bionse biechitangutangu erio gotanga bokebago bonde bwonsi bwokoruta chipomu.

en: Public guidance on basic cybersecurity practices to protect against online threats and promote digital safety.
guz: Ogokurera ase abanto bonsi chinchera chinyororo chiokorenda esimi nekombiuta yao erio korenda ng'a esimi gose ekombiuta yao, amangana ao naye omonyene tibinyora nabako amabe yobosaria goetera eintaneti erio gosegeta oborendi goetera egedichitari.

en: Message encouraging citizens to recognize and report suspicious behavior noting that vigilance strengthens community security.
guz: Amangana amenge esimi koa abanainchi emioyo buna bakomanya na korwa eripot igoro yebikoru biechitangutangu bamanyete buya ng'a koba maiso nenchera eyemo yogokongia oborendi bwebinyoro.

en: Advisory urging reporting of suspicious activity in public spaces such as schools, concerts, and sporting events.
guz: Ogokurera korwa eserikari korigetie abanto korwa amang'ana gochia agambi igoro yebikoru biechitang'utang'u aase abanto bakobera buna chisukuru, chinyomba chiokwegokeria, amo nechogosori.

en: Outline of four steps to enhance digital safety and strengthen national security online.
guz: Omoroberio bwebinto bine ebikeranu gokong'ia oborendi bwedichitari na gokong'ia oborendi bwense ase eintaneti.

en: Assessment noting high terrorism threat levels in the United States from domestic and foreign violent extremists.
guz: Okorenga kwa beene nkwaorogetie ase ebirengo bia igoro ng'a okonyarekana kwogoakwa chipomu aaria America korwa ebibago bia ime na korwa isiko.

en: Overview of updated United Kingdom counter terrorism laws including youth diversion and enhanced risk management tools.
guz: Amangana amenge yamachiko akworokia buna Obomo bwa Boraya bokorwania gotanga obokebago bwokoruta chipomu, amo nomoroberio bwogokonya nabasae tibasoa obokebago obwo, boigo na nobosemia bwokobakonya gokinana na nobosareki.

en: Summary of UN counter terrorism strategies focusing on terrorism financing and international threat prevention.
guz: Okorora okweng'e nemeroberio yobomo bwa Boraya (UN) bwogokinana nobokebago bwokoruta chipomu na gotanga baria bakoa ebibago chibesa gokora obokebago bwabo erio gotanga okogoswa korwa isiko.

en: EU guidance on gender responsive and violence prevention measures within the counter terrorism strategy.
guz: Ogochika kwobomo bwa Bongeresa (EU) igoro okogania kwabanto ao ao buna abasacha, abakungu nabande bchingencho ao ao buna enchera eyemo yogokonya abanto gotesoi ase obokebago bwokoruta chipomu.

en: Update on United States Treasury sanctions targeting terrorism financing networks.
guz: Uamangana abwango korwa Ekegncha ekenene giesirikari ya America gosieka chibengi chiabanto gete na kobeka ebisusuro ase abamochi buna enchera eyemo yogatanga koa ebiombe biebibago chibesa.

en: Kenya’s strategy to curb radicalization and prevent violent extremism through community engagement and multi agency responses.
guz: Emeroberio ya Kenya gokora ogosarigwa obongo namang'ana yebibago na gotanga ogoakwa chipomugoetera okobwaterana nebinyoro nebitengo ao ao bieserikari goikerania ayio.

en: Public awareness campaign strengthening intelligence sharing and trust between communities and security agencies.
guz: Emeroberio yokomanyia abanto nigo egokong'ia okoererania kwobotuki na komenta okwegenana gati yabanto nabarendi boborendi.

en: Kenya Police measures to combat terrorism and violent extremism focusing on the Anti Terrorism Police Unit.
guz: Emeroberio ya abasikari ba Kenya arengete abasikari baria boborendi bwogotanga obokebago bwokoruta chipomu, namangana yosaria obongo goetera amorokererio amabe.

en: Video report on Special Operations Group activities countering terror threats in high risk border areas.
guz: Esinema yaorogeti buna ebi egekundi kiabasikari kiabeene kiegeirie buya kegima erio gosagana obwoba bwokutita chipomu aase aria yechimbe chia Kenya aregire nogoakwa chipomu.

en: UNODC and Kenya partnership to enhance legal frameworks and build investigative capacity against terrorism.
guz: Ekeombe kiobomo bwechinse chiria chikwegambera korwania amariogo agotindia (UNODC) goetera okobwaterana na Kenya mbabwateranete goikerania amachiko yokorwania obokebago na gokinia chinguru chiobotuki bwobokebago bwokoruta chipomu.

en: Discussion of Kenya’s intelligence led counter terrorism operations informed by past attacks.
guz: Chinkwana chiobotuki bwa Kenya nekeombe keria kiobotuki gokinana nobokebago bwokoruta chipomu, nemeremo yakoretwe nigo yasiretwe nokomanya kwa ayakoregete nyuma.

en: United Nations factsheet guiding civic groups on protecting human rights during counter terrorism work.
guz: Egetabu kiobomo bwechinse chiria chikwegambera (UN) igoro yokorenda oboronge bwamwanyabanto chingaki chiogokinana nobokebago bwokoruta hipomu.

en: Kenya’s county level action plans supporting prevention of radicalization and violent extremism.
guz: Emeroberion yechikaonti chia'Kenya nkworkia ere buna chikaonti chigosira eserikari gotanga ogosarigwa aobongo goetera amasomo amabe nobokebgo bwokuruta chipomu

en: Opening of the Anti Terrorism Police Unit Coast Headquarters to strengthen investigations and community engagement.
guz: Okoigorwa kwegetengo kia abasikari bakinana nobokebago bwokoruta chipomu aaria omochie omonene O'Mombasa gokong'ia obotuki nokobwaterana nebinyoro.

en: NCTC Kenya marks twenty years of counter terrorism efforts including intelligence sharing and policy development.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene giokorwania obokebago bwokoruta chipomu (NCTC) gia Kenya giatachire emiaka 20 korwa giachagete gokinana nobokebago obwo na mono kegima gosanga amangana obotuki nabasikari na gokongia obokoreri bwa abasikari.

en: Parliamentary amendment strengthening legal frameworks to combat terrorism financing and regulate virtual assets.
guz: Ogoochoreria kwa amachiko na Bunge gwakong'irie amachiko gokinana nobokebago bwokoruta chipomu na baria bakobaa chibesa goetra eintaneti gokora obosaria.

en: EU and Kenya partnership supporting implementation of the National Strategy to Counter Violent Extremism.
guz: Obomo bwa Bongereza (EU) ase okobwaterana na Kenya erio gosira ogoikerania omoroberio o'Kenya bwogotanga ogosarigwa obongo goetera amasomo amabe.

en: Summary of Anti Terrorism Police Unit mandate to prevent detect and investigate terrorism through cooperation and outreach.
guz: Amangana amenge bwa ayarengete egekosi gia Porisi kegokinana nobokebago bwokoruta chipomu erio gotuka, komanya bwango na gotanga bwango goetera okobwaterana na gosoka goikera.

en: Opening of the Coast Regional Anti Terrorism Police Unit headquarters to improve responses to terrorism cases.
guz: Ogochaka na koigorwa kwegekosi gia Porisi aaria chinsemo chia Mombasa buma oboikaranso bwaye obonene erio gokinana nobokebago bwokoruta chipomu gokongia gokinanan nobokebago obwo.

en: Kenya’s cybersecurity strategy to protect critical information infrastructure and enhance public online safety.
guz: Omoroberio o'Kenya korenda chisimi nechikombiuta tichitumeka bobe erio korenda amang'ana tasoa amaboko amabe buna enchera eyemo yogoikerania oborendi bweintaneti.

en: Toolkit empowering communities to counter violent extremism under the NIWETU multi stakeholder initiative.
guz: Egetabu kegosomia abanainchi buna baranyare gokinana nobokebago bwogosaria obongo goetera amasomo amabe inse yomoroberi o'NIWETU omoroberio bwabakoreri ao ao.

en: A partnership initiative is advancing the implementation of Kenya’s National Strategy to Counter Violent Extremism, prioritizing prevention measures and strengthening public awareness.
guz: Omoroberio bwokobwaterana nogendererete goikerania emeroberio emonene ya'Kenya igoro yogokinana nobokebago bwogosaria obongo goetera amasomo amabe, orenfgete buna obokebago boratangwe na gokongia emeroberio yokomanyia abanto amang'ana.

en: Highlights efforts to raise awareness on online safety and cybersecurity, emphasizing child protection.
guz: Amangana amanene agosegeta gokonia okomanya igoro yokwerenda korwa obosareku bweintaneti na amangana echisimi nechikombiuta erio erio korenda amang'ana, erengete oborendi bwabana.

en: Describes Anti Terrorism Police Unit prevention and investigation work using specialized teams.
guz: Nkorwa kere oboagare bwegekosi gia Porisi keria kegotumia okoererania ase obotuki na gotanga obokebago goetera ebitengo biabamanyi.

en: Calls for stronger consumer education and digital safety to address cyber threats.
guz: Okoboria gwechinguru ng'a abagokorerwa emeremo basemigwe igorro yoboronge bwabo na buna babwenerete kwerenda gedichitari erio gotanga obwoba korwa eintaneti.

en: Kenya Defence Forces and National Police collaborate on youth engagement and de radicalization.
guz: Amaami a'Kenya na nabasikari ba Kenya nkobwaterana bare ase omoroberio bwogokwana nabasae buna enchera eyemo yokobakania gotasoa ebiombe biogoria obongo goetera amasomo amabe.

en: UNDP Kenya and NCTC lead PREVENT to strengthen community resilience.
guz: Obomo bwechinse chikwagembera ase enchera yamagenderero (UNDP) aiga Kenya na ekeombe keria kegokinana nobokebago bwokoruta chipomu (NCTC) nabwio bakoraa omoroberio o'PREVENT erio gokong'ia okwenyara kwebinyoro gokinnan nobokebago.

en: Presents the national strategy for preventing and reversing radicalization.
guz: Nkorwa kere omoroberio bwense gokongia abanto gwetanga gosoa obokebago namasomo agosaria obongo.

en: Reports on campaigns building trust and intelligence sharing with communities.
guz: Nkomanyia bare igoro yechinkwana chigosegeta gokina okwegenana na koererania amang'ana obotuki nabanyabinyoro.

en: Outlines Anti Terrorism Police Unit operations focused on investigations and public cooperation.
guz: Nkworokereria are igoro yemeroberio ya yegekosi kia abasikari gokonana nobokebago bwokoruta chipomu birengete obotuki na obosagani ebinyoro.

en: EU and Kenya partnership supports effective implementation of NSCVE.
guz: Obomo bwa Biongeresa (EU) ase okobwaterana na Kenya gosira igoikerania boronge emeroberio yekeombe keria ekenene gia Kenya gekorwania amaosom yogosaria obongo (NSCVE).

en: NCTC coordinates prevention, detection, and disruption through outreach and capacity building.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene getenerete gokinana nobokebago bwokoruta chipomu (NCTC) nkoraa kere emeroberio komanya na gotanga obokebago goetera ogosoka isiko na gokwana nabanto buna enchera eyemo yogokong'ia obokoreri.

en: ATPU conducts threat interdiction, awareness, and multi agency operations.
guz: Egetengo kia abasikari getenerete gokinana nobokebago bwokoruta chipomu (ATPU) ngotanga kere obokebago botaraba, komanyia abanto, amo nokobwaterana nebitengo binde bieserikari.

en: EU and Kenya expand engagement to operationalize the NSCVE.
guz: Obomo bwa Bogeresa EU na Kenya bagareirie obokoreri bwabo goikerania emeroberio ya Kenya yoborendi gokinanana nobokebago bwogosaria obongo goewtera amasomo amabe (NSCVE).

en: New legislation strengthens financial transparency and anti terrorism financing measures.
guz: Amachiko amayia okongirie obomiso marore buna chibesa chikoenanwa erio gotanga buna ebibago bwokoruta chipomu bikoegwa chibesa gokora oboseria bwabo.

en: Security agencies receive updated protocols for data and intelligence sharing.
guz: Ebitengo bioborendi nkomanyigwa bire emeroberio emeyia yogokora emeremo yabo ase amangana na koererania obotuki.

en: Kenya launches curriculum enabling officers to identify and counter extremism.
guz: Kenya yaansire amasomo gokonya abarai komanya na gotanga obokebago bwogosaria ebirengererio.

en: Kenya adopts updated UN and FATF sanctions lists targeting terrorism financing.
guz: Kenya yaitabire na gochaka gokorera emeremo ebikwaso biabegetwe na nobomo bwechinse chikwegambera (UN) na ekeombe keria ekenene gekorigereri buna chibesa chigokora emeremo (FATF) kerengete gotanga ebibago biokorut chipomu koegwa chibesa.

en: Parliament strengthens anti money laundering and counter terrorism financing frameworks.
guz: Bunge yakongirie okorosia chipesa chia pandia na gokinana nobokebago bwokoruta chipomu na baria bakobaa chibesa gokora obokebago obwo.

en: Counties are urged to integrate violent extremism prevention into development programs.
guz: Chikaonti chiaboriigwe kobwatania amsomo yogotanga ogosarigwa obongo nebobago ime yemeroberio yabo yamagenderero.

en: NCTC uses online platforms to increase awareness and reporting.
guz: Ekeombe gia Kenya getenenerete gokinanana gotanga obokebago bwokoruta chipomu (NCTC) ngotumia kere omoroberio bweintaneti komnyia abanto na korwa chiripoti.

en: UNODC highlights Kenya’s strategy development and shares regional best practices.
guz: Obomo bwechinse chire chikwegambera gokinana namariogo oagotindia (UNODC) kiarokirie omoroberio buna Kenya yagendereire ase emeremo yaye na kererania ayakorirwe buya chingongo ao ao.

en: Kenya launches a C-IED training complex to train security personnel.
guz: Kenya yaansire esukuru yabeene kwegeria abakoreri baye boborendi buna bakomanya na gotegora chipomu chiokweroseria (C-IED).

en: Kenya updated the PBO Act to tighten oversight on terrorism financing. Stay compliant and report suspicious activity.
guz: Kenya yarigereirie keboyia amachiko yebiombe bitari bieserikari (PBO) gokongia obomongeri igoro yokoa abibago bwokoruta chipomu chibesa gokora obokebago bwabo. Kabe omoikaranu na karue eripoti igoro yebikoru biechitang'utang'u.

en: Corruption threatens security and growth. Report unethical conduct to safeguard public resources.
guz: Obokengeka nokokosia ase aborendo namagenderero. Karwe eripoti yebikoru ore nechitangutangu gose ogokora gotabwenereti gochia ase abarai korena obonda bwebinyoro na Kenya.

en: Transparency International Kenya drives accountability. Stay informed and take action against bribery.
guz: Ekeombe gia Transparency International Kenya ngosegeta kere oboteneri obuya. Kabe maiso na bogoria egetambokero igoro yokorwa amaaki.

en: Report corruption anonymously through hotlines and portals to support fast investigations.
guz: Manyia abaraia amangana igoro yobokengeka otari kwemanyekania goetera enamba yesimi morerero na gowetera eintaneti erio goikerania obotuki bwa bwango.

en: Learn how corruption affects services and take part in community education to prevent it.
guz: Soma buna obokengeka bore omochando ase obokoreri nigo kabe oyomo ase okomanyia na gosomia ekenyoro bun enchera eyemo yogotanga obokorekanu.

en: Know your rights and demand integrity from public officials to reduce corruption risks.
guz: Manya oboronge bwa na boria ng'a abakoreri beserikari babe abeene ase emeremo yabo gokeania obokengeka.

en: Civil society networks across Africa push for transparency. Support governance-strengthening efforts.
guz: Okobwaterana kwebiombe bitari bieserikari Africa engima mbagendererete gosuguma obomaiso marore ase obokoreri. Sira emeroberio eye egokongia obogambi obuya.

en: Transparent governance improves safety and service delivery. Stay alert and speak up in your community.
guz: Obogambi bwa maiso marore nigo bogokongia oborendi nobokoreri. Kabe maiso na kwana igoro yobokengeka ase ekenyoro kiao.

en: Reporting corruption aids asset recovery and strengthens law enforcement. Use official channels.
guz: Karwe eripoti yobokengeka nigo egokonya ase okoirania enibo konye yaibirwe na gokong'ia obokoreri bwamachiko . Wetera chinchera chiekeofisi.

en: Awareness of corruption’s impact builds vigilance and ethical behavior, boosting national security.
guz: Komanyia abanto igoo yobokengeka ngokong'ia ere koba maiso na gokorera ekeene, na gokong.ia oborendi bwense.

en: Global partnerships enhance anti‑corruption efforts through stronger enforcement and transparency.
guz: Okobwaterana nense engima ngokongia kore gokinana nobokengeka goetera obokoreri mwamachiko bwechinguru na obomaiso marore.

en: Kenya increased funding for anti‑corruption bodies for stronger accountability in 2025.
guz: Kenya yagesete ekerengo giechibesa as ebitengo biria biogokinana nobokengeka goikerania abokeri oboikeranu omwaka 2025.

en: EACC marked national celebrations highlighting corruption’s impact on dignity and services.
guz: Ekeombe giokorwania obojkengeka (EACC) ekero kiegeikaranso kierituko rinene okorurerwa igoro yobokengeka kiarengete gosegeta obwegenwa ase obokoreri.

en: A new justice sector framework was introduced to unify anti‑corruption efforts.
guz: Amaonchorerio ime yeserikari ase obokoreri bwamachiko arengete chikoti naansetwe koreta amo okorwania obokengeka.

en: EACC recovered KSh 28B over six years, redirecting resources to public projects.
guz: Ekeombe keria gekorwania obokengeka (EACC) nkiairanetie chieiringi chibirioni 28 gati yemiaka 6, na enibo eyio ekabagwa ase amagenderero ense.

en: The Kenya Integrity Plan sets a roadmap for transparency improvements through 2028.
guz: Omoroberio bwerichiko omonene o'Kenya igoro yobwegenwa ase emeremo nobegete chingaki goikerani gokora emeremo boronge na maiso marore goika omwaka 2028.

en: Recent prosecutions of officials show commitment to tackling economic crimes.
guz: Okonacherwa ekina kwa abaofisa bwango iga nekiorokererio giesirikari korwania obosaria bwobogoko bwense.

en: A bill proposes a 10‑year procurement ban for individuals and firms convicted of corruption.
guz: Richiko riyia igoro yobogori bwobokengeka riabekire ogotangwa emiaka 10 korwa obogori ae abagoribakonyorekana koba abogori bakengeka.

en: KNCHR calls for stronger measures to protect human rights from corruption impacts.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenen gekorwanerera oborongo bwa mwanyabanto (KNCHR) kiaboririe ng'a emeroberio emiya yokorenda yokorenda oboronge bwa'banto korwa emechando ekorentwa nobokorekanu.

en: EACC stresses multi‑sector participation, using technology to strengthen anti‑corruption action.
guz: Ekeombe keria gekorwania obokorekanu (EACC) kiaboririe okobwaterana nebitengo ao ao, goetera etekinorochi gokong'ia korwania obokorekanu.

en: Judiciary budget upgrades will automate courts and speed up corruption case handling.
guz: Okogeswa chibesa ase obokoreri bwa koti mboikerania chikoti gokora emeremo yaye goetera etekinorochi ase obokoreri obuya Jkwangoi kogaba ebina biobokorekanu.

en: African Anti‑Corruption Day 2025 urged united action against abuses of human dignity.
guz: Ekeombe gia African kere mamincha nobokorekanu rituko riokoinyora obokorekanu omwaka 2025 ngiasabete okobwaterana na bonsi korwania obokengeka bokoura abanto oboronge, amasikani na komenya buya.

en: EACC partnered with the Catholic Church to promote ethics during the 2025 Lenten season.
guz: Ekeombe keria gekorwania obokengeka (EACC) nkiabwateranete nekanisa yabaromani Katholic gosegeta amachiko yogokora emeremo chingaki chia amatuko 40 yokwengata omwaka 2025.

en: KLIF engaged private sector partners to advance the Kenya Integrity Plan.
guz: Ogocha amo gwekeombe kiemegondo nobokoreri (KLIF) nkiakwanerete nabanyabiasara kobwatera erio gokina meroberio yobokeri bwobwegenwa bwa Kenya.

en: Kenya suspended officials implicated in graft, reinforcing zero‑tolerance policy.
guz: Kenya yarusetie abakori baye emeremo ase emeremop bri banyorekanete bare kengeka, goikerania richiko riogotekumba ase obokorekanu.

en: A justice sector framework was launched to rebuild trust and curb corruption.
guz: Amachiko akoraa chikoti naansetwe gokinia obwegenwa na gokora obokengeka.

en: The Kenya Integrity Plan expands oversight and training across all counties.
guz: Omoroberio o'Kenya igoro yobwegenwaiogareeirie obomongeria nokwegerigwa ase chikaonti chionso.

en: EACC raised awareness at the 2025 Eldoret Show on reporting corruption.
guz: Ekeombe keria gekorwania obokengeka (EACC) ngiakorete okomanya omoerio bwomwaka 2025 aaria ase amoorokereria yoboremi Eldoret buna aranyare koria eriporti igoro yobokorekanu.

en: Anti‑corruption training reached officials and residents in Nandi County.
guz: Amasomo igoro yogotanga obokengeka naikerete abaofisa nabamenyi ba ba aaria ekaonti ya Nandi.

en: KNCHR highlighted activism as a tool to expose corruption and demand accountability.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene gekorigereria oboronge bwa mwanyabanto (KNCHR) yaorokire buna obosemia nogosuguma buna egekoreri ekenene goasioria obokorekanu na gosaba ng'a obotenereri obuya bwobokoreri.

en: Kenya’s judiciary is automating courts to improve transparency nationwide.
guz: chikoti chia Kenya chiansire obokoreri goetera eintaneti goikerania obomaisomarore bwemeremo Kenya engima.

en: EACC filed 47 civil suits to recover KSh 9.2B in stolen assets.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene gokorwania obokorekanu (EACC) ngiasoete ebina 47 biamang'ana egenka koirania chibirioni 9.2 chiebinto bieserikari bibire chikaonti ao ao.

en: Transport Department launched a risk prevention plan to improve transparency.
guz: Ensemo yobobogoria yaansete emeroberio yogotanga emebasekano yechipara buna enchera eyemo goyoikerania obomaiso marore.

en: EACC partnered with Catholic Church Kisumu to promote ethics during Lent.
guz: Ekeombe keria gekorwania obokorekanu (EACC) nkibwatanete nekanisa ya Roman Catholiki aaria Kisumu gosegeta keene ase egasi chingaki chiepasaka.

en: Youth and public engaged through integrity clubs at Eldoret Show.
guz: Abasae nechinkwana chebinyoro goetra ebiombe bioboene aaria Eldoret chiokworokia igoro oboremi.

en: Kenya increased budgets for oversight bodies in FY2025/26.
guz: Kenya yagesete ekerengo giechibesa chiogokora emeremo ase ebiombe biria bikomongera obokoreri ase omwaka bwechibes 2025/26.

en: Kenya led the 9th African Anti‑Corruption Day urging unified action.
guz: Kenya yaraete ekeombe kia Afrika giokorwania obokengeka rituko riogochengera okorwania obokengeka ase oboamo.

en: EACC urged Bungoma leaders to support anti‑corruption investigations.
guz: Ekeombe keria ekenene giokorwania obokorekanu (EACC) nkiaboretie abarai ba Bungoma gisira obokongoria bwogotanga obokengeka.
